name: Derek Schmidt
subject: (!) Laura Kelly is Fighting Parental Rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
There is nothing more important to me than raising our next generation of Kansans. As a father myself, I can say without any doubt that my role as a parent is the most important role I’ve ever had, and ever will have. If you’re a parent, I’m sure you’ll agree with me.| | |
---
| | Friend,**

** There is nothing more important to me than raising our next generation of Kansans. As a father myself, I can say without any doubt that my role as a parent is the most important role I’ve ever had, and ever will have. If you’re a parent, I’m sure you’ll agree with me. You’ll also agree that parents need to be front and center... And in control of the upbringing of their own children. **Does Laura Kelly agree with us? She sure hasn’t acted like it! ** She’s walked in lock-step with President Biden’s radical agenda, and it’s harming our kids. That's why I joined Fox News’ _Hannity_ to set the record straight. You can watch my interview below, **and while you’re there...[You can chip in $25 to help us BEAT Laura Kelly.](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=3b086128f49f44f190c53716ca2bbcc5&_e=ojzs2BBx6VCFelGV13py-PJlvupkBi3ONnjUSM_G4TvgA6VOWknMKfo0peKpxI5QDtlAYjqDm_SQ6NgY91xjIYEQyaXwrIlGDiW5uuIaXXshk4YR4txNugaVsh5wSHQ-_J3k55Mw9bk0-avGoQ_zQpR27btg59Pj9J8fiAv1YUDitvoJaWfqpHGnGOHlCQOZemJp9c_ElpQcOEm7q5brUV4A87f1lbSp9XsXpEa4lhBJ3pscQ2tUCU9HMLSYTJjmiebCIU6rJcjayrNsNZrUIOL91kWCvRHVELrpL83I9rpQ0WXBojJO21ywtZrxUiiOBmauVGDNe32i38-bcJ2YExRw8ZJUMxGzquhQbWVfbOI-0TTuqspgVjxJHOIfsnC5EbDGCVOXHwopXcfWs3C4skCkN-EdJjHTpP4-E83Rw1M%3D)**

**Here’s the truth...** When Kansans tried to pass a Parents Bill of Rights, to make sure parents know what’s going on in the classroom... **Laura Kelly vetoed it.** When Kansans tried to pass a Fairness in Women’s Sports bill, to keep biological males from competing against girls & denying them the chance at victories and even scholarship opportunities... **Laura Kelly vetoed it – TWICE.** We can do so much better, and by firing Laura Kelly from the governor’s office... name: Team Beto
subject: Bad news re: Greg Abbott’s ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We need to fight back.
#
Did you catch this concerning quote from _The Texas Tribune_?
“With his cash-on-hand advantage over O’Rourke, Abbott has already spent _millions_ of dollars on TV, blanketing the state with positive biographical ads that began airing Aug. 16. Earlier this summer, Abbott’s campaign unveiled plans to spend at least $8.8 million on TV in the fall, plus $2.75 million on Hispanic media.”
If we don’t ramp up our own TV ad spending, Abbott will be able to control the narrative and distract millions of Texas voters from his failures as governor.
[Can Beto count on you to help fight back, get our own ads on the air, and reach the voters who will decide this election? Chip in $3 or anything you can now.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220903-3.m1GFMa&refcode=ema20220903-206182&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=206182%2E444211%2EjPPcTS)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220903-3.m1GFMa&refcode=ema20220903-206182&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=206182%2E444211%2EjPPcTS)**
Our TV ads are going to tell Texans the truth about Greg Abbott. We are going to ensure that every Texan knows exactly how Greg Abbott has failed them over the last seven years — from jacking up their energy bills and defunding their public schools to his extreme attacks on health care and his inability to keep kids safe.
But Abbott could drown out the truth if he continues to “dominate the airwaves” between now and November. The only way to fight back is to get Beto’s message out there too.
[Please donate anything you can to ensure we can fight back and get more of our own ads on the air. We can’t let Greg Abbott spend his way to another term as Governor.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220903-3.m1GFMa&refcode=ema20220903-206182&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=206182%2E444211%2EjPPcTS)

Team Beto

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Baugh=20=28R=2DCA=29?=
subject: Katie Porter Is Building An Army
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
Scott Baugh is running against Katie Porter in a must-win race for Republicans. |
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=2adc0b3f98&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Peter,

It’s not hyperbole to say that Katie Porter is leading House Democrats in creating an Army of IRS agents to enforce their far-left agenda! Here are the facts:

The IRS currently has a little more than 75,000 full-time employees, so the bill Katie Porter just passed would more than double the agency’s workforce. Non-partisan experts agree that the brunt of the new enforcement is likely to target low and middle-income Americans.

But that’s not nearly the worst of it. We are now learning that t**he IRS is hiring agents willing to use “deadly force”** and that t**he IRS already has a stockpile of thousands of guns** , including fully automatic firearms and more than 3 million rounds of ammo.
---
| [STOP KATIE PORTER’S ARMY NOW!](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=2a438acd2f&e=8a657725d1 "STOP KATIE PORTER’S ARMY NOW!")
---
| Peter, Democrats want to disarm American citizens and neuter our Border Patrol at the same time as they stockpile weapons for an army of agents at the IRS. This is out of control!

It just goes to show how important it is that Republicans take back the House this November to put an end to this authoritarian outburst once and for all.

That’s why we must defeat Katie Porter in California’s 47th Congressional District. Fox News has already named this one of the most important races for Republicans to win this Fall. They’re calling it a “Toss Up.”

**So, please, will you rush in your support now to help me defeat out-of-control liberal Katie Porter?**
---

clean_body: Scott Baugh is running against Katie Porter in a must-win race for Republicans. | | | | Peter, It’s not hyperbole to say that Katie Porter is leading House Democrats in creating an Army of IRS agents to enforce their far-left agenda! Here are the facts: The IRS currently has a little more than 75,000 full-time employees, so the bill Katie Porter just passed would more than double the agency’s workforce. Non-partisan experts agree that the brunt of the new enforcement is likely to target low and middle-income Americans. But that’s not nearly the worst of it. We are now learning that the IRS is hiring agents willing to use “deadly force” and that the IRS already has a stockpile of thousands of guns , including fully automatic firearms and more than 3 million rounds of ammo. | "STOP KATIE PORTER’S ARMY NOW!" | Peter, Democrats want to disarm American citizens and neuter our Border Patrol at the same time as they stockpile weapons for an army of agents at the IRS. This is out of control! It just goes to show how important it is that Republicans take back the House this November to put an end to this authoritarian outburst once and for all. That’s why we must defeat Katie Porter in California’s 47th Congressional District. Fox News has already named this one of the most important races for Republicans to win this Fall. They’re calling it a “Toss Up.” So, please, will you rush in your support now to help me defeat out-of-control liberal Katie Porter? | "CHIP IN $5" | "DONATE $10" | "CONTRIBUTE $20.22" | "HELP WITH ANYTHING YOU CAN" | Thank you, Scott Baugh | | "Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress. name: Ron Johnson
subject: a personal plea 🙏
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I have never seen the Left more aggressive and out of control as they are in the last few days and weeks. Long gone are the days of polite discourse, the days when we could have disagreements without it ending in riots and chaos. Not only is the left posting the personal addresses of SCOTUS members on Twitter, but in Washington DC, activists are giving cash to restaurants to "out" SCOTUS members if they dine in.

I knew when I announced my campaign for re-election that this would be a campaign unlike one I've ever seen before, and it has. The vitriol and slander I've seen so far this year has never been paralleled.

The days of decorum have disappeared, but can and need to return. And that's why I'm running for re-election. Democrats have let major cities become crime ridden, they are behind the rising inflation we are experiencing at the pump and grocery stores, and this is just the beginning of their mayhem.

This is not a landscape that I want our children and grandchildren growing up in. I will always fight for their future, and I hope if you stand with me in that fight you'll stand with me right now in this campaign.

I hate asking for money - it's my least favorite thing to do. But the facts are simple. Democrats across the country are gearing up to make this Wisconsin Senate race the most expensive in history in an attempt to not just defeat me, but defeat our values and beliefs.

No donation is too small. $25 makes a difference. $25 can help us reach that one undecided voter and ensure they get out and vote and keep WI red.

I know our nation's brightest days are ahead of us, but getting there isn't going to be easy. _**[We can win in November if I can count on your support right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61183195:J31L2GV_N:m:1:3334294963:29C5B89F5ED789287EABC340022D7C29:r "Johnson1")**_

Please, Peter, our future is counting on our actions today.

Thanks for reading this email. I appreciate you and your family.

Thank you for your support,
Ron

---
| |
* * *
---
---
A note from Ron Johnson: America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. **This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.******************As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same.

_**[**Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61183196:J31L2GV_N:m:1:3334294963:29C5B89F5ED789287EABC340022D7C29:r "Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?")**_********************************************
---
| | [FIGHT FOR FREEDOM WITH RON JOHNSON >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61183196:J31L2GV_N:m:1:3334294963:29C5B89F5ED789287EABC340022D7C29:r "button")
---
| Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc.
---
PO Box 1159
Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159

RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC.

body:
If we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep control of the Senate.
| | |
---
I'll be honest, friend – my General Election Membership campaign expires at midnight, but I'm still 128 members short of my goal.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50204119/365018357/-1315874399?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4239-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2UyNjIxNS1mMTJiLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=upWs_rwhYro_zXIDJ-y7b2D7nbLXouG-ghCRLK0YU80=)
Marco Rubio and the GOP know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep control of the Senate. That's why they're pouring money into Florida to try and buy this seat – no matter how much it costs.
**Right now, Marco Rubio is more vulnerable than ever – but we need resources to compete with him. With time running out before tonight's deadline, I see that you still haven't activated your membership. Senate control is riding on what happens here, so I hope I can count on you to give right now:**

[Please, if you haven't already, activate your General Election Membership by donating $5 – or whatever you can spare right now – to help me win in Florida and expand our Democratic Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50204120/365018358/-1315874399?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4239-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2UyNjIxNS1mMTJiLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=upWs_rwhYro_zXIDJ-y7b2D7nbLXouG-ghCRLK0YU80=)

Thanks,

Val Demings

Trump has spent the past year or so parading around the country spreading his far-right conspiracy theories – and tonight’s rally marks his 17th of the year. It’s all a part of Trump’s plan to build support for his endorsees and embolden his base ahead of his likely 2024 campaign announcement.
These rallies rile up Trump’s base like nothing else – and tonight was no exception. **His Republican cronies will flood his PAC’s account with donations to back him and his endorsed state Republicans. The money they raise now will be spent to crush Democrats this year and beyond, so we need the full strength of our grassroots movement standing with us right now.**

It’s all a part of Trump’s plan to build support for his endorsees and embolden his base ahead of his likely 2024 campaign announcement. These rallies rile up Trump’s base like nothing else – and tonight was no exception. His Republican cronies will flood his PAC’s account with donations to back him and his endorsed state Republicans. The money they raise now will be spent to crush Democrats this year and beyond, so we need the full strength of our grassroots movement standing with us right now. name: Matt Whitaker
subject: I’m sure you already know the backstory: 👀
body:
| | | Peter, Former President Trump is going on the offensive and appears to be launching a full-scale fight against the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). We here at the America First Policy Institute are joining the fight. I'm sure you already know the backstory: The FBI recently raided former President Trump's home in what could be politically-motivated. This ordeal should paint a clear picture for us: The deep state is real, and we can't afford to sit around playing defense while the FBI raids a former President's home. **_We MUST go on the offensive._** [**And that 's exactly what I plan to do. Will you help me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188684:6__H2GVN1:m:1:3253819041:43624925882C688FF3D19DBC23CC6D87:r) _Our country is at risk of crumbling into a banana republic run by the most radical leftists in America and an invulnerable deep state. WE HAVE NO CHOICE BUT TO FIGHT BACK!_ When the news broke, our entire team sprung into action to respond. Within 48 hours, we filed more than 50 Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the Biden Administration and find out who knew what and when. But I assure you, the Department of Justice (DOJ) is not going to hand over information easily, and we may have to battle with the DOJ for months or even YEARS to uncover the truth fully. **We CANNOT sustain our efforts without you ... ** **[Will you chip in before it's to help ensure our efforts can continue?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188684:6__H2GVN1:m:1:3253819041:43624925882C688FF3D19DBC23CC6D87:r)**[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188684:6__H2GVN1:m:1:3253819041:43624925882C688FF3D19DBC23CC6D87:r) Let me back up. My name is Matt Whitaker... I was appointed acting United States Attorney General under former President Trump. In that role, I protected Law and Order both at home and abroad. Today I am Co-Chair of the Center for Law & Justice at the America First Policy Institute, where we strive to protect and preserve the rule of law in this great Nation. Together, we will fight back against the radical Left and end its unjust weaponization of the FBI. The team at America First Policy Institute is the best in the Nation, and we're ready to make a HUGE difference for our country--ESPECIALLY when it comes to uncovering the truth regarding the FBI raid. [**I hope you 'll consider sending in a donation of $25, $35, or $50 today. ** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188684:6__H2GVN1:m:1:3253819041:43624925882C688FF3D19DBC23CC6D87:r) Sincerely, Matt Whitaker Co-Chair, Center for Law & Justice America First Policy Institute P.S. We've seen it time and time again. Castro's Cuba. Stalin's Russia. Nazi Germany. Mao's China. Great nations fall to tyranny when governments weaponize law enforcement against patriots and political opponents. [**I 'll fight with every breath to make sure that America doesn't have the same fate. Will you? ** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188684:6__H2GVN1:m:1:3253819041:43624925882C688FF3D19DBC23CC6D87:r)
---
[**DONATE NOW!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188684:6__H2GVN1:m:1:3253819041:43624925882C688FF3D19DBC23CC6D87:r)
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188684:6__H2GVN1:m:1:3253819041:43624925882C688FF3D19DBC23CC6D87:r)
---

body:
Why doesn't Biden want to Make America Great Again? | If you look at the words and meaning of the awkward and angry speech...
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188256:6Ae3EGVIN:m:1:3317145305:F38D2533485F79CC7DDE01461F589F74:r)

_**[IN CASE YOU MISSED IT: JOE BIDEN DOES NOT WANT TO MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188256:6Ae3EGVIN:m:1:3317145305:F38D2533485F79CC7DDE01461F589F74:r)**_

**[_" ...there's no question that the Republican Party today is dominated, driven, intimidated by Donald Trump and the MAGA Republicans. And that is a threat to this country."_
\- Joe Biden, September 1, 2022](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188256:6Ae3EGVIN:m:1:3317145305:F38D2533485F79CC7DDE01461F589F74:r)**

Peter, if you look at the words and meaning of the awkward and angry speech from Biden, it's clear:

**Joe Biden hates America.

Joe Biden hates the MAGA movement.

Joe Biden hates YOU and everything YOU stand for. **

Someone needs to explain to him that MAGA means _MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!_

He went on national television and LIED about me and the Patriotic Americans who support me. He's scared of us because he knows that despite his best efforts, we will not only **SAVE AMERICA** , but we will **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.**

_With your help, I want to make a statement SO LOUD that even Sleepy Joe and his Fake News friends won 't be able to ignore us. I need YOU to rush in a donation and publicly show your support._

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to proudly stand with me to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188256:6Ae3EGVIN:m:1:3317145305:F38D2533485F79CC7DDE01461F589F74:r)**

Thank you,

name: Former Navy SEAL Ryan Zinke
subject: TERRIBLE NEWS! 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
I'm at my wits' end, Peter. Pelosi and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my campaign, **_but Republicans may never win another race this year._** **Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.** **I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.** If Pelosi can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. **I have Trump 's endorsement, I lead the team of Navy SEAL's running for Congress, and I have more battle experience than anyone else.** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188254:6lnnEGV2N:m:1:3253819041:B7CE7BBAC240B176A5C72094BFB6ADDB:r) The point is, Peter, I'm the toughest Republican running for office. If I can't beat Pelosi - no one can. So, I'm going to be blunt with you. [**If you chip in just $5 right now**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188254:6lnnEGV2N:m:1:3253819041:B7CE7BBAC240B176A5C72094BFB6ADDB:r), I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Pelosi's plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? [**DONATE TODAY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188254:6lnnEGV2N:m:1:3253819041:B7CE7BBAC240B176A5C72094BFB6ADDB:r) You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will return the favor in Congress. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke [**DONATE TODAY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188254:6lnnEGV2N:m:1:3253819041:B7CE7BBAC240B176A5C72094BFB6ADDB:r)

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my campaign, but Republicans may never win another race this year. Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6. I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation. If Pelosi can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. I have Trump 's endorsement, I lead the team of Navy SEAL's running for Congress, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. The point is, Peter, I'm the toughest Republican running for office. If I can't beat Pelosi - no one can. So, I'm going to be blunt with you. , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Pelosi's plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will return the favor in Congress. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke | Paid for by Zinke for Congress PO BOX 1597 Helena, MT 59624 Ryan Zinke is a U.S. Navy Veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy. name: John Fetterman
subject: “Dirty sweatsuits”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
You can’t make this sh*t up.
#
Derek,
**We just heard more and more lies from Donald Trump + Dr. Oz at their rally in Wilkes-Barre tonight.**
I mean, Trump literally just called me a "raging lunatic" and said I would "bring death and destruction" to PA.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220903-2?refcode=em20220903-7121&refcode2=7121_434096_ZkPghS&akid=7121%2E434096%2EZkPghS)
**[Can you please rush a donation to my campaign ASAP so we’ll have the resources to keep fighting back against these two desperate + sad dudes?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220903-2?refcode=em20220903-7121&refcode2=7121_434096_ZkPghS&akid=7121%2E434096%2EZkPghS)**

Derek, the “raging lunatic” comment was just one thing Donald Trump said about yours truly at the big MAGA rally in PA for Dr. Oz tonight.
He even said I wear “dirty sweatsuits.”
Yeahhh... Ok.
You really can’t make this sh*t up, Derek. But I know yinz have my back. 🥰
**[Will you please rush a donation of any amount right now? Tonight’s rally made it clear that Trump is ready to do whatever it takes to support Dr. Oz + defeat our grassroots movement and we need to be prepared for whatever comes next.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220903-2?refcode=em20220903-7121&refcode2=7121_434096_ZkPghS&akid=7121%2E434096%2EZkPghS)**

Thank you for standing with me when it matters most.
– John ❤️

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220903-7121-footer&t=1&refcode2=7121_434096_ZkPghS&akid=7121%2E434096%2EZkPghS)**

name: Kari Lake
subject: I'm not hiding. The problem is the whole damn system
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188401:6ztZwGV9N:m:1:3317145305:32F8AA55F6F4E12B39538A6376996AB8:r)
---
| | Peter, What is it with the establishment elites HIDING from the people? Joe Biden's been in the basement for months. He pops out - delivers a massively unpopular plan for student loan forgiveness - and goes back to avoiding the public. That peek-a-boo act must be written into the official Democrat playbook because my opponent, Katie Hobbs, is doing the exact same thing! She refuses to debate. She refuses to show her face to the people of Arizona. If she's not making a plea to the radical left for more Soros money to fund her campaign, no one hears from her at all. This unaccountable, ridiculous behavior is so typical of a political establishment that does not value the voice of the people. _[**FIGHT BACK >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188401:6ztZwGV9N:m:1:3317145305:32F8AA55F6F4E12B39538A6376996AB8:r)_ Now, it should be clear by now... **I'm not hiding.** That's because**I 'M NOT AFRAID.** I speak with the people every day because I believe that WE THE PEOPLE deserve to hear from both sides and get a fair idea of who will stand for you and who won't. _The silence is deafening. _ While conservative leaders like me on the NEW RIGHT are open books... The failing establishment elites are closed doors.
It's time for us to say OUT WITH THE OLD, and in with the NEW (RIGHT) so we can SAVE AMERICA from these out-of-touch narcissists. **__[Are you with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188401:6ztZwGV9N:m:1:3317145305:32F8AA55F6F4E12B39538A6376996AB8:r)_ _**
---
[**SUPPORT KARI LAKE NOW >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188401:6ztZwGV9N:m:1:3317145305:32F8AA55F6F4E12B39538A6376996AB8:r)
---
I'm telling you right now that I am a strong conservative who can get things done. I'm the transformative leadership we need. _But you don't need to just take my word for it. _ **I'm endorsed by:**
* * * * * * President Donald Trump
* Governor Ron DeSantis
* Rudy Giuliani
* Marjorie Taylor Green
* Sheriff Joe Arpaio
* Richard Grenell
* General Michael Flynn, and more...

---
[**JOIN PRESIDENT TRUMP: SUPPORT KARI LAKE >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188401:6ztZwGV9N:m:1:3317145305:32F8AA55F6F4E12B39538A6376996AB8:r)
---
Together, we're going to unite to solve the problems America is facing right now. And trust me... there's a lot to do.
_But I know I can make it happen because I 've always been able to do anything I set my mind to. And that's not going to stop now!_
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188401:6ztZwGV9N:m:1:3317145305:32F8AA55F6F4E12B39538A6376996AB8:r)
---
I grew up in Iowa. There's not a lot to do there, but that's where I honed my work ethic. I worked hard. I learned to fight. I gained that fighting spirit the old establishment GOP never had -- that's what makes me a part of the NEW RIGHT. I developed that backbone of steel - that "BDE" that President Trump and Governor Ron DeSantis have. And frankly, that we want all of our elected leaders to have. Someone even recently told me "Kari, you're going to be the DeSantis of the West." Other than being called "Trump in a Dress -- which is my favorite compliment of all -- that is the greatest compliment you could pay me. **To me, that means that you know when you elect me, you 're going to get someone who fights for you every single day. ** We are going to be so effective in Arizona.
---
[**SUPPORT KARI LAKE >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188401:6ztZwGV9N:m:1:3317145305:32F8AA55F6F4E12B39538A6376996AB8:r)
---
**Peter, I promise you this, as the governor of Arizona, I will be the biggest pain in the ass Joe Biden 's ever experienced. ** I will unite with conservatives across the country to protect Arizona from this out-of-control federal government. We will save our states and return the power to WE, THE PEOPLE, where it belongs. **_This is our moment to make it happen. _**
---
Peter, let's not forget that the race for Governor of Arizona is one of the most important fights in the entire country.** ** It's our chance to prove to corporate media that we are stronger than the lies. ** ** It's our chance to prove to the establishment elite that the NEW RIGHT is here to stay.** ** And it's our chance to SECURE OUR BORDER, defend our small businesses, defeat inflation, end leftist indoctrination and get our nation back on track.** ** Though the results took longer than they should have, Arizonans who have been forgotten by the establishment already delivered a POLITICAL EARTHQUAKE in the GOP primary. We won every single county in Arizona!** ** Now, all eyes are on us. ** ** It's game time.** ** And I need you on my side.** ****_[Will you support our momentum?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188401:6ztZwGV9N:m:1:3317145305:32F8AA55F6F4E12B39538A6376996AB8:r)___**
---
Now, I don't care if you're with the Democrat Party, the Independent Party, the Republican Party, the Pizza Party, or the Pool Party - our policies are going to help every American. **_[We have to stand together and defeat the left so we can save America. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188401:6ztZwGV9N:m:1:3317145305:32F8AA55F6F4E12B39538A6376996AB8:r)_** I hope that you will chip in now to support my campaign for Governor of Arizona.**__**
---
[**SAVE AMERICA: SUPPORT KARI LAKE >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188401:6ztZwGV9N:m:1:3317145305:32F8AA55F6F4E12B39538A6376996AB8:r)
---
Sincerely,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188401:6ztZwGV9N:m:1:3317145305:32F8AA55F6F4E12B39538A6376996AB8:r)
---
**Kari Lake** _Candidate for Arizona Governor_
---
| | |
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188401:6ztZwGV9N:m:1:3317145305:32F8AA55F6F4E12B39538A6376996AB8:r)
---

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188372:J-c5wGVN0:m:1:3253819041:F83D3F2273BB095FDF04AB6307D623C7:r)

This is Gov. Ron DeSantis.

I don't send notes like this one often, but I need you to read this entire message.

The future of America is on the line - and what happens today will decide everything.

Joe Biden & Chuck Schumer just dropped a whopping $60+ MILLION bucks to destroy my friend & GOP candidate, Adam Laxalt, in the MOST important Senate race on the map.

If the Democrats beat us in this must-win race in Nevada, it's all over.

[**That's why I'm humbly asking for your help by midnight tonight.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188372:J-c5wGVN0:m:1:3253819041:F83D3F2273BB095FDF04AB6307D623C7:r)

******** **************** **************** Adam is a former Naval Officer & Iraq War Veteran, and a God-fearing American like us. He is everything the radical Left fears the most. Adam has my full support, and I hope he will have yours too.

But he won't stand a chance if we don't see a rush of grassroots support. The Democrats have all the connections, power & ritzy mega-fundraisers.

**Believe me when I say, this is the single most important thing you can do to help save America.**

We're out of time.

There's no time to think about this.

[**Please stand with us. I'm personally asking.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188372:J-c5wGVN0:m:1:3253819041:F83D3F2273BB095FDF04AB6307D623C7:r)

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Last email I’ll ever send
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhc7jabghnlamb4l0ve9nuolrjs6kpju4u5oonm0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geapr4c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfbc32mjgn5d9hemr33dj5mtgnec9gm1rj9db4mopj2c9l6hom6s9nm8pm6o5mesrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooj1cr1curmaphheipm2ptgmlin49fg)
I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zott5s8sdp1c99a0jkk7jjelp5tcqvrqcv1sflq0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geapr4c9h2bs)

Friend -

This is the first and last email I'll ever send you.

You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. **

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls.

**I 'm also the GOP Nominee in the MUST WIN race in NC-14, a brand-new district that WILL decide who controls Washington. **

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map.

[**That 's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdu4h3rpraenqcg1ku34j9sqslc0sbdhmkar4avo_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geapr4c9h2bs)

The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before...

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - **really, really tough. **

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

Please have my back on this one:

****[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7fe5ejbp25ko05babapra29b8anu855o1vn7350_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geapr4c9h2bs)
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $10**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znsgkqs2lrlv8cmfv87u6to501oh9jej8trupek0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geapr4c9h2bs)

[**CONTRIBUTION OF $20**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z99cd9d0abggm0ok68hu3elpb646s7p9bri2oerg_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geapr4c9h2bs)

[**CONTRIBUTION OF $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zklk9qihselkph8ifgc5nf7f2h031kghi6glre00_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geapr4c9h2bs)

[**CONTRIBUTION OF $100**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpb5nkocgcadrq8vr96qh24ggoa9f3c9suac834o_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geapr4c9h2bs)

Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. So, I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me.

I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud.

Thank you & God bless.

**Pat Harrigan**
GOP Conservative Candidate
North Carolina's 14th District
Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress

Austin, TX 78734

subject: [TERRIBLE NEWS] Closing shop on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
I'm at my wits' end, Peter. Pelosi and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my campaign, **_but Republicans may never win another race this year._** **Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.** **I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.** If Pelosi can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. **I have Trump 's endorsement, I lead the team of Navy SEAL's running for Congress, and I have more battle experience than anyone else.** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188264:JeKDvGVcN:m:1:3331421248:87E91DB9082DFFB3522C87F5C692455E:r) The point is, Peter, I'm the toughest Republican running for office. If I can't beat Pelosi - no one can. So, I'm going to be blunt with you. [**If you chip in just $5 right now**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188264:JeKDvGVcN:m:1:3331421248:87E91DB9082DFFB3522C87F5C692455E:r), I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Pelosi's plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? [**DONATE TODAY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188264:JeKDvGVcN:m:1:3331421248:87E91DB9082DFFB3522C87F5C692455E:r) You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will return the favor in Congress. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke [**DONATE TODAY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188264:JeKDvGVcN:m:1:3331421248:87E91DB9082DFFB3522C87F5C692455E:r)

| | Friend, What is it with the establishment elites HIDING from the people? Joe Biden's been in the basement for months. He pops out - delivers a massively unpopular plan for student loan forgiveness - and goes back to avoiding the public. That peek-a-boo act must be written into the official Democrat playbook because my opponent, Katie Hobbs, is doing the exact same thing! She refuses to debate. She refuses to show her face to the people of Arizona. If she's not making a plea to the radical left for more Soros money to fund her campaign, no one hears from her at all. This unaccountable, ridiculous behavior is so typical of a political establishment that does not value the voice of the people. _[**FIGHT BACK >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zig8c24etlsnrf3b4a9ok29hmcfumol24iii5dlo_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geaor2c5h2bs)_ Now, it should be clear by now... **I'm not hiding.** That’s because**I’M NOT AFRAID.** I speak with the people every day because I believe that WE THE PEOPLE deserve to hear from both sides and get a fair idea of who will stand for you and who won't. _The silence is deafening. _ While conservative leaders like me on the NEW RIGHT are open books... The failing establishment elites are closed doors.
It’s time for us to say OUT WITH THE OLD, and in with the NEW (RIGHT) so we can SAVE AMERICA from these out-of-touch narcissists. **__[Are you with me?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd85amt43351chhjpuv0fth0rrj4qk32a8vapfjo_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geaor2c5h2bs)_ _**

Friend, I know that you get a lot of emails, so I'll be quick.

_**[I'm going to ask for your support. Can I ask you to donate just $3, the same as the cost of a cup of coffee? Every donation adds up in this extremely tight race.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zaap2p5l3h7prjbim3d5nmn1mt4vm8q5ee9fqcn0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geaor4s3h2bs "Johnson2")**_

I hate asking for money, so I wouldn't ask if it weren't important.

But this is why I need your help:

**I 've been identified as the most vulnerable Senate Republican and Nancy Pelosi has listed me as her TOP target. Democrats would love nothing more than to take me down.**

The stakes are extremely clear: if we lose Wisconsin we lose the Senate for another two years.

Everything comes down to this.

_**[So, Friend, what do you say? Can you chip in a donation equal to your morning coffee?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2za6k7u2u63samadvsu0har59d0ai5hkgr54rqg18_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geaor4s3h2bs "Johnson3")**_

If you are not able to contribute at this time, would you mind forwarding this email to a few friends or family members? Your help means more than you know.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

Ron Johnson
---
| |

---

---

As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. **This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.** As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same.

_**[**Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Friend?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsen4ffkgvse0ivt80uq4iha33gfsrjn8emgkrp0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geaor4s3h2bs "Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Friend?")**_

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: My story if you want to know.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
Please read. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0645%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=zU4CVmBz52e2YkGHwucO0Q&sysid=1)
Please read.

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32361%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fjlwzqeUmGcx3xL91J2jDQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend,

I wanted to take a few minutes today to tell you a little bit about myself, my life story, and what’s never going to change.

**__My Upbringing__**
I was raised in Zachary, Louisiana where I was taught the values I live by today by my mother and father. Those same values that I fight for each and every single day to protect. Values like hard work, dedication, and putting God and family first in everything.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32362%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FKPmSmiIt2m0ZY%2byHfECeA&sysid=1)
After high school, I attended Vanderbilt University, graduated, and then went on to receive my law degree at the University of Virginia. I tell you that so you know that I know a little more about law than the average pink-haired woker would like you to believe.

**__So, what’d I do after college?__**
I was elected to five terms as State Treasurer where I managed the state’s $10.6 billion investment portfolios. I also oversaw local and state bond issues and returned millions of dollars in unclaimed property each year. Before I was Treasurer, I served as Secretary of the Department of Revenue, Special Counsel to Governor Roemer, and Secretary of Governor Roemer’s Cabinet.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32362%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FKPmSmiIt2m0ZY%2byHfECeA&sysid=1)
Then, I got my biggest call. **The call to help the people of Louisiana and America.**

**_Time as U.S. Senator of Louisiana_**
I was elected to the U.S. Senate in 2016 after being endorsed by none other than President Donald J. Trump. I serve on the Appropriations, Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs, Budget, Judiciary, and Small Business and Entrepreneurship committees in the U.S. Senate. I serve as the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Energy and Water Development for the Appropriations Committee, the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Federal Courts for the Judiciary Committee, and the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Economic Policy for the Banking Committee.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32362%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FKPmSmiIt2m0ZY%2byHfECeA&sysid=1)
Every day for me is a new challenge, another day to serve the people of Louisiana, and another day to fight for our conservative values. You see, I’m always going to be **100% PRO-LIFE, PRO-GUN****,** and **PRO-FREEDOM**. That’s not going to change regardless of what the Neo-Socialist Left throws at me and you can write that down and take it home to mama.

**I’m going to fight for your rights, your freedoms, and for a better future for our children.**

That won’t change, I’d rather drink weedkiller than let the Socialist Left Agenda poison this country that we know and love so much.

**[So, now that I’ve given you my story in a nutshell, I’m going to humbly ask for your support. I’ve got two Left-of-Lenin opponents running to defeat me because Nancy Pelosi likes me about as much as a cat likes swimming. I need you to rush whatever you’re able below to make sure I have the resources necessary to fight for you and defend our nation.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32363%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GfLhzNyP932em0%2bhX8bNtQ&sysid=1)** | [**DONATE $500**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32364%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y24k4qAuiFYzAci0yOiBZg&sysid=1)
---
[**DONATE $250**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32375%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q7%2beJdlmjD9qBOd3li9AGw&sysid=1)
---
[**DONATE $100**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32376%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VOAf9suhBK4CyOEnZwTSvA&sysid=1)
---
[**DONATE $50**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32377%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JkuIJoS5rqaLmP1fl1G0%2bg&sysid=1)
---
[**DONATE $25**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32378%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uwKBW4yH%2bwxvdNh%2bgobB8w&sysid=1)
---

God Bless,
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32361%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fjlwzqeUmGcx3xL91J2jDQ&sysid=1)

Senator John Kennedy

* * *
_[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32361%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fjlwzqeUmGcx3xL91J2jDQ&sysid=1)
Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. **[Chip in $25 today to ensure that we vote stupid out of office and give our future generations a fighting chance.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32379%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IOkwxLm5cRYW8gpAsGyZwQ&sysid=1)**_
* * *

# Weekly Newsletter
---
| September 4th, 2022 | Issue XXX
---
| |
---
| |
---
| In case you missed it...
---
Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt Joined Long Island Senators & County Legislators to Blast Congestion Pricing Plan
---
---
Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt joined Senators Alexis Weik and Mario Mattera and members of the Suffolk and Nassau County Legislators to blast out-of-touch NYC politicians for pushing forward with their Congestion Pricing tax that could cost motorists and commuters up to $34.50 per day and $82 for commercial vehicles. The elected leaders called for the immediate passage of legislation that would repeal congestion pricing.
---
| [READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kFXE2XafsZ0U66aEBv05eNdFfohsyoXUUG45Cf0I7IdEXDCsCuArS5SuOgOxcPBLhrajmVYMP9q_29XaBty4QDH3nj-G_iUDHemkgC-1QlYOVlVcBjnjEEBONlHfNYGD8zmB8G5a5dxF92az15YF5ykcz58R4bI4PpiLnHwhFCTe2dNksDax2Uhm89GmTX09CZi0Wed04seZBQ_SrMQ5Gwx2_v1hVZTCF27lOoS0pyVAXaDAmGCf0CcIWsBIiriU&c=QU6svb1ATVQqsblXydiY1TRrscFq3TmyxMBjb9BtiBMkxIa8_4Ba9Q==&ch=5VoIHmPDyDqrVOTg60C0v2LDneKesw1d0DfYaHngbI4x9cK7EgCYbg==)
---
Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt, Senator Borrello and Assemblyman Norris Repeat Call On Farm Labor Wage Board to Reject Reduction of OT Threshold
---
---
On Friday, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt and Senator George Borrello stood with Assemblyman Mike Norris and Niagara County Farm Bureau President Jeanette Miller repeating calls on the Farm Labor Wage Board in Albany to reject a reduction of the overtime threshold from the current 60 hours to the proposed 40 hours.
---
| [READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kFXE2XafsZ0U66aEBv05eNdFfohsyoXUUG45Cf0I7IdEXDCsCuArS0P-2jYEiOJJ8ZpViTzAku7FxlFfaDiRLe3STuiRkW3Y6jCU_419aBR35hB50wj66eR69leoXNf7PDi6fLBuLt2lszLe9vWfbJGuY8HPkpfJHsC_-f3VDGSGzxqxJ2OLqeob9yIoBNFRbPaJvOs3bHm5ffeNuBnrXKhdyd55Fp8jIStuKMfpgw9d8LuOnrBxnDJPLmR2V68DlAWSF6Lpuf8=&c=QU6svb1ATVQqsblXydiY1TRrscFq3TmyxMBjb9BtiBMkxIa8_4Ba9Q==&ch=5VoIHmPDyDqrVOTg60C0v2LDneKesw1d0DfYaHngbI4x9cK7EgCYbg==)
---
| A note from Rob:
---
For more than two years, Senate Republicans have been fighting alongside parents and students to end the ridiculous mandates made possible by Governor Hochul's endless COVID-19 Emergency Executive authority.
This gubernatorial power-grab has made New York students an outlier, forced to endure senseless restrictions, while their peers across the country return to a normal post-pandemic environment. More and more New Yorkers are beginning to see the danger of One-Party-Rule governance every day.
This week's announcement is a long overdue victory for parents and students across New York. I am glad the Governor finally heeded my call to drop COVID restrictions in schools. I now call on her to drop ALL the restrictions and end the emergency today. Sign the petition below if you agree. Together, we can Take Back New York.
---

Senator Rob Ortt Endorsed by The Committee for a Strong Economy
---
---
Senator Rob Ortt is proud to be endorsed by the Greater Rochester Chamber of Commerce. We need to get our state economy back on track, and Rob will continue fighting for lower taxes and a better business climate in New York.
---

### Senator Rob Ortt Supports the Niagara County Republican Party

Senator Ortt recently attended the Niagara County Republican Party Chairman's Cup hosted by the Niagara Frontier Golf Course. It was a beautiful day for golf and the largest turnout of any Chairman's Cup to date!
---
| |

| Senator Rob Ortt Supports Wendy Rodriguez for State Senate
---
| Senator Ortt recently met with Wendy Rodriguez and Long Island veterans. Wendy is a mother, a small business owner, and our candidate in Senate District 4. We can't wait to have her in Albany with us next year.

Friend,

I joined the All On the Line Team because this team values equity, equality, and justice for all Americans. The elections in 2016 and the insurrection in 2020 were clear indicators that anti-democratic agendas are being exploited by far-right activists to gain unearned political power and jeopardize our nation’s progress.

Unfortunately, these challenges to democracy continue. In states like Texas, election workers are being forced out by anti-democratic vigilantes -- an effort to weaken our ideals as Americans and disrupt the infrastructure that ensures every American the right to vote.

Friend -- I made my decision. I’m not remaining silent while the virulent anti-democratic movement is happening across the nation. I choose to defend our constitutional values and work with our fellow citizens, like those facing threats in Texas, to protect access to the ballot.

body:
"You don't even get to know why you're not allowed to know because that information has been redacted too..."
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188402:6EQY-GVN2:m:1:3253819041:E69917CAE0EED2870A4294E306C73DDA:r)
**Did you watch Tucker this week, Peter????**
He BLEW THE LID OPEN on the role the FBI had in the unjustified and unwarranted raid on President Trump's home saying:
_"...You don't get to read the affidavit justifying the FBI's indefensible raid on the home of Joe Biden's primary political opponent. In fact, you don't even get to know why you're not allowed to know because that information has been redacted too..."_
This begs the question...
[**\-- Are you concerned about the lack of transparency from Biden 's FBI?
\-- Do you trust Joe Biden's FBI?
\-- Do you think the Trump raid was politically motivated?
\-- Should the FBI should be required to release the UNREDACTED affidavit?
\-- Should Republicans hold an official Congressional investigation into the raid?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188402:6EQY-GVN2:m:1:3253819041:E69917CAE0EED2870A4294E306C73DDA:r)
Take just 20 seconds to give us your opinion by responding to our rapid response survey. It'll only be open until 11:59 PM tonight.
**[TAKE THE RAPID RESPONSE SURVEY >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188402:6EQY-GVN2:m:1:3253819041:E69917CAE0EED2870A4294E306C73DDA:r)**
**Your responses will be a deciding factor on whether Republicans directly investigate the raid against President Trump -- or if they let the case go cold.**
Key leaders in Republican leadership need to know how you feel, not tomorrow, TODAY.
Thank you for sharing your opinion,
House Conservatives

name: Morgan Luttrell
subject: I'm sorry, old sport
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Morgan Luttrell
body:
I don't usually ask this
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9v1qqfvq44sfp2fspdrsmcmjocerof1n5ipl9l8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t5le8ob9d73e4p31p3ksoqrcdjimiq38t9jc1p65dbheer36sj5cpie4t5n63gefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup74phkssqj9ptim5j3co5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhm6oj2c3ie4p30s8iv0)

I don't usually ask this

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfjf3fu006c2jensra819sudndtnblqsptepqvgg_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ge9oj4c3h2bs)
---
I'm sorry if this bothers you today, but if you could lend me just a few seconds of your time, it would mean the world to a combat Veteran like me.

My name is Morgan Luttrell and I'm running for Congress to drive the Democrats out of Texas and keep this great state red for a million different reasons.

_**The most important being this: if the Democrats take Texas, we 'll never win an election again.**_

Democrats and their pals on Wall Street are so rich, they think that people like you and me don't amount to a bucket of spit. They spend all of their time in Washington living like Kings, and raising millions for their campaigns while we're stuck footing the bill.

I spent most of my adult life in combat zones in Iraq and Afghanistan, and I even survived a deadly helicopter crash in 2009. When I joined the Navy, I took an oath to defend America.

I apologize, I won't waste any more of your time- let me just cut to the chase here.

[**I'm humbly asking if you could give just a few bucks to help me keep Texas red?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdq1r0fgnm3720dbp1o26nrp8tsnt4hqhdjrv6mo_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ge9oj4c3h2bs)

[**GIVE $5**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztd6vh96qblg92c6cr82jhp35s0io68tovg9pin8_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ge9oj4c3h2bs)
****** **
[**GIVE $10**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmduok5jekn646mo24tng5rad6om5lljuaac9hno_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ge9oj4c3h2bs)
****** **
[**GIVE $20**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zptulas46ao040rpreefpts6fu0fu1ki4pm9ucn0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ge9oj4c3h2bs)
****** **
[**GIVE ANY AMOUNT**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztitctdk1gd4ir42gfhtlpugr7igdq57b6p9oi4g_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ge9oj4c3h2bs)
****** **
**I****'m not the kind of person who usually asks like this, but if we don't do this now Texas will go blue, and so will all of America.

The Democrats must be defeated, end of story.

Thank you,

\- Morgan**

** ** Paid for by Texans for Morgan Luttrell
---

Magnolia, TX 77353

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Last email I’ll ever send
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjeivtrc8go1ob6ao457j79qu9464nrbtdcg77kg_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geaor4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65shmcjhrcs9jeoomfdj0c5q61pth6ho76p1j61q72djiecpjbcj3cti70pdmcioefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32c5jc5jrepb664qb6phnm2qmash5u)
I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze6p5an1gg9tbbbfas62imkhr51eg516roussv90_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geaor4cph2bs)

Friend -

This is the first and last email I'll ever send you.

You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. **

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls.

**I 'm also the GOP Nominee in the MUST WIN race in NC-14, a brand-new district that WILL decide who controls Washington. **

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map.

[**That 's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zij187sggnfkj9t6mq2rodq9jj64p473l8i0nlog_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geaor4cph2bs)

The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before...

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - **really, really tough. **

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

Please have my back on this one:

****[****](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjdpdcbug0r8q27ungm7ag77a0ju3ff7fpib49ho_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geaor4cph2bs)
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $10**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znaoh4k6u0qbt16jcr7jrp5sv87ob8j66sdtbing_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geaor4cph2bs)

[**CONTRIBUTION OF $20**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmjr38acj3k8eq7s2jkl0drpfetrlc7r1k4aeauo_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geaor4cph2bs)

[**CONTRIBUTION OF $50**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt9qt31haotr7dkc782o8c8qp82tuq25sjtlb8r8_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geaor4cph2bs)

[**CONTRIBUTION OF $100**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zshtes96f1eda40m0qngpj3pjs0htrhh4ebq2dc0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9geaor4cph2bs)

Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. So, I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me.

I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud.

Thank you & God bless.

**Pat Harrigan**
GOP Conservative Candidate
North Carolina's 14th District
Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
---
PO BOX 341027
Austin, TX 78734

Jake Ellzey retired from the U.S. Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Matt Whitaker
subject: We MUST go on the offensive.
body:
| | | Peter, Former President Trump is going on the offensive and appears to be launching a full-scale fight against the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). We here at the America First Policy Institute are joining the fight. I'm sure you already know the backstory: The FBI recently raided former President Trump's home in what could be politically-motivated. This ordeal should paint a clear picture for us: The deep state is real, and we can't afford to sit around playing defense while the FBI raids a former President's home. **_We MUST go on the offensive._** [**And that 's exactly what I plan to do. Will you help me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188411:6ebbKGVNn:m:1:3331421248:37EA178555745677170DD6393366B0B9:r) _Our country is at risk of crumbling into a banana republic run by the most radical leftists in America and an invulnerable deep state. WE HAVE NO CHOICE BUT TO FIGHT BACK!_ When the news broke, our entire team sprung into action to respond. Within 48 hours, we filed more than 50 Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the Biden Administration and find out who knew what and when. But I assure you, the Department of Justice (DOJ) is not going to hand over information easily, and we may have to battle with the DOJ for months or even YEARS to uncover the truth fully. **We CANNOT sustain our efforts without you ... ** **[Will you chip in before it's to help ensure our efforts can continue?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188411:6ebbKGVNn:m:1:3331421248:37EA178555745677170DD6393366B0B9:r)**[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188411:6ebbKGVNn:m:1:3331421248:37EA178555745677170DD6393366B0B9:r) Let me back up. My name is Matt Whitaker... I was appointed acting United States Attorney General under former President Trump. In that role, I protected Law and Order both at home and abroad. Today I am Co-Chair of the Center for Law & Justice at the America First Policy Institute, where we strive to protect and preserve the rule of law in this great Nation. Together, we will fight back against the radical Left and end its unjust weaponization of the FBI. The team at America First Policy Institute is the best in the Nation, and we're ready to make a HUGE difference for our country--ESPECIALLY when it comes to uncovering the truth regarding the FBI raid. [**I hope you 'll consider sending in a donation of $25, $35, or $50 today. ** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188411:6ebbKGVNn:m:1:3331421248:37EA178555745677170DD6393366B0B9:r) Sincerely, Matt Whitaker Co-Chair, Center for Law & Justice America First Policy Institute P.S. We've seen it time and time again. Castro's Cuba. Stalin's Russia. Nazi Germany. Mao's China. Great nations fall to tyranny when governments weaponize law enforcement against patriots and political opponents. [**I 'll fight with every breath to make sure that America doesn't have the same fate. Will you? ** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188411:6ebbKGVNn:m:1:3331421248:37EA178555745677170DD6393366B0B9:r)
---
[**DONATE NOW!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188411:6ebbKGVNn:m:1:3331421248:37EA178555745677170DD6393366B0B9:r)
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188411:6ebbKGVNn:m:1:3331421248:37EA178555745677170DD6393366B0B9:r)

The team at America First Policy Institute is the best in the Nation, and we're ready to make a HUGE difference for our country--ESPECIALLY when it comes to uncovering the truth regarding the FBI raid. Sincerely, Matt Whitaker Co-Chair, Center for Law & Justice America First Policy Institute P.S. We've seen it time and time again. Castro's Cuba. Stalin's Russia. Nazi Germany. Mao's China. Great nations fall to tyranny when governments weaponize law enforcement against patriots and political opponents. | | America First Policy Institute is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization, Tax ID # 85-4202763. name: Great America Update
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6392%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=XmcT%2bOnOYIEpPPEyj8aCZw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c75183%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YM2lL3bySYbpL8ecXn1h1w&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c75184%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Za6rMH9RHyrbjCBDCgwQRw&sysid=1)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c75184%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Za6rMH9RHyrbjCBDCgwQRw&sysid=1)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6392%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=XmcT%2bOnOYIEpPPEyj8aCZw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6392%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=XmcT%2bOnOYIEpPPEyj8aCZw&sysid=1)

name: Michael
subject: pictures of mom and dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
My mom in coveralls, petite as she was, handing tools to my dad is an indelible image I carry with me to this day.

Hello,
My mother worked alongside my dad in Lebanon Farm Shop well into their 70s. They refused assistance from their many children even after they lost their life savings in the Savings and Loan debacle of the 1980s. My mom in coveralls, petite as she was, handing tools to my dad is an indelible image I carry with me to this day.
My dad built a business repairing farm implements. In a way, I think he hoped that I’d stick around and take it over, but that wasn’t to be. I joined the Navy after getting a scholarship and my life as a machinist and welder came to a close.
Dad said very little about his service in the Second World War. He had the burns and shrapnel of his first ship sinking, and would provide some quips about surviving a night amongst the flotsam and death off Guadalcanal, but he didn’t dissuade me from enlisting. My mom had the bravery in saying quite simply, “The healthy bird flees the nest.” She wiped her eyes on her apron as I drove up the hill on my way to ‘boot camp.’ It took me some time to understand why.
You could say my mom and dad embodied rural Iowa values in their unique ways: Family, hard work, sacrifice, education, and honesty. And I think of them every day on the campaign trail, because it’s those values that drove me to run for political office.
**After nearly 4 decades serving in the United States Navy, I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because it’s time politicians in Washington fight for everyday people like my folks.**
The early polls all show this will be a close race, so of course, I’m facing down millions of dollars in Super PAC attacks. I don’t come from some political dynasty, and I’m not taking corporate PAC money. Instead, I’m relying entirely on the donations of generous grassroots donors like you.
**There’s less than 48 hours until our next critical fundraising deadline, and right now we’re still short of our $35,000 goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and win. So I have to ask:**
[**Please, may I count on you to make a donation to my campaign today – before our fundraising deadline? Every dollar you can give today will help me build a campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50206015/365024175/-42398318?refcode=em20220904am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTYzYjUxNy00OTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sxiRZVJa-BeTk8sGjubtyTnIjoF11oLul9NGzAF3gD0=)

name: Ron Johnson
subject: a personal plea
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I have never seen the Left more aggressive and out of control as they are in the last few days and weeks.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo5gaceikqdr776uqtn2njkmrn5e3dhdr9d1mmk0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbon2s5gs5gm2s5k65rb8ophm1q60slm6djmedj1cdi66c33edpjatdjc1gr8db76v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj664ob6ob0eth6cdj76momfc5lclp238h1e8he4933cdh64p72c3gm4oh5u)

|
---
| | | Friend,

I have never seen the Left more aggressive and out of control as they are in the last few days and weeks. Long gone are the days of polite discourse, the days when we could have disagreements without it ending in riots and chaos. Not only is the left posting the personal addresses of SCOTUS members on Twitter, but in Washington DC, activists are giving cash to restaurants to "out" SCOTUS members if they dine in.

I knew when I announced my campaign for re-election that this would be a campaign unlike one I've ever seen before, and it has. The vitriol and slander I've seen so far this year has never been paralleled.

The days of decorum have disappeared, but can and need to return. And that's why I'm running for re-election. Democrats have let major cities become crime ridden, they are behind the rising inflation we are experiencing at the pump and grocery stores, and this is just the beginning of their mayhem.

This is not a landscape that I want our children and grandchildren growing up in. I will always fight for their future, and I hope if you stand with me in that fight you'll stand with me right now in this campaign.

I hate asking for money - it's my least favorite thing to do. But the facts are simple. Democrats across the country are gearing up to make this Wisconsin Senate race the most expensive in history in an attempt to not just defeat me, but defeat our values and beliefs.

No donation is too small. $5 makes a difference. $5 can help us reach that one undecided voter and ensure they get out and vote and keep WI red.

I know our nation's brightest days are ahead of us, but getting there isn't going to be easy. _**[We can win in November if I can count on your support right now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc2jif0jfcdedtokpd7qp9rep4uc6ca4amoa8mog_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie4o71c9h2bs "Johnson1")**_

Please, Friend, our future is counting on our actions today.

Thanks for reading this email. I appreciate you and your family.

Thank you for your support,
Ron

---
| |
* * *
A note from Ron Johnson: America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. **This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.** As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same.

_**[**Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Friend?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl7rr40g2339f5it6l8e2gs20f5rmhnt0fqb75s8_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie4o71c9h2bs "Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Friend?")**_

name: Matt Whitaker
subject: We MUST go on the offensive.
body:
| | | Peter, Former President Trump is going on the offensive and appears to be launching a full-scale fight against the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). We here at the America First Policy Institute are joining the fight. I'm sure you already know the backstory: The FBI recently raided former President Trump's home in what could be politically-motivated. This ordeal should paint a clear picture for us: The deep state is real, and we can't afford to sit around playing defense while the FBI raids a former President's home. **_We MUST go on the offensive._** [**And that 's exactly what I plan to do. Will you help me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188423:6siLhGVN2:m:1:3253819041:8D8A28A7DEF195578FF0124988D2DE44:r) _Our country is at risk of crumbling into a banana republic run by the most radical leftists in America and an invulnerable deep state. WE HAVE NO CHOICE BUT TO FIGHT BACK!_ When the news broke, our entire team sprung into action to respond. Within 48 hours, we filed more than 50 Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the Biden Administration and find out who knew what and when. But I assure you, the Department of Justice (DOJ) is not going to hand over information easily, and we may have to battle with the DOJ for months or even YEARS to uncover the truth fully. **We CANNOT sustain our efforts without you ... ** **[Will you chip in before it's to help ensure our efforts can continue?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188423:6siLhGVN2:m:1:3253819041:8D8A28A7DEF195578FF0124988D2DE44:r)**[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188423:6siLhGVN2:m:1:3253819041:8D8A28A7DEF195578FF0124988D2DE44:r) Let me back up. My name is Matt Whitaker... I was appointed acting United States Attorney General under former President Trump. In that role, I protected Law and Order both at home and abroad. Today I am Co-Chair of the Center for Law & Justice at the America First Policy Institute, where we strive to protect and preserve the rule of law in this great Nation. Together, we will fight back against the radical Left and end its unjust weaponization of the FBI. The team at America First Policy Institute is the best in the Nation, and we're ready to make a HUGE difference for our country--ESPECIALLY when it comes to uncovering the truth regarding the FBI raid. [**I hope you 'll consider sending in a donation of $25, $35, or $50 today. ** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188423:6siLhGVN2:m:1:3253819041:8D8A28A7DEF195578FF0124988D2DE44:r) Sincerely, Matt Whitaker Co-Chair, Center for Law & Justice America First Policy Institute P.S. We've seen it time and time again. Castro's Cuba. Stalin's Russia. Nazi Germany. Mao's China. Great nations fall to tyranny when governments weaponize law enforcement against patriots and political opponents. [**I 'll fight with every breath to make sure that America doesn't have the same fate. Will you? ** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188423:6siLhGVN2:m:1:3253819041:8D8A28A7DEF195578FF0124988D2DE44:r)
---
[**DONATE NOW!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188423:6siLhGVN2:m:1:3253819041:8D8A28A7DEF195578FF0124988D2DE44:r)
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188423:6siLhGVN2:m:1:3253819041:8D8A28A7DEF195578FF0124988D2DE44:r)
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I've fallen behind!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
I don't have good news today... [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0755%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=pRSq%2fsMzHD1qU8slvWgkMg&sysid=1)

|
---
| | |
Friend,

I don't have good news today...

**Recent polling shows my Democrat opponent, Raphael Warnock, leading by 3 points.** For months we've been in a dead heat, but now I'm slightly behind in Georgia's crucial Senate showdown.

This is a significant setback for Republicans everywhere.

I wish that was the only piece of bad news I had for you today, but it's not...

My Democrat opponent is the _leading _fundraiser in the entire country. He's raising record amounts of money in record time. The latest report shows he raised $17 MILLION in the last 3 MONTHS. If I'm going to catch up, I need MAJOR reinforcements, which is why I'm reaching out to you today, Friend. _**[I need you to rush an emergency contribution of ANY AMOUNT to help us close the fundraising gap.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32385%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BSdXnFGUEv0SENfaH7hPLQ&sysid=1 "It’s important that we band together and show
the Democrats that we’re willing to do whatever it takes to pull off a win.")**_

There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. _Georgia is in danger. Our Senate majority is in danger. The future of our country is in danger._

Democrat Super PACs and my opponent have already spent $25 million in false attack ads against me, which is why we've lost ground in the polls. _Unfortunately, we haven't had the money to respond or set the record straight._

This is just the beginning... Democrats are already scheming on how to spend another $25 MILLION. _**[They MUST be STOPPED.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32386%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WDJkF4wTN%2fJeVc7QxcG01w&sysid=1 "It’s important that we band together and show
the Democrats that we’re willing to do whatever it takes to pull off a win.")**_

It's clear that they see me as a threat. The fate of the Senate majority will be determined by the outcome of our race in Georgia. That's why we must fully fund our ads and grassroots efforts to make sure Georgians learn the truth about Raphael Warnock's far-left record.

_**[Friend I need your help now more than ever. If you're able, would you please contribute $10 or more to help us close the fundraising gap? Every penny counts, and your help is CRITICAL.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c32387%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yeHu9iJS2UPVWZwCqjxEVg&sysid=1 "It’s important that we band together and show
the Democrats that we’re willing to do whatever it takes to pull off a
win.")**_

Thank you for your support.

Onward to victory,

Herschel Walker
Republican for U.S. Senate
---
|
---
