name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans are still mad about Biden’s courageous speech! Can you help make sure he knows how much you appreciate it when politicians are brave enough to say hard things that the country needs to hear?
body:
Biden stood strong. He needs us to join him.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter _,_ that speech still has all the political commentators buzzing. **President Joe Biden gave the speech we've all been waiting for this last week, and it’s like people forgot politicians were allowed to be brave and inspiring.** _Biden called out Republicans who call Democrats names as if they don’t even know any polite words, but have been whining nonstop since the moment he referred to MAGA Republicans as "semi-fascist." The poor dears._ **_Baby killer. Communist. Christ Killer. America Hater. Libt*rd. These are just some of the many things I've been called, and not just by random Twitter users, but by elected & appointed GOP officeholders, as well as prominent Republican pundits and writers._ ** The entire GOP culture is based around "owning the libs" at this point, which means basing your existence in politics on hurting your opponents, as opposed to doing anything good or constructive for your constituents, the country or really anyone. And it shows in their behavior. [**Can you join us in donating $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the DNC, to show them this new fighting Democratic Party is what we must have going into November!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75e779a9-7aa0-4d12-9fc7-e0cb753b5b45/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_But like any bully, they crawl up in a ball when you hit back. And last night Biden hit back. He pointed out Trump cult's attacks on democracy, on the rule of law and the threats and intimidation that are second nature to them. And they're not used to this! So today they are lashing out like toddlers on a playground fighting over a swing._**
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: STAND WITH BIDEN & THE DNC!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d093315-88fa-42bb-8a76-711728871b0a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| This is an incredible development, and one of which we should all be proud. I have talked on this list before about how our lack of messaging about our achievements, and about who they really are, hurts us in elections. Well, with some of the younger Democrats like Reps. Ruben Gallego, Eric Swalwell and Katie Porter, Senators like Cory Booker and Brian Schatz and Governors and candidates like Beto O'Rourke, Stacey Abrams, John Fetterman & Gretchen Whitmer leading the way, we are changing the culture of our party. _If I could sum it up, I'd quote the late Patrick Swayze from the film Road House. "Be nice. Until it's time not to be nice."_ **_Sometimes, you need to punch a bully in the nose. And that's what we're now doing. So as a HUGE THANK YOU for Joe Biden's speech last night, I'd like to ask you to join us in donating to the Democratic National Committee (DNC) today. It feels very much like they're ready to roll, and roll over Republicans, in November. _** [**They got our message, let's make sure we reinforce it with financial support so they have the resources to win an overwhelming victory in November! So can you join us in donating $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the DNC, to show them this new fighting Democratic Party is what we must have going into November!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0a787ec-9d67-4a55-a3a9-1d4af91c6ee2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for being a part of this fight for, as Joe Biden puts it, "the soul of our nation." Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | [SUPPORT BIDEN & THE DEMOCRATIC NATIONAL COMMITTEE SO THEY CAN STAND FOR US IN NOVEMBER & BEYOND](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a80552f-32f5-4155-bd7f-9db7ebae0b5c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Kari Lake
subject: The problem is the whole damn system
body:
What is it with the establishment elites HIDING from the people? Joe Biden's been in the basement for months.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztqri7hu7er647ek383mg9tahpbr8gb1bnqbe4h0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8p9lcjg63cj6corb8cdkepi6dd3me5on8crimioe5d37map7dcr66mqjcopge3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooj1cr1c1rmcphlcsqrcdtgmlin48d245p25oh4cdhm4oj4sdgm2pj24no)
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7buja72dbmio4fp8aet0a9us33ivrubia8o85oo_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob1cph2bs)
---
| | Friend, What is it with the establishment elites HIDING from the people? Joe Biden's been in the basement for months. He pops out - delivers a massively unpopular plan for student loan forgiveness - and goes back to avoiding the public. That peek-a-boo act must be written into the official Democrat playbook because my opponent, Katie Hobbs, is doing the exact same thing! She refuses to debate. She refuses to show her face to the people of Arizona. If she's not making a plea to the radical left for more Soros money to fund her campaign, no one hears from her at all. This unaccountable, ridiculous behavior is so typical of a political establishment that does not value the voice of the people. _[**FIGHT BACK >>**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zouh217h4es0eckgk29390078caugig2f13h1vk8_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob1cph2bs)_ Now, it should be clear by now... **I'm not hiding.** That’s because**I’M NOT AFRAID.** I speak with the people every day because I believe that WE THE PEOPLE deserve to hear from both sides and get a fair idea of who will stand for you and who won't. _The silence is deafening. _ While conservative leaders like me on the NEW RIGHT are open books... The failing establishment elites are closed doors.
It’s time for us to say OUT WITH THE OLD, and in with the NEW (RIGHT) so we can SAVE AMERICA from these out-of-touch narcissists. **__[Are you with me?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2slauja4v0s8rrtehu71kbv6282gsbki19m64lo_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob1cph2bs)_ _**
---
[**SUPPORT KARI LAKE NOW >>**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5e53vfpil20lp8go3cju4mrnrgke7mj6otr58kg_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob1cph2bs)
---
I'm telling you right now that I am a strong conservative who can get things done. I’m the transformative leadership we need. _But you don't need to just take my word for it. _ **I'm endorsed by:**
* * * * * * President Donald Trump
* Governor Ron DeSantis
* Rudy Giuliani
* Marjorie Taylor Green
* Sheriff Joe Arpaio
* Richard Grenell
* General Michael Flynn, and more...

---
[**JOIN PRESIDENT TRUMP: SUPPORT KARI LAKE >>**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt3cm5e3mq1qn7coee070m0g87tm1cfaaovf38r8_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob1cph2bs)
---
Together, we’re going to unite to solve the problems America is facing right now. And trust me... there’s a lot to do.
_But I know I can make it happen because I’ve always been able to do anything I set my mind to. And that’s not going to stop now!_
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zirvigi7fs9sn54mektfrqdff76vmebctdf5lmb8_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob1cph2bs)
---
I grew up in Iowa. There’s not a lot to do there, but that’s where I honed my work ethic. I worked hard. I learned to fight. I gained that fighting spirit the old establishment GOP never had — that’s what makes me a part of the NEW RIGHT. I developed that backbone of steel - that “BDE” that President Trump and Governor Ron DeSantis have. And frankly, that we want all of our elected leaders to have. Someone even recently told me “Kari, you’re going to be the DeSantis of the West.” Other than being called “Trump in a Dress — which is my favorite compliment of all — that is the greatest compliment you could pay me. **To me, that means that you know when you elect me, you’re going to get someone who fights for you every single day. ** We are going to be so effective in Arizona.
---
[**SUPPORT KARI LAKE >>**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7gufmsa623iu05svac4hchurpfoch60v5dvafig_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob1cph2bs)
---
**Friend, I promise you this, as the governor of Arizona, I will be the biggest pain in the ass Joe Biden’s ever experienced. ** I will unite with conservatives across the country to protect Arizona from this out-of-control federal government. We will save our states and return the power to WE, THE PEOPLE, where it belongs. **_This is our moment to make it happen. _**
---
Friend, let’s not forget that the race for Governor of Arizona is one of the most important fights in the entire country.** ** It’s our chance to prove to corporate media that we are stronger than the lies. ** ** It’s our chance to prove to the establishment elite that the NEW RIGHT is here to stay.** ** And it’s our chance to SECURE OUR BORDER, defend our small businesses, defeat inflation, end leftist indoctrination and get our nation back on track.** ** Though the results took longer than they should have, Arizonans who have been forgotten by the establishment already delivered a POLITICAL EARTHQUAKE in the GOP primary. name: Read/Act News
subject: They won't leave the Christian cake artist from Colorado alone
body:
Jack Phillips needs your help now ...
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
# [**URGENT: Jack is _STILL_ standing strong. Will you help defend him?**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Dear friend, At this point, most Americans have heard of Jack Phillips-the man they call "the baker from Colorado." But Jack is a cake artist. And all he wants is to create one-of-a-kind custom cakes, consistent with his faith. But for over a decade, activists and Colorado officials have tried to punish him for that. Jack never wanted to spend his days in courtrooms and in the spotlight of the national media. Yet just as God placed Esther where He placed her "for such a time as this" (Esther 4:14), Jack has been forced to defend his right to free speech for _a decade_ in courts from Colorado to the U.S. Supreme Court. Despite his Alliance Defending Freedom victory at the U.S. Supreme Court in 2018-he has continued to be attacked and harassed by activists and government officials. Jack believes that God created men and women to be unique and complementary. This means our sex is a God-given, biological reality, not something we can choose or change. Creating a cake that celebrates any other view of sex would violate his religious beliefs. Yet an activist lawyer asked Jack to do just that. After Jack politely declined to create a custom cake that would celebrate the attorney's "transition" from male to female, Jack was sued _again._ Just three weeks after the Supreme Court ruled for Jack, Colorado officials pursued him again. But after ADF attorneys uncovered new evidence of the State's ongoing hostility again Jack and his faith, Colorado officials dismissed the case. The activist lawyer, however, filed a new lawsuit in civil court-over the same cake request. Last summer, the trial court entered an order punishing Jack for declining to create the gender-transition cake. We immediately appealed to the Colorado Court of Appeals on Jack's behalf. No one should be forced to create or express a message that defies their beliefs and conscience. Governments don't have the authority to compel you to speak messages you don't believe in. That's been a bedrock American principle for centuries, but it's under attack now. **Jack's right to free speech-and yours-are on the line. The trial court wrongfully punished him, so we've appealed Jack's case.**[**Will you step up today**](http://trk.readactnews.)**and give generously to defend free speech and support Jack as he continues to seek victory after more than a decade of fighting by making a gift of $35, $75, $100, or $200? **
---
Jack isn't the only one whose free speech is being threatened
---
Should a government agency or official be able to force a Democratic speechwriter to pen a speech for a Republican politician? Should the Catholic church be able to demand an atheist cake artist to design an Easter-themed cake? Of course not. Jack has a proven track record of serving all people-his case isn't about that. It's about his First Amendment right to refrain from promoting messages he doesn't believe in. We praise God that Jack refused to give up his freedom without a fight. He knows it's not just his own speech on the line-it's yours too. But he's not the only one standing up to Colorado's attempt to coerce speech and punish Christian business owners who choose to live out their faith in the marketplace. Lorie Smith is a Christian web designer who has always enjoyed using her talents to support causes she strongly believes in-from veterans to children with special needs, overseas missions, and animal shelters.
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Her passions also included a desire to shine a spotlight on the beauty of God-ordained marriage. She was excited to expand her business to include designing custom wedding websites for her clients, an opportunity to show how each story reflected the beauty of the Gospel of Jesus Christ. But the same Colorado agency that prosecuted Jack Phillips would use its power to target Lorie as well, if she created wedding websites celebrating only marriage between a man and a woman. Like Jack, Lorie serves all types of people, but she cannot design websites promoting every message that's requested of her. Lorie can't create art that promotes certain political messages, atheism, or casinos. She also can't design anything that is un-American, disrespects someone's faith, or degrades people, including those who identify as LGBT. Colorado argues that it has the power to control what Lorie can say. That it can force her to say things she doesn't believe. But Lorie knows that you don't lose your freedom of speech when you choose to make a living.
---
_"I left the corporate world to start my own design studio precisely because I wanted to be able to design things close to my heart and consistent with my beliefs. But if the government won't let me speak and make a living consistent with those beliefs, it could do the same to you." - Lorie Smith_
---
That's why Lorie, with the help of ADF, has taken her case to the U.S. Supreme Court-standing up for the freedom of all Americans to say what they believe without fear of government punishment. Her case will be argued this fall, and could result in a landmark decision for free speech. **We won't charge Lorie a dime to defend her before the Supreme Court. That's because we count on the generous support of folks like you.**[**Will you rush a gift of $35, $50, $75, $100 or even $200 today to help defend free speech for _all_ Americans?**](http://trk.readactnews.) Lorie shouldn't have to stand alone. She's faced death threats, received unspeakably hateful messages, and her family and clients have been harassed and threatened. All because she simply wants to live out her faith in the workplace. **That's wrong. ** Just as those of faith and conscience are rallying around Jack Phillips, now is the time for those of us who value freedom and liberty to support Lorie. To commit to praying for her case, for the attorneys who will be working on building the arguments they will present to the Supreme Court this fall. And to pray for the justices, that they will protect Lorie's constitutional rights and affirm the right of all to say what they believe without threat of government punishment. [Will you join ADF to help defend Lorie and the freedom of all Americans?](http://trk.readactnews.) Remember-your right to free speech is on the line in this case as well.
---
For freedom, Alliance Defending Freedom
---
P.S. First Colorado came for Jack Phillips' rights-now the State says it can force Christian web designer Lorie Smith to celebrate views of marriage that contradict her faith. Lorie's case will be heard by the U.S. Supreme Court this fall. Will you [stand with them and make a generous gift today](http://trk.readactnews._QyWvPrt61O3_sMn_Q)[](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyNDctMTU3Mjg3NjA4NWYwNDI1YTlkNzM2MTM1YTEyZmU3NWYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWRmbGVnYWwub3JnLzMwMy1jcmVhdGl2ZS9kb25hdGUifQ/jgneCutjJyfLopqSXZN58A)?
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyNDctMTU3Mjg3NjA4NWYwNDI1YTlkNzM2MTM1YTEyZmU3NWYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiOCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LmFkZmxlZ2FsLm9yZy8_c291cmNlY29kZT0xMDAyNDI5OF9yODUwJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWN0aXZlZW5nYWdlbWVudCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsX2FjcXVpc2l0aW9uJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1qYWNrX2xvcmllX2NvbWJvIn0/OaSLC-bTZRGYB0Xf8Kgz5Q)

No one should be forced to create or express a message that defies their beliefs and conscience. Governments don't have the authority to compel you to speak messages you don't believe in. That's been a bedrock American principle for centuries, but it's under attack now. Jack's right to free speech-and yours-are on the line. The trial court wrongfully punished him, so we've appealed Jack's case. give generously to defend free speech and support Jack as he continues to seek victory after more than a decade of fighting by making a gift of $35, $75, $100, or $200? Jack isn't the only one whose free speech is being threatened Should a government agency or official be able to force a Democratic speechwriter to pen a speech for a Republican politician? Should the Catholic church be able to demand an atheist cake artist to design an Easter-themed cake? Of course not. Jack has a proven track record of serving all people-his case isn't about that. It's about his First Amendment right to refrain from promoting messages he doesn't believe in. We praise God that Jack refused to give up his freedom without a fight. He knows it's not just his own speech on the line-it's yours too. But he's not the only one standing up to Colorado's attempt to coerce speech and punish Christian business owners who choose to live out their faith in the marketplace. Lorie Smith is a Christian web designer who has always enjoyed using her talents to support causes she strongly believes in-from veterans to children with special needs, overseas missions, and animal shelters. Her passions also included a desire to shine a spotlight on the beauty of God-ordained marriage. She was excited to expand her business to include designing custom wedding websites for her clients, an opportunity to show how each story reflected the beauty of the Gospel of Jesus Christ. But the same Colorado agency that prosecuted Jack Phillips would use its power to target Lorie as well, if she created wedding websites celebrating only marriage between a man and a woman. Like Jack, Lorie serves all types of people, but she cannot design websites promoting every message that's requested of her. Lorie can't create art that promotes certain political messages, atheism, or casinos. She also can't design anything that is un-American, disrespects someone's faith, or degrades people, including those who identify as LGBT. Colorado argues that it has the power to control what Lorie can say. That it can force her to say things she doesn't believe. But Lorie knows that you don't lose your freedom of speech when you choose to make a living. "I left the corporate world to start my own design studio precisely because I wanted to be able to design things close to my heart and consistent with my beliefs. But if the government won't let me speak and make a living consistent with those beliefs, it could do the same to you." - Lorie Smith That's why Lorie, with the help of ADF, has taken her case to the U.S. Supreme Court-standing up for the freedom of all Americans to say what they believe without fear of government punishment. Her case will be argued this fall, and could result in a landmark decision for free speech. We won't charge Lorie a dime to defend her before the Supreme Court. That's because we count on the generous support of folks like you. Lorie shouldn't have to stand alone. She's faced death threats, received unspeakably hateful messages, and her family and clients have been harassed and threatened. All because she simply wants to live out her faith in the workplace. That's wrong. Just as those of faith and conscience are rallying around Jack Phillips, now is the time for those of us who value freedom and liberty to support Lorie. To commit to praying for her case, for the attorneys who will be working on building the arguments they will present to the Supreme Court this fall. And to pray for the justices, that they will protect Lorie's constitutional rights and affirm the right of all to say what they believe without threat of government punishment. Remember-your right to free speech is on the line in this case as well. For freedom, Alliance Defending Freedom P.S. First Colorado came for Jack Phillips' rights-now the State says it can force Christian web designer Lorie Smith to celebrate views of marriage that contradict her faith. Lorie's case will be heard by the U.S. Supreme Court this fall. Will you ? 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260 All donations are secure, private, and tax-deductible. Member ECFA. PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

FIRST: An early poll showed Michael down 1% to a GOP opponent, and Cook Political Report downgraded Michael’s race toward a toss-up twice. THEN: Mitch McConnell and the National GOP bought $250,000 of TV ads to boost Michael’s opponent, who Mitch calls the “perfect candidate.” NOW:Fox News contributors are saying a “GOP Senate majority may depend on” flipping Colorado in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Michael won his last midterm election by just 1.7%. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Just after 1 a.m.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
They're so desperate to stop me, they're even willing to murder me!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188651:6nlKWGVNP:m:1:3331421248:765BD8A5C9E1DD56C7EE9ED176179326:r "Headline") Peter: They just tried to kill me! This isn't hyperbole. Someone just tried to "SWAT" me by calling 911 at 1 in the morning and say that I'm waving a gun, holding people hostage, etc. Anything to get the SWAT teams deployed to my home and hope that I get killed in the process. Are you ready for the reason? Because I dared stand up against the mutilation of our children under the guise of "transgender rights." Thankfully, the local police Department didn't fall for it and the attack on my life was thwarted. But that shows how desperate the Left is in their efforts to get me out of Congress. They're willing to see me killed to stop me from investigating Hunter Biden and impeaching the Big Guy. **[I WON'T BE INTIMIDATED! But continuing to campaign with a price on my head means I need you to chip in $25, $50, or $100 to help as I must bear the additional costs to ensure the safety of my family and me as I continue my efforts to expose the radical left and their attempts to destroy our nation!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188651:6nlKWGVNP:m:1:3331421248:765BD8A5C9E1DD56C7EE9ED176179326:r "I WON’T BE INTIMIDATED! But continuing to campaign with a
price on my head means I need you to chip in $25, $50, or $100 to help as I must bear the additional costs to ensure the safety of my family and me as
I continue my efforts to expose the radical left and their attempts to destroy our nation!")** Let me tell you, this wasn't just a schoolkid prank. People have died from SWATting. **That 's the whole goal - they hope police will think there is a gunman in that home and will shoot the victim before Law Enforcement realizes it was a hoax.** But that's where we are right now in our country. I shouldn't be surprised. **Assassinating your opponents is the next logical step for a Marxist dictatorship.** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188651:6nlKWGVNP:m:1:3331421248:765BD8A5C9E1DD56C7EE9ED176179326:r "Hunter")We've already seen Biden weaponize the FBI to raid President Trump's home and seize the phone of a Freedom Caucus member. Is murdering your political enemies that far off? That's how desperate Biden and the Left are to get me out of their way. They're trembling in their jackboots worried about what I will uncover in Hunter's laptop, his secret dealings with China, and just how much money went to the Big Guy. **[But the only way we can end Biden's tyranny is to ensure I win this November and am alive long enough to see justice brought against Biden's criminal enterprise. Donate $50, $100, or $250 TODAY and help make that happen!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188651:6nlKWGVNP:m:1:3331421248:765BD8A5C9E1DD56C7EE9ED176179326:r "But the only way we can end Biden’s tyranny is to ensure I win this November and am alive long enough to see justice brought against
Biden’s criminal enterprise. Donate $50, $100, or $250 TODAY and help make that happen!")** Listen, I've been attacked in every way possible. RINOs recruited a candidate against me in the primary. Leftists are pouring millions into my Democrat opponent's war chest, and they even filed a lawsuit to kick me off the ballot. Now add literal murder to the long list of ways they're coming after me, and you realize that you're my only hope for victory in November. Because the only way Biden and the Left are going to stop the attacks, both political and physical, is to show them that America First conservatives like you won't tolerate their thuggery. **This is your "go big or go home" moment.** **[Help me stand up to the Leftist mob out to get me in any way possible with your $100, $500, or $1,000 donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188651:6nlKWGVNP:m:1:3331421248:765BD8A5C9E1DD56C7EE9ED176179326:r "Help me stand up to the Leftist mob out to
get me in any way possible with your $100, $500, or $1,000 donation today.")** Do you believe in what I'm fighting for? Do you believe that taking back control of Congress is paramount to saving America from the Marxist onslaught? Then it's time to go big. **Make no mistake, I 'm enemy number 1 to the RINOs, Leftists, and the Deep State.** Please pray for me. Please pray for my family. Please pray for our safety. Please pray for Donald Trump. Please pray for our country. **[And then help me save America by fighting back against the leftist mobs!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188651:6nlKWGVNP:m:1:3331421248:765BD8A5C9E1DD56C7EE9ED176179326:r "And then help me save America by fighting
back against the leftist mobs!")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Friend,

You and I are bombarded with bad news every day in the media and in our inbox:
* Big tech is silencing pro-liberty voices
* Universities are running amok with radical socialists
* The mainstream media openly lies to the public
* Corporate America has embraced Woke propaganda
* Pelosi and her cronies are passing a radical agenda in Congress

Despite all this: _**Yes, there is hope for the future**_.

_What if I told you the thing that gives me the MOST hope are our college students?_ You’d think I was crazy. Aren’t they all radicals too?

**Wrong. **

A group of college students is fighting for liberty and may be one of our greatest chances of saving our Republic. Here are a few of their recent victories...
* Helped pass Constitutional Carry in Texas, Indiana, and Alabama!
* Helped expand School Choice in Kentucky, Arizona, and Missouri!
* Adding over 250 hardcore pro-liberty legislators to a national coalition across the country!
* SUED dozens of college campuses and restored free speech rights to over 1.5 million college students!

College students are lining up to defend Constitutional principles and grow a coalition of liberty legislators across the country. Here’s how they are doing it.

Allow me to personally introduce Lauren Daugherty. She is the CEO of Young Americans for Liberty (YAL). YAL is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus and in American electoral politics.

**Friend, I told Lauren I would help YAL raise $23,000 online. It will go directly towards YAL’s work to fight for laws that advance liberty, train students to become door knockers before the 2022 elections, and so much more. I am asking for your immediate support now to get 1,000 students mobilized for freedom. **

[_**Donate $10 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74396%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M7Y5I3GxRXe45Gx5Bo7DPQ&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $50 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74398%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6hrbWrASl98nqVBufwhIcg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74399%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qJcWZZr%2b1tlKFjsRnOe%2ftA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $210 to sponsor a student >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74390%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bXbe6zx6YiPlMOSj3EdSpQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $420 to sponsor two students >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74391%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ahaEzq0R8Yr00Om2u%2bEwSA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74392%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6OncxoLo3kzbW%2bvlFPIdFQ&sysid=1)

Here’s how it works.

> **First:** YAL recruits tens of thousands of students across college campuses. These students start and join an active YAL chapter where they fight back against leftist bias on campus.
>
> **Next:** YAL takes the top student leaders and brings them to top notch trainings. There, students are taught how to transform their campus and fight for liberty candidates and causes in the legislature.
>
> **Then:** Thousands of student activists recruited and trained by YAL knock on doors to push liberty legislation, and turn out the vote for liberty-minded candidates running for office.
>
> **Finally:** These liberty legislators pass bills to defend freedom of speech, protect the 2nd Amendment, and expand free markets.

The results speak volumes of this successful formula to make liberty WIN:

YAL’s student activists have helped elect over 250 pro-liberty legislators, repealed 99 unconstitutional free speech codes and regulations, and have started chapters on over 500 college campuses across the country.

All of this hinges on training the next generation of liberty patriots.

Can you join me today to help YAL defend our liberty and train the next generation of liberty activists? Click below to send your urgent support.

[_**Donate $10 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c74396%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M7Y5I3GxRXe45Gx5Bo7DPQ&sysid=1)

Senator Rand Paul

name: Former Navy SEAL Ryan Zinke
subject: [TERRIBLE NEWS] Closing shop on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
This is Ryan Zinke – fmr Navy SEAL & Trump endorsed candidate for the most impactful House seat in the nation.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8v8e22bv0qjs7lqq4lsktknihtkgtiaftr2k4c0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t35e4q74p5ge8pn6srlecq72otlcpg69c3nmmq78oj66oo7cothmpi6eclhm9oefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32c5jc5g7epj66lgb6p9nm2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm6oj2cjhm2oj7c8iv0)

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcsrvkv76bgvugg4s041s56184pje282kbpjpq4g_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob2cth2bs)
---
Friend, this is Ryan Zinke - fmr Navy SEAL & Trump endorsed**** candidate**** for the most impactful House seat in the nation.

I'm coming to you today because I'm down to my last dime.

We are putting everything we have into our campaign, and it's still not enough. The despicable Democrats in office want to erase our freedoms and they just have too much power, too much control over our government, and too many resources for me to stop them alone.

Montana is Trump Country but my new congressional district is a Democrat's dream, tipping the scales in their direction.**** Pelosi meddled in my primary forcing me to spend precious dollars I needed to save. Now, her little minions are trying to get good conservatives that have supported me all along to vote for the libertarian to sink me.

They've got me on the ropes.**** And if they can destroy me, a combat veteran, the former Secretary of the Interior under President Trump, and quite frankly the toughest and most qualified Conservative candidate in the field, _I can guarantee you that no other Republican will stand a chance_
The point is,**** if I'm going to win this race and take back the House, I have to have your support NOW. I need to do a full 180 on the fundraising front to stand a chance. So, I'm going to be blunt with you.****[If you chip in just $5 right now](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdvlsig6s5gbdkj0i1947pjc5n8dprk9kcacqhrg_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob2cth2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now"), I can promise you that we will accomplish the mission and ruin Pelosi's plan to destroy our nation.

Now, as a former Navy SEAL,**** I know that nothing is given. And honestly, asking for your help in this manner is not something I'm accustomed to. But this is quite literally our last hope to save America and I need all the help I can get.

So please, as a humble warrior for the America first movement, will you help me out?
---
| | [RUSH IN $5 FOR THE AMERICA FIRST MOVEMENT](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5vkuge476qvpep4vrpaluo2dta1h70tjspr7qro_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob2cth2bs)
---
| | [RUSH IN $10 FOR THE AMERICA FIRST MOVEMENT](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z96531inrhk42aumk7c096soiacrltv01t5ubof0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob2cth2bs)
---
| | [RUSH IN $50 FOR THE AMERICA FIRST MOVEMENT](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z74unmmc4dsdgh0eeikp8t77p56lvefpdd9k9vt8_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob2cth2bs)
---
| | [RUSH IN $100 FOR THE AMERICA FIRST MOVEMENT](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsf347j9o5sn2nlaq8ipvid3vp4ihnrdn25m6k5o_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob2cth2bs)
---
| | [RUSH IN ANYTHING FOR THE AMERICA FIRST MOVEMENT](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfg5qjj93ojqigm69afvpht8a8fkin0ieuqthcho_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob2cth2bs)
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL, a true believer in the American Dream, and a warrior for President Trump's America First agenda, I will make you proud in Congress.

But I won't make it unless I get your crucial support today.

Thank you and God bless America,

Ryan Zinke

---
|
---
| | Paid for by Zinke for Congress
---

PO BOX 1597
Helena, MT 59624

[Privacy Policy](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrpb5khvhicifue9dh9pd149b11u1q1uadsvurr8_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob2cth2bs)

name: Donald
subject: We’re in deep trouble.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Please don't share this with anyone and delete it IMMEDIATELY!

|

| | | It’s Donald from House Republican Headquarters.

Things aren't looking good here for House Republicans. _**Our lead in the polls has diminished completely.**_

That’s why I sent out this urgent memo to the staff at House Republicans, and I wanted you to be included. **Please don't share this with anyone and delete it IMMEDIATELY after reading!**

---
| | | _****Election Integrity Memo** **_
Our Elections are constantly under attack by the Left and the Liberal media.

Their evil attacks, ranging from getting rid of voter ID laws to expanding voting rights to felons, prove they do not care about the sanctity of elections.

That’s why it's so important that we win by astounding numbers.

With things getting extremely close, **here’s what we need you to know:**

1\. House Republican candidates' leads across the country are SHRINKING.
2\. Biden’s approval ratings are SKYROCKETING.
3\. House Democrats' confidence that they can hold the House is GROWING.

Right now, things lie in the hands of our donors. Because not only are we behind in the polls, but we are behind in fundraising.

In July, House Democrats raked in a whopping $13.5 million, outraising us by millions. And that's not the worst news; they have outraised us every month this year.

We simply can not keep up, and now that we are down in the polls, our hope of winning back the House could be gone forever.

If we don't act now, we risk losing the Majority for good, and Nancy Pelosi will remain in power FOREVER.

**We have activated an exclusive 12x Matching opportunity to DEFEND OUR ELECTIONS.** We need a RAPID Surge to defend our elections and ensure that House Republicans will WIN! **[Chip in now for a 12x match and stand with election integrity.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=59f8f8a3601b4f5f991d4639d6bffec8&_e=jvOIIUcugtG-kVd3Vkel7wSMQuXIwau6au0vkD28Phs-_8JEKj4FXnMrnj8OBNENt2973tvsr1iNnM8J4V-Etq467-A3-0_ByvhkY_zDJKy13_jqdnJECEc6LkGw2JuaAxlZNPUY3UJR1dKEmnMwddGols-oP6jS5PvEukaJfWS56qM6vSiC9uuzwMaHGxY6aUixvChLY5iEZxKjgF_NzIx_yjjYYKtkbCkDa2izV2UxAodoUvwWTKL9an-_FTjTTnOuttkCOnAEcpFDd3qZdz334pNjwwjgA4zHpHZIHZhTPYlSC7nvc-hfwZLRyfqWNk273ZBZ-A-zgCiudpNV19leAD5Ug6CxqHnESbSQ69FXtj1-P4SIsatP3PP_W4mPt08tpjQ5bpFZu5-hoD4v8ZIgUtA-k6vjoND-M-Qs8WK39EyHnAdCl2Jg0bUFb7cu "Chip in now for a 12x match and stand with election integrity.")**

We simply can not keep up, and now that we are down in the polls, our hope of winning back the House could be gone forever. If we don't act now, we risk losing the Majority for good, and Nancy Pelosi will remain in power FOREVER. We have activated an exclusive 12x Matching opportunity to DEFEND OUR ELECTIONS. We need a RAPID Surge to defend our elections and ensure that House Republicans will WIN! "Chip in now for a 12x match and stand with election integrity." name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: The Left wants me Dead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
They're so desperate to stop me, they're even willing to murder me!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188717:Jnvo7GVNn:m:1:3253819041:10E953BEE48685A5D93F5DF66D62A26B:r "Headline") Peter: They just tried to kill me! This isn't hyperbole. Someone just tried to "SWAT" me by calling 911 at 1 in the morning and say that I'm waving a gun, holding people hostage, etc. Anything to get the SWAT teams deployed to my home and hope that I get killed in the process. Are you ready for the reason? Because I dared stand up against the mutilation of our children under the guise of "transgender rights." Thankfully, the local police Department didn't fall for it and the attack on my life was thwarted. But that shows how desperate the Left is in their efforts to get me out of Congress. They're willing to see me killed to stop me from investigating Hunter Biden and impeaching the Big Guy. **[I WON'T BE INTIMIDATED! But continuing to campaign with a price on my head means I need you to chip in $25, $50, or $100 to help as I must bear the additional costs to ensure the safety of my family and me as I continue my efforts to expose the radical left and their attempts to destroy our nation!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188717:Jnvo7GVNn:m:1:3253819041:10E953BEE48685A5D93F5DF66D62A26B:r "I WON’T BE INTIMIDATED! But continuing to
campaign with a price on my head means I need you to chip in $25, $50, or $100 to help as I must bear the additional costs to ensure the safety of my
family and me as I continue my efforts to expose the radical left and their attempts to destroy our nation!")** Let me tell you, this wasn't just a schoolkid prank. People have died from SWATting. **That 's the whole goal - they hope police will think there is a gunman in that home and will shoot the victim before Law Enforcement realizes it was a hoax.** But that's where we are right now in our country. I shouldn't be surprised. **Assassinating your opponents is the next logical step for a Marxist dictatorship.** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188717:Jnvo7GVNn:m:1:3253819041:10E953BEE48685A5D93F5DF66D62A26B:r "Hunter")We've already seen Biden weaponize the FBI to raid President Trump's home and seize the phone of a Freedom Caucus member. Is murdering your political enemies that far off? That's how desperate Biden and the Left are to get me out of their way. They're trembling in their jackboots worried about what I will uncover in Hunter's laptop, his secret dealings with China, and just how much money went to the Big Guy. **[But the only way we can end Biden's tyranny is to ensure I win this November and am alive long enough to see justice brought against Biden's criminal enterprise. Donate $50, $100, or $250 TODAY and help make that happen!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188717:Jnvo7GVNn:m:1:3253819041:10E953BEE48685A5D93F5DF66D62A26B:r "But the only way we can end Biden’s tyranny is to ensure I win this November and am alive long enough to see justice brought against
Biden’s criminal enterprise. Donate $50, $100, or $250 TODAY and help make that happen!")** Listen, I've been attacked in every way possible. RINOs recruited a candidate against me in the primary. Leftists are pouring millions into my Democrat opponent's war chest, and they even filed a lawsuit to kick me off the ballot. Now add literal murder to the long list of ways they're coming after me, and you realize that you're my only hope for victory in November. Because the only way Biden and the Left are going to stop the attacks, both political and physical, is to show them that America First conservatives like you won't tolerate their thuggery. **This is your "go big or go home" moment.** **[Help me stand up to the Leftist mob out to get me in any way possible with your $100, $500, or $1,000 donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188717:Jnvo7GVNn:m:1:3253819041:10E953BEE48685A5D93F5DF66D62A26B:r "Help me stand up to the Leftist mob out to
get me in any way possible with your $100, $500, or $1,000 donation today.")** Do you believe in what I'm fighting for? Do you believe that taking back control of Congress is paramount to saving America from the Marxist onslaught? Then it's time to go big. **Make no mistake, I 'm enemy number 1 to the RINOs, Leftists, and the Deep State.** Please pray for me. Please pray for my family. Please pray for our safety. Please pray for Donald Trump. Please pray for our country. **[And then help me save America by fighting back against the leftist mobs!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188717:Jnvo7GVNn:m:1:3253819041:10E953BEE48685A5D93F5DF66D62A26B:r "And then help me save America by fighting
back against the leftist mobs!")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Peter, the nation at large may know Dr. Anthony Fauci most for his valiant and lifesaving response to the devastating COVID-19 pandemic.

But for decades, he has led the charge as a pivotal figure in the nation's public health.

**Now that Dr. Fauci has announced his retirement after a lifetime of service, I want to thank him personally for all he's done – and I want you to join me.

[That’s why I’m looking for 1,000 signatures on our card thanking Dr. Fauci, but we're missing your name. Before midnight, will you please sign our card to express your appreciation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50214151/365054790/-284309309?code=jtk675-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-covid-priorities%3Fcode%3Djtk675-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmQyZDE5Mi01YTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wfJjMmDe7je6GyMD6IwgMOEcOd5eAcCBxtYH1qnGrfM=&emci=8fe681ce-d32a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=2fd2d192-5a2c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**

These two candidates could use our support today. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50213741/365053464/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ8B_TAN_E_20220904_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTNlMzFmNS01OTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9YlG8d0Dy05xMSCzN-VAgJJzdPSYdpkothI6jyam-Tw=&emci=49b0aeee-592c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=c53e31f5-592c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
To keep putting our government on the side of families, we’re going to need to protect our Democratic House majority this fall — and we’re going to need to elect leaders who are ready to fight tooth and nail for the big, structural change we need. So with both of those goals in mind, **I’ve got two recommendations for candidates you can support today.** **Nikki Budzinski** is our Democratic nominee in Illinois 13th District — one of our best opportunities to flip a seat that’s currently held by a Republican. As a grassroots movement, we supported her in her primary this year because she has a record of delivering results for working people, and now it’s time to make sure she wins in November. **David Segal** is running in Rhode Island’s 2nd District — currently rated a tossup — and his Democratic primary is coming right up on September 13. I’ve worked with him on bold policies to put our government on the side of working people, and I know he’s exactly the type of leader we need more of in Congress. [_**If you’re able to right now, will you split a contribution between Nikki Budzinski, David Segal, and Warren Democrats? Your donation will help protect and expand our House majority, make sure we’ve got strong fighters in office, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50213742/365053465/-951417666?refcode=EMZ8B_TAN_E_20220904_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTNlMzFmNS01OTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9YlG8d0Dy05xMSCzN-VAgJJzdPSYdpkothI6jyam-Tw=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
Here’s a little more background on these two candidates, and why I’m very happy to support them.
Nikki Budzinski has proven her chops as a champion for working people. She led the successful campaign to raise the minimum wage in Illinois, and she’s an experienced labor advocate who fought for better pay and safe working conditions for retail workers and meatpackers with the United Food and Commercial Workers. If we get her across the finish line this November, she’ll fight from the heart to pass a federal $15 minimum wage, make it easier for workers to join a union, and make sure everyone has a fighting chance at making it to the middle class.
As a city councilor and state legislator, David Segal showed that he could bring broad coalitions together to achieve concrete change. He’s taken his advocacy nationwide, and I’ve worked with him on plans to level the economic playing field, support a responsible foreign policy, and build a government that Americans can trust to work for them. He is thoughtful, principled, and ready to hit the ground running in Congress — ready to put power in the hands of working people, where it belongs.
But national Republicans are determined to defeat Nikki Budzinski as they try to claw their way into a House majority. And we still need to help get David through his primary before he can defend this tossup seat.
[_**To help make sure we hold onto the House and elect champions for working people up and down the ballot, can you split a donation between Nikki Budzinski, David Segal, and our re-election campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50213770/365053521/-951417666?refcode=EMZ8B_TAN_E_20220904_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTNlMzFmNS01OTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9YlG8d0Dy05xMSCzN-VAgJJzdPSYdpkothI6jyam-Tw=)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

clean_body: These two candidates could use our support today. | | | To keep putting our government on the side of families, we’re going to need to protect our Democratic House majority this fall — and we’re going to need to elect leaders who are ready to fight tooth and nail for the big, structural change we need. So with both of those goals in mind, I’ve got two recommendations for candidates you can support today. Nikki Budzinski is our Democratic nominee in Illinois 13th District — one of our best opportunities to flip a seat that’s currently held by a Republican. As a grassroots movement, we supported her in her primary this year because she has a record of delivering results for working people, and now it’s time to make sure she wins in November. David Segal is running in Rhode Island’s 2nd District — currently rated a tossup — and his Democratic primary is coming right up on September 13. I’ve worked with him on bold policies to put our government on the side of working people, and I know he’s exactly the type of leader we need more of in Congress. = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Here’s a little more background on these two candidates, and why I’m very happy to support them. Nikki Budzinski has proven her chops as a champion for working people. She led the successful campaign to raise the minimum wage in Illinois, and she’s an experienced labor advocate who fought for better pay and safe working conditions for retail workers and meatpackers with the United Food and Commercial Workers. If we get her across the finish line this November, she’ll fight from the heart to pass a federal $15 minimum wage, make it easier for workers to join a union, and make sure everyone has a fighting chance at making it to the middle class. As a city councilor and state legislator, David Segal showed that he could bring broad coalitions together to achieve concrete change. He’s taken his advocacy nationwide, and I’ve worked with him on plans to level the economic playing field, support a responsible foreign policy, and build a government that Americans can trust to work for them. He is thoughtful, principled, and ready to hit the ground running in Congress — ready to put power in the hands of working people, where it belongs. But national Republicans are determined to defeat Nikki Budzinski as they try to claw their way into a House majority. And we still need to help get David through his primary before he can defend this tossup seat. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

Friend, I'm reaching out about our must-win race for three urgent reasons:
* Election experts everywhere – from _FiveThirtyEight_ to _The Washington Post_ – all confirm that I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Democratic governors on the ballot.

* Republican-aligned groups have dumped over **$10 MILLION** into attack ads to defeat me and flip Nevada red.

* **Now, a brand new poll shows me 2 POINTS BEHIND my Trump-endorsed opponent.**

The stakes of this race could not be higher, friend. The GOP has been relentlessly attempting to restrict voting rights, gut access to affordable health care, and roll back reproductive freedom. Keeping my seat blue is the last line of defense against their dangerous MAGA agenda.
**But right now, we're on track to fall short of our critical $25,000 midnight fundraising goal. If we don't close this gap in time, I'm worried we won't have enough resources to fight back against the GOP's multimillion-dollar war chest and win this race.**

---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1diestlmhk00oicfmamlo2af8lj6rtfbn083nk0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob2c1h2bs)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znpqck409gf4m4kca6hhvsr2ppmlrmicacrlnl6o_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob2c1h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z33khc94vhrq3cbjplfn0c7e6tundou09m944hd8_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob2c1h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z37rtrgliioff38f7im3fugt978iptq6o92r7l88_rp22sh2s8i66or2c9ie6ob2c1h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Your invitation to learn
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z13m96mjka484tn762ihgcqqkoda128g41brnmn0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4oni6dgb6oj7m8orbcrnm2q31dtlc5g78olgmuqm6pbgmuon5clkemqjfcj0e5gneduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9gmdj3fdj0coq61ddksuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66or2cpg60o33cjh2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmfnh152pr0ds4svcehgtpvleonramgmuotbpbpo_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpg60o33cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zunmmqsvicc9bakk3u1m6jrolc0fr5bb6b1mp3i0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpg60o33cjh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z94l3cco2a4o0k5q462cadm8m4cr2eq3jegb10ag_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpg60o33cjh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Matt Whitaker
subject: We CANNOT sustain our efforts without you…
body:
| | | Peter, Former President Trump is going on the offensive and appears to be launching a full-scale fight against the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). We here at the America First Policy Institute are joining the fight. I'm sure you already know the backstory: The FBI recently raided former President Trump's home in what could be politically-motivated. This ordeal should paint a clear picture for us: The deep state is real, and we can't afford to sit around playing defense while the FBI raids a former President's home. **_We MUST go on the offensive._** [**And that 's exactly what I plan to do. Will you help me?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188512:6QBqcGVrN:m:1:3317145305:1754B12EEA1E5F196A989B0623FD352B:r) _Our country is at risk of crumbling into a banana republic run by the most radical leftists in America and an invulnerable deep state. WE HAVE NO CHOICE BUT TO FIGHT BACK!_ When the news broke, our entire team sprung into action to respond. Within 48 hours, we filed more than 50 Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the Biden Administration and find out who knew what and when. But I assure you, the Department of Justice (DOJ) is not going to hand over information easily, and we may have to battle with the DOJ for months or even YEARS to uncover the truth fully. **We CANNOT sustain our efforts without you ... ** **[Will you chip in before it's to help ensure our efforts can continue?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188512:6QBqcGVrN:m:1:3317145305:1754B12EEA1E5F196A989B0623FD352B:r)**[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188512:6QBqcGVrN:m:1:3317145305:1754B12EEA1E5F196A989B0623FD352B:r) Let me back up. My name is Matt Whitaker... I was appointed acting United States Attorney General under former President Trump. In that role, I protected Law and Order both at home and abroad. Today I am Co-Chair of the Center for Law & Justice at the America First Policy Institute, where we strive to protect and preserve the rule of law in this great Nation. Together, we will fight back against the radical Left and end its unjust weaponization of the FBI. The team at America First Policy Institute is the best in the Nation, and we're ready to make a HUGE difference for our country--ESPECIALLY when it comes to uncovering the truth regarding the FBI raid. [**I hope you 'll consider sending in a donation of $25, $35, or $50 today. ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188512:6QBqcGVrN:m:1:3317145305:1754B12EEA1E5F196A989B0623FD352B:r) Sincerely, Matt Whitaker Co-Chair, Center for Law & Justice America First Policy Institute P.S. We've seen it time and time again. Castro's Cuba. Stalin's Russia. Nazi Germany. Mao's China. Great nations fall to tyranny when governments weaponize law enforcement against patriots and political opponents. [**I 'll fight with every breath to make sure that America doesn't have the same fate. Will you? ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188512:6QBqcGVrN:m:1:3317145305:1754B12EEA1E5F196A989B0623FD352B:r)
---
[**DONATE NOW!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188512:6QBqcGVrN:m:1:3317145305:1754B12EEA1E5F196A989B0623FD352B:r)

**[Kids are back in school, and our teachers are hard at work providing them with a world-class education to stay competitive in a rapidly changing world. Investing in our teachers is an investment in our children and our state’s future. Please join Roy Cooper in calling for a bigger raise for our teachers>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50217760/365068130/-1588819629?refcode=ea.95db8b42-622c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.95db8b42-622c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWRiOGI0Mi02MjJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFEyUfQfz45yYmVsvPdkRF40Kjv0U4Y_ritqX2Zg3uc=&emci=3d88d78d-ec2a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=95db8b42-622c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)** Peter — Over the past few weeks, our children have been returning to school, and once again, our teachers are stepping up to provide them with a strong education. Roy’s own mother was a public school teacher, so he knows firsthand the lengths our educators go to give children the best possible start in life. North Carolina has the best teachers in the country, and we’re so grateful for all they do to ensure our students are safe, healthy, and ready to go out into the world. Their work is critical to helping us build a brighter future for our communities and workforce. Roy has prioritized paying teachers what they’re worth, and he was proud to deliver a raise to our teachers this year – but it’s not enough. That’s why we need you with us right now. Let’s celebrate our teachers and everything they do for our state by paying them what they deserve. **[Sign on to support giving our teachers a raise>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50217761/365068131/-1588819629?refcode=ea.95db8b42-622c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.95db8b42-622c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWRiOGI0Mi02MjJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFEyUfQfz45yYmVsvPdkRF40Kjv0U4Y_ritqX2Zg3uc=&emci=3d88d78d-ec2a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=95db8b42-622c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50217762/365068132/-1588819629?refcode=ea.95db8b42-622c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.95db8b42-622c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWRiOGI0Mi02MjJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EFEyUfQfz45yYmVsvPdkRF40Kjv0U4Y_ritqX2Zg3uc=&emci=3d88d78d-ec2a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=95db8b42-622c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)

| Peter,

I hate to bother you on the long weekend, but with the crucial midterm elections rapidly approaching I had to reach out. As you know, former president Donald Trump was in Pennsylvania yesterday to support extremists like Doug Mastriano and Mehmet Oz – and even with our fundraising push ahead of his visit, we’re still $728 short of hitting our must-reach weekly fundraising goal.

It’s never been more clear that national Republicans are focusing their efforts on Pennsylvania. With just 65 days until the midterm elections, we cannot afford to fall behind on any campaign communications or voter outreach.

Hi Peter – it's Jeniece, Emilia’s campaign manager!

With only 65 days left until the election, I wanted to loop you in on our internal campaign strategy for these final two months. _But I’m only sharing this with our top supporters, so please, do not forward this memo._
|
**INTERNAL STRATEGY MEMO**

Three areas of focus in our campaign to send Emilia Sykes to Congress:
1. **Deliver Emilia’s message to every corner of the district.** We need to make sure that every voter in Northeast Ohio understands Emilia’s message of change. To do this we have to invest in a significant number of digital and TV ads over the next few months. [**Chip in to help us broadcast Emilia’s message >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50218324/365070800/-1741633287?refcode=em_fr_2022.09.04_b1_jb_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWE2MjAxOC02MzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tNMJcqbjxi529Byco504ahEovnIELPSBoAsXcwW9KSM=)

2. **Strengthen our on-the-ground field operation.** Knocking on doors and talking directly to Northeast Ohioans is essential to our path to victory. But to reach all of the voters we need to win, we have to expand our field operation by investing in more staff and supplies like yard signs, literature, and clipboards. [**Help us reach additional voters and bolster our ground game >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50218325/365070801/-1741633287?refcode=em_fr_2022.09.04_b1_jb_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWE2MjAxOC02MzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tNMJcqbjxi529Byco504ahEovnIELPSBoAsXcwW9KSM=)

3. **Fight back against Republican attacks.** Kevin McCarthy and the GOP establishment are planning to spend millions of dollars in attack ads aimed at distorting our message and propping up our extremist opponent, Madison Gesiotto Gilbert. [**Pitch in to help our campaign fend off these GOP attacks >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50218326/365070802/-1741633287?refcode=em_fr_2022.09.04_b1_jb_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWE2MjAxOC02MzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tNMJcqbjxi529Byco504ahEovnIELPSBoAsXcwW9KSM=)

---

[**All three of these focus areas are mission-critical to ensuring we come out victorious in this ultra-competitive race. And with so much on the line, we can’t afford to fall short. Peter, will you pitch in a grassroots contribution to guarantee that we can execute the campaign strategy we need to send Emilia to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50218327/365070803/-1741633287?refcode=em_fr_2022.09.04_b1_jb_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWE2MjAxOC02MzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tNMJcqbjxi529Byco504ahEovnIELPSBoAsXcwW9KSM=)

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Celebrating New Mexico’s workers and unions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50219234/365074301/-1976029239?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220904labor_gv_od90_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDUyNGU5MS02NDJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9zdPQj3Fvcu2MuBWFcPkP9G9RyxxznQgoMLHN0NbEE=)

Team, Tomorrow is Labor Day, a federal holiday established to honor the many contributions of workers and labor unions across the country. While so many of us enjoy this day by barbecuing and spending time outdoors with friends and family, it’s more important than ever to honor workers by continuing the fight to ensure fair wages, paid sick leave, affordable healthcare, and a fair economy in which anyone who works hard can have a dignified quality of life. Our labor leaders have raised the standards for workers over many generations. They organized, strategized, and demanded change. That fight continues today as we fight for a more just economy, which is something I am wholly committed to as NM-02’s next representative in Congress. **#TeamVasquez is the overwhelming choice for New Mexico unions — I’m honored to be endorsed by:** American Federation of State, County, and Municipal Employees, Council 18; New Mexico Federation of Labor, AFL-CIO; American Federation of Teachers New Mexico; Teamsters Local 492; International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers, Local 611; National Education Association - New Mexico; Transport Workers Union of America; International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees, Local 480; Sheet Metal, Air, Rail & Transportation Workers Union, Local 49; United Association of Plumbers and Pipefitters, Local 412; Southwest Regional Council of Carpenters and Carpenters, Local 1319; New Mexico State Council of Machinists and Aerospace Workers; Association of Flight Attendants - CWA. Organized labor built the middle class, and unlike my opponent, I'll always stand with New Mexico's workers. **[If you’re ready for a pro-labor representative who will fight to lift up working families, pitch in $10 or more to support our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50219235/365074302/-1976029239?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220904labor_gv_od90_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDUyNGU5MS02NDJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9zdPQj3Fvcu2MuBWFcPkP9G9RyxxznQgoMLHN0NbEE=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Team, Tomorrow is Labor Day, a federal holiday established to honor the many contributions of workers and labor unions across the country. While so many of us enjoy this day by barbecuing and spending time outdoors with friends and family, it’s more important than ever to honor workers by continuing the fight to ensure fair wages, paid sick leave, affordable healthcare, and a fair economy in which anyone who works hard can have a dignified quality of life. Our labor leaders have raised the standards for workers over many generations. They organized, strategized, and demanded change. That fight continues today as we fight for a more just economy, which is something I am wholly committed to as NM-02’s next representative in Congress. #TeamVasquez is the overwhelming choice for New Mexico unions — I’m honored to be endorsed by: American Federation of State, County, and Municipal Employees, Council 18; New Mexico Federation of Labor, AFL-CIO; American Federation of Teachers New Mexico; Teamsters Local 492; International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers, Local 611; National Education Association - New Mexico; Transport Workers Union of America; International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees, Local 480; Sheet Metal, Air, Rail & Transportation Workers Union, Local 49; United Association of Plumbers and Pipefitters, Local 412; Southwest Regional Council of Carpenters and Carpenters, Local 1319; New Mexico State Council of Machinists and Aerospace Workers; Association of Flight Attendants - CWA. Organized labor built the middle class, and unlike my opponent, I'll always stand with New Mexico's workers. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, and have a happy Labor Day tomorrow! — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

It happens little by little, with people like Donald Trump normalizing the rejection of free and fair election results, partisan extremists rigging districts to shore-up supermajorities in state legislatures, and the corruption of our campaign finance laws – which currently allow corporations who pollute our air, exploit their workers, and hoard societal wealth to buy entire elections. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: BAD news, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz_
body:
Peter:

I have some bad news and need to share it with you immediately.

_Establishment Republicans went silent and refused to defend President Trump against the FBI raiding and ransacking his home._

Some RINOs like Liz Cheney even defended the FBI.

Like in the 2016 election, you and I are standing with Trump against the Deep State, fake news media, and the establishment of both parties.

**That was enough to win in 2016. And I'm confident that if the America First movement remains united in defense of President Trump, you and I can win again.** [_**DEFEND PRESIDENT TRUMP**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60709397:WQIoddhVN:m:1:2365227053:A13169F8918FB2044020BDABA3F094B5:r) We've already caught the FBI once trying to frame President Trump with phony warrants, fake dossiers, and doctored emails.

That peek-a-boo act must be written into the official Democrat playbook because my opponent, Katie Hobbs, is doing the exact same thing! She refuses to debate. She refuses to show her face to the people of Arizona. If she's not making a plea to the radical left for more Soros money to fund her campaign, no one hears from her at all. This unaccountable, ridiculous behavior is so typical of a political establishment that does not value the voice of the people. _[**FIGHT BACK >>**](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2a04e24daf74dc89acdde24ddc7fe45&_e=P-0eXJaDt3y5CdGHGgMfKCv3exoLxIXCrnUsTafGnZgG_kRe9gzXIPA_csDVmwbjeZDeZoSOuPUWR0IacjYsG0Eg1FmvZYzMY5GkLH_HE7GtxM1D7o94o_WXiCRSlVIzG5urfv2r2g14M6hBGrolhQsIUvPMAaZ9Ol89zM6otFglcP02b8Mh2UGHOmKgN_pErIrZS6KPca--oayWCTbCA4dfzdaXrMxA6IQEgFYElbi1BAsRH4BOKz3zQsAC1YMbVvbvTY7Rel0Wdwb8hkweersSvIi0Wp9MKnBsHkfBQ1V_D0LNf3RA44JEvRVFA4kuyokoeAa4ZWzyg3kqPqhCfhE_TlhSbTh1X0lxQxJ6g2jZfto_japOperUZ9p7IgF3A_vPgngv6VILLJAPYvfGQg%3D%3D)_ Now, it should be clear by now... **I'm not hiding.** That's because**I 'M NOT AFRAID.** I speak with the people every day because I believe that WE THE PEOPLE deserve to hear from both sides and get a fair idea of who will stand for you and who won't. _The silence is deafening. _ While conservative leaders like me on the NEW RIGHT are open books... The failing establishment elites are closed doors.
It's time for us to say OUT WITH THE OLD, and in with the NEW (RIGHT) so we can SAVE AMERICA from these out-of-touch narcissists. **__[Are you with me?](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2a04e24daf74dc89acdde24ddc7fe45&_e=P-0eXJaDt3y5CdGHGgMfKCv3exoLxIXCrnUsTafGnZgG_kRe9gzXIPA_csDVmwbjeZDeZoSOuPUWR0IacjYsG0Eg1FmvZYzMY5GkLH_HE7GtxM1D7o94o_WXiCRSlVIzG5urfv2r2g14M6hBGrolhQsIUvPMAaZ9Ol89zM6otFglcP02b8Mh2UGHOmKgN_pErIrZS6KPca--oayWCTbCA4dfzdaXrMxA6IQEgFYElbi1BAsRH4BOKz3zQsAC1YMbo8e_LQSCXFSAwTOh4QBMrOe8EAxIOTulYQ99omEwuv71Hcpc7S02F_EarGvPRfDq0Ne4aM8rKPhi2D7i9ObkxkLMOgDAsYlCddiBHXtje4plrKZdetpHEhJEe5UAlOvY2sYU2wxDfX3Y5EpOdNmeuA%3D%3D)_ _**

I developed that backbone of steel - that "BDE" that President Trump and Governor Ron DeSantis have. And frankly, that we want all of our elected leaders to have. Someone even recently told me "Kari, you're going to be the DeSantis of the West." Other than being called "Trump in a Dress -- which is my favorite compliment of all -- that is the greatest compliment you could pay me. **To me, that means that you know when you elect me, you 're going to get someone who fights for you every single day. ** We are going to be so effective in Arizona.

We will save our states and return the power to WE, THE PEOPLE, where it belongs. **_This is our moment to make it happen. _**

Friend, let's not forget that the race for Governor of Arizona is one of the most important fights in the entire country. ** ** It's our chance to prove to corporate media that we are stronger than the lies. ** ** It's our chance to prove to the establishment elite that the NEW RIGHT is here to stay. ** ** And it's our chance to SECURE OUR BORDER, defend our small businesses, defeat inflation, end leftist indoctrination and get our nation back on track. ** ** Though the results took longer than they should have, Arizonans who have been forgotten by the establishment already delivered a POLITICAL EARTHQUAKE in the GOP primary. We won every single county in Arizona! ** ** Now, all eyes are on us. ** ** It's game time. ** ** And I need you on my side. ** ** **_[Will you support our momentum?](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2a04e24daf74dc89acdde24ddc7fe45&_e=P-0eXJaDt3y5CdGHGgMfKCv3exoLxIXCrnUsTafGnZgG_kRe9gzXIPA_csDVmwbjeZDeZoSOuPUWR0IacjYsG0Eg1FmvZYzMY5GkLH_HE7GtxM1D7o94o_WXiCRSlVIzG5urfv2r2g14M6hBGrolhQsIUvPMAaZ9Ol89zM6otFglcP02b8Mh2UGHOmKgN_pErIrZS6KPca--oayWCTbCA4dfzdaXrMxA6IQEgFYElbi1BAsRH4BOKz3zQsAC1YMbYlvDzuADy0NzzSIqjRB4Rz47MNZjingceiR8w9juU_RePTtC9C2Fr8hQJMuRQEzU580zTBMsiglsAxUIVlBiZAtzuMdc41S20j8PrLP-JbIu7dLp4xQde3roN_Cr_gjX9fnro7LsNEv2UCjkwKFvfw%3D%3D)___**
