clean_body: | | | | | Friend, What is it with the establishment elites HIDING from the people? Joe Biden's been in the basement for months. He pops out - delivers a massively unpopular plan for student loan forgiveness - and goes back to avoiding the public. That peek-a-boo act must be written into the official Democrat playbook because my opponent, Katie Hobbs, is doing the exact same thing! She refuses to debate. She refuses to show her face to the people of Arizona. If she's not making a plea to the radical left for more Soros money to fund her campaign, no one hears from her at all. This unaccountable, ridiculous behavior is so typical of a political establishment that does not value the voice of the people. Now, it should be clear by now... I'm not hiding. That's becauseI 'M NOT AFRAID. I speak with the people every day because I believe that WE THE PEOPLE deserve to hear from both sides and get a fair idea of who will stand for you and who won't. The silence is deafening. While conservative leaders like me on the NEW RIGHT are open books... The failing establishment elites are closed doors. It's time for us to say OUT WITH THE OLD, and in with the NEW (RIGHT) so we can SAVE AMERICA from these out-of-touch narcissists. I'm telling you right now that I am a strong conservative who can get things done. I'm the transformative leadership we need. But you don't need to just take my word for it. I'm endorsed by: President Donald Trump Governor Ron DeSantis Rudy Giuliani Marjorie Taylor Green Sheriff Joe Arpaio Richard Grenell General Michael Flynn, and more... Together, we're going to unite to solve the problems America is facing right now. And trust me... there's a lot to do. But I know I can make it happen because I 've always been able to do anything I set my mind to. And that's not going to stop now! I grew up in Iowa. There's not a lot to do there, but that's where I honed my work ethic. I worked hard. I learned to fight. I gained that fighting spirit the old establishment GOP never had -- that's what makes me a part of the NEW RIGHT. I developed that backbone of steel - that "BDE" that President Trump and Governor Ron DeSantis have. And frankly, that we want all of our elected leaders to have. Someone even recently told me "Kari, you're going to be the DeSantis of the West." Other than being called "Trump in a Dress -- which is my favorite compliment of all -- that is the greatest compliment you could pay me. To me, that means that you know when you elect me, you 're going to get someone who fights for you every single day. We are going to be so effective in Arizona. Friend, I promise you this, as the governor of Arizona, I will be the biggest pain in the ass Joe Biden 's ever experienced. I will unite with conservatives across the country to protect Arizona from this out-of-control federal government. We will save our states and return the power to WE, THE PEOPLE, where it belongs. This is our moment to make it happen. Friend, let's not forget that the race for Governor of Arizona is one of the most important fights in the entire country. It's our chance to prove to corporate media that we are stronger than the lies. It's our chance to prove to the establishment elite that the NEW RIGHT is here to stay. And it's our chance to SECURE OUR BORDER, defend our small businesses, defeat inflation, end leftist indoctrination and get our nation back on track. Though the results took longer than they should have, Arizonans who have been forgotten by the establishment already delivered a POLITICAL EARTHQUAKE in the GOP primary. We won every single county in Arizona! Now, all eyes are on us. It's game time. And I need you on my side. Now, I don't care if you're with the Democrat Party, the Independent Party, the Republican Party, the Pizza Party, or the Pool Party - our policies are going to help every American. I hope that you will chip in now to support my campaign for Governor of Arizona. Sincerely, Kari Lake Candidate for Arizona Governor | | | | | Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: The First Amendment is dead
body:
| | | Peter, What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders? I'll tell you. **We 'd live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea.** One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with - all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney's incompetency. We're fighting back with a massive new lawsuit - but we need your help urgently. [**Which is why I 'm asking you for an emergency, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today as we prepare to wade into a legal war to defend the freedom of speech. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188755:JYmnJGVN3:m:1:3253819041:980BBC0818EEE5677CB18AD150DF3BF3:r) You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother's murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao's right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. _**However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao.**_ Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao's motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion - she's now a U.S. Attorney! **That 's why we're stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao's freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress.** But we can't win without you. [**Will you join this critical fight today with a gift of $35 or more right now?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188755:JYmnJGVN3:m:1:3253819041:980BBC0818EEE5677CB18AD150DF3BF3:r) Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That's the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. **If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead.** Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we're going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. [**So please, make an urgent donation of $35 or more and help us stop the abuse of power being perpetrated by these leftists.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188755:JYmnJGVN3:m:1:3253819041:980BBC0818EEE5677CB18AD150DF3BF3:r) Please don't hesitate - the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Joao DePina was threatened with a DECADE behind bars just for standing up to a public official. You and I cannot allow bureaucrats and politicians to use their power to imprison political opponents. [**Help us win our lawsuit with a donation of $35 or more right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188755:JYmnJGVN3:m:1:3253819041:980BBC0818EEE5677CB18AD150DF3BF3:r)
---
| | [**Donate Now
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188755:JYmnJGVN3:m:1:3253819041:980BBC0818EEE5677CB18AD150DF3BF3:r)

Peter,
As your Secretary of State, I have worked to make Colorado a better, more fair, and just place. That is why I have worked to make it easier to start a business in Colorado. Now, thanks to the work we have been doing in the State Capital, it only costs $1 to start a business.
I believe that everyone deserves a fair shot at the American Dream, and that means that it should be accessible to start businesses, participate in our democracy, and have your voice heard.
I want to win this race to remain your Secretary of State because I am committed to continuing this important work. Please join me by chipping in to my re-election campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2209-q3-jg?refcode=220904-email]
Thank you for all you do,
Jena
----- Original Message -----
As your Secretary of State, Jena has done so much to protect voting rights and ensure that starting a business in Colorado is easy.
Thanks to Jena’s work in state government, it now costs only $1 to open a new business in the state of Colorado.
Small businesses are the backbone of Colorado. Jena knows that it should be easy for Coloradans to follow their dreams and contribute to the vibrant fabric of Colorado living.
Jena needs your help to win re-election this year so she can keep up the work she has been doing! Will you show your support by chipping into her campaign now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2209-q3-jg?refcode=220904-email]
When you join Jena in the fight for re-election, you are a part of a movement for a better future in Colorado. One where our economy is thriving, our citizens are engaged, and our democracy is strong.
Take a moment and rush in a donation to keep Jena at the helm and keep improving Colorado for EVERYONE. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2209-q3-jg?refcode=220904-email]
Gratefully,
Jena for Colorado
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Flipping the Senate comes down to NV
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
This will come down to the wire
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9pcpe13oghpc7pdnkld9tt8m08lbqt3hc6alhv0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpg6eoj5chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4dr36kqb9obks2r39ojmmhhr4dj468rr4ppkmmrj6sb3cgon1c9i61h30t3heurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooj1cr66ur6ephksiqr1ptgmlin49fg)
This will come down to the wire
| |
---
| | | |
---
|
Friend,

_" The match-up against Republican Adam Laxalt is seen as a two-point race at best--and one that could decide if the Democrats hold their narrow majority in the Senate." -Time Magazine_

Nevada's Senate election is one of the most competitive in the country.

Polls are neck and neck.

Democrats are flooding the state with millions of dollars.

Republican Adam Laxalt is being outraised.

If we want to flip the Senate and take back the majority, we HAVE to flip this seat. Losing this seat means losing our chances of a Republican majority.

**_[That's why I endorsed staunch conservative Adam Laxalt, and it's why I'm asking you to rush your immediate support to his campaign.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zruobafal5p5tafgnqasl39ehco2q19itd8autk8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpg6eoj5chh2bs "That’s why I endorsed staunch conservative Adam Laxalt, and it’s why I’m asking you to rush your immediate support to his campaign.")_**

As Nevada's 33rd Attorney General, Adam fought tirelessly to protect vulnerable citizens and keep communities safe.

During his tenure, Adam led efforts to protect Nevada's seniors from financial fraud and launched Nevada's first-ever Law Enforcement Summit - bringing over 15 counties together to determine how local law enforcement can better help their communities.

His list of accomplishments is impressive:

✔️Combated the opioid crisis
✔️Created the Office of Military Legal Assistance - giving our veterans the legal care they deserve
✔️Built Nevada's first Federalism Unit - to push back against federal government overreach

Adam Laxalt's record speaks for itself. He has the effective conservative leader Nevada needs in the Senate.

---
| | [Support Adam Laxalt](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc8l6l3af4cnoenscgk76orl2gmg2mtkospeodc8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpg6eoj5chh2bs)
---

But electing Adam and flipping this seat will come down to every last vote. That's why your support is so important. **_[I'm humbly asking you to help Adam Laxalt win this important Senate race by donating any amount to his campaign today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8c0b19ju5hpvtl1kn77os60cb0m6coh24s0mhmg_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpg6eoj5chh2bs "I’m humbly asking you to help Adam Laxalt win this important Senate race by donating any amount to his campaign today.")_**

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

My very best,
Nikki Haley

---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4grsqk0pde62i4hd184uhu5t6mjt62a77nn1tcg_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpg6eoj5chh2bs "Nikki Haley Image")
---
_**EXCLUSIVE MESSAGE FROM NIKKI HALEY:**_

I'm focused on helping Republicans win the next election and I want YOU to play an important part. This is a great opportunity to support political leaders who believe America is inherently good, and who understand that the Democrats' far-left policies undermine our freedoms and American values.

Please help me fight back against the Democrats and their radical agenda. We can only defeat them if we stand united.

**[Will you join my team today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp7hc2en6vp0aqd3bf1oit0uag1boeds7d5nv3i0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpg6eoj5chh2bs "Will you join my team today?")**

The good news is that we launched a TV ad to fight back against GOP attacks and reach millions of Georgians with our people-powered message. **But if we fall short of our critical midnight goal, our ad could go dark, and we could end up ceding the airwaves to the GOP.**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I've fallen behind!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| |
---
| | |
Peter,

I don't have good news today...

**Recent polling shows my Democrat opponent, Raphael Warnock, leading by 3 points.** For months we've been in a dead heat, but now I'm slightly behind in Georgia's crucial Senate showdown.

This is a significant setback for Republicans everywhere.

I wish that was the only piece of bad news I had for you today, but it's not...

My Democrat opponent is the _leading _fundraiser in the entire country. He's raising record amounts of money in record time. The latest report shows he raised $17 MILLION in the last 3 MONTHS. If I'm going to catch up, I need MAJOR reinforcements, which is why I'm reaching out to you today, Peter. _**[I need you to rush an emergency contribution of ANY AMOUNT to help us close the fundraising gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61186294:JexfPGVNE:m:1:3345639852:2DA00D85B23FD61D6645D649AD56B6A3:r "It’s important that we band
together and show the Democrats that we’re willing to do whatever it takes to pull off a win.")**_

There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. _Georgia is in danger. Our Senate majority is in danger. The future of our country is in danger._

Democrat Super PACs and my opponent have already spent $25 million in false attack ads against me, which is why we've lost ground in the polls. _Unfortunately, we haven't had the money to respond or set the record straight._

This is just the beginning... Democrats are already scheming on how to spend another $25 MILLION. _**[They MUST be STOPPED.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61186294:JexfPGVNE:m:1:3345639852:2DA00D85B23FD61D6645D649AD56B6A3:r "It’s
important that we band together and show the Democrats that we’re willing to do whatever it takes to pull off a win.")**_

It's clear that they see me as a threat. The fate of the Senate majority will be determined by the outcome of our race in Georgia. That's why we must fully fund our ads and grassroots efforts to make sure Georgians learn the truth about Raphael Warnock's far-left record.

_**[Peter I need your help now more than ever. If you're able, would you please contribute $25 or more to help us close the fundraising gap? Every penny counts, and your help is CRITICAL.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61186294:JexfPGVNE:m:1:3345639852:2DA00D85B23FD61D6645D649AD56B6A3:r "It’s important that we band together and show the Democrats that we’re willing to do whatever it
takes to pull off a win.")**_

Thank you for your support.

Onward to victory,

Herschel Walker
Republican for U.S. Senate
---
|
---

name: House Republicans
subject: 🚨🚨 KEEP OUR ADS ON AIR🚨🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | Peter, this is one of the darkest emails we've ever had to write, so we'll cut to the chase.

**Due to budget constraints, we 're struggling to keep our ads on air in the most competitive seats in the country. **

Meanwhile, Democrats just increased their TV ad budget to $45.6 million.

**Here 's why this is so concerning:** With Democrats in control of Big Tech and the Fake News Media, TV ads are the only way we can get our America First message out to swing voters. Failing to counter this Democrat smear campaign is simply not an option.

Fortunately, there's still time for us to do something about this, Peter. _**But, it will require you and every conservative supporter stepping up immediately!**_

**[You see, we've secured an Emergency 13X Match from a group of anonymous donors, so we can match this whopping sum from the Democrats and keep our ads on air! name: Mark Kelly
subject: Gabby, my brother, my wingmen, and you
body:
Derek,
When I think about the toughest times in my life, I’m thankful I’ve always had a support system to help me through.
Being raised by two working parents who sometimes struggled to make ends meet wasn’t always easy.
Flying combat missions in Desert Storm wasn’t easy.
Watching Gabby fight so hard in the early days, weeks, and months of her recovery wasn’t easy.
Running for the U.S. Senate and having Donald Trump and National Republicans relentlessly attack me personally — that hasn’t been easy either.
But as a kid, I had my brother Scott.
In combat, I had my wingmen.
With Gabby, we had our whole community offering support.
And in these campaigns, I have you.
I could not do this without you, Derek. You probably didn't wake up this morning thinking you’d make a donation to my campaign, but I really need you if we’re going to defeat our Republican opponent and hold this seat.
Derek, can you split a $25 contribution between my re-election campaign and CommonGood before our next fundraising deadline? Together, we can take on the MAGA right and corporate special interest groups who want to defeat us. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220904_CGVA_Kelly]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220904_CGVA_Kelly&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220904_CGVA_Kelly&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220904_CGVA_Kelly&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220904_CGVA_Kelly&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220904_CGVA_Kelly&amount=250]
Donate ANy [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220904_CGVA_Kelly]
Thank you — seriously — for all you’ve done to support me and this campaign. It means so much.
Mark Kelly
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: The First Amendment is dead
body:
| | | Peter, What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders? I'll tell you. **We 'd live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea.** One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with - all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney's incompetency. We're fighting back with a massive new lawsuit - but we need your help urgently. [**Which is why I 'm asking you for an emergency, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today as we prepare to wade into a legal war to defend the freedom of speech. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188596:60pyMGVqN:m:1:3317145305:76F5CE15797834BE8D2171528032F821:r) You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother's murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao's right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. _**However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao.**_ Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao's motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion - she's now a U.S. Attorney! **That 's why we're stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao's freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress.** But we can't win without you. [**Will you join this critical fight today with a gift of $35 or more right now?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188596:60pyMGVqN:m:1:3317145305:76F5CE15797834BE8D2171528032F821:r) Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That's the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. **If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead.** Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we're going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. [**So please, make an urgent donation of $35 or more and help us stop the abuse of power being perpetrated by these leftists.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188596:60pyMGVqN:m:1:3317145305:76F5CE15797834BE8D2171528032F821:r) Please don't hesitate - the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Joao DePina was threatened with a DECADE behind bars just for standing up to a public official. You and I cannot allow bureaucrats and politicians to use their power to imprison political opponents. [**Help us win our lawsuit with a donation of $35 or more right now.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188596:60pyMGVqN:m:1:3317145305:76F5CE15797834BE8D2171528032F821:r)
---
| | [**Donate Now
**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188596:60pyMGVqN:m:1:3317145305:76F5CE15797834BE8D2171528032F821:r)
---

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Will you endorse the campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter — I’m running for Governor to take on the big fights and continue building a future of opportunity and justice for every Oregonian. I’ve got a track record of fighting for Oregon families — from passing paid sick leave, to expanding background checks on gun sales, to raising the minimum wage, to protecting access to reproductive health care. But it’s not nearly enough. Oregon needs a leader who puts people first, who prioritizes justice and equity, who brings people together, and inspires all of us to reach for a better future. **That’s why I’m asking for your personal endorsement.** [**Will you become an official supporter of my campaign for Governor to move Oregon forward?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50224864/365091029/857154942?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220904_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDU0YTIwMy03MzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIrqJVZosi7dtvIS2hYWI_J8tSDQpcPsvxYv1uOSq1o=&emci=f6e8589d-c62a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=a054a203-732c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=15353729) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50224865/365091030/857154942?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220904_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDU0YTIwMy03MzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIrqJVZosi7dtvIS2hYWI_J8tSDQpcPsvxYv1uOSq1o=&emci=f6e8589d-c62a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=a054a203-732c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=15353729)
---
In the aftermath of the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , abortion rights will now be determined on a state-by-state basis. That means Oregon’s next governor will have to step up and lead to make sure abortion remains accessible in our state.
We need a real champion for reproductive rights now more than ever. Christine Drazan has frequently touted her long-standing support from anti-abortion extremist group Oregon Right to Life. And Betsy Johnson recently got excited about an anti-choice extremist running “Republicans for Betsy.” That’s why I am the only candidate in this race endorsed by Planned Parenthood PAC of Oregon and Pro-Choice Oregon.
And with gun violence taking a huge toll on communities across the country, I’m the only candidate with the courage to stand up to the NRA and fight for common-sense gun laws to keep our communities safer. I’ve been endorsed by Everytown for Gun Safety Action Fund, Giffords PAC, and I’m a Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate. My opponents have both earned an “A” rating from the NRA.
**From reproductive rights to gun violence prevention to taking action on climate, the winner of the Governor’s race will have a lot of power over the future of Oregon. This is a consequential election for everyone, so it will be critical to have your support in this tough race.**
[**If we’re going to win, we need an all-hands-on-deck approach. Will you join me and personally endorse the campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50224866/365091032/857154942?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220904_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDU0YTIwMy03MzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIrqJVZosi7dtvIS2hYWI_J8tSDQpcPsvxYv1uOSq1o=&emci=f6e8589d-c62a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=a054a203-732c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=15353729)
Thank you for having my back. It really makes a difference.
Tina
Tina for Oregon
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242 **[tinafororegon.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50224867/365091033/1133357015?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220904_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDU0YTIwMy03MzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIrqJVZosi7dtvIS2hYWI_J8tSDQpcPsvxYv1uOSq1o=&emci=f6e8589d-c62a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=a054a203-732c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=15353729) | [info@tinafororegon.com](mailto:info@tinafororegon.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50224868/365091034/-1830937231?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220904_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDU0YTIwMy03MzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIrqJVZosi7dtvIS2hYWI_J8tSDQpcPsvxYv1uOSq1o=&emci=f6e8589d-c62a-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=a054a203-732c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=15353729)** | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

clean_body: | Peter — I’m running for Governor to take on the big fights and continue building a future of opportunity and justice for every Oregonian. I’ve got a track record of fighting for Oregon families — from passing paid sick leave, to expanding background checks on gun sales, to raising the minimum wage, to protecting access to reproductive health care. But it’s not nearly enough. Oregon needs a leader who puts people first, who prioritizes justice and equity, who brings people together, and inspires all of us to reach for a better future. That’s why I’m asking for your personal endorsement. | In the aftermath of the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe v. Wade , abortion rights will now be determined on a state-by-state basis. That means Oregon’s next governor will have to step up and lead to make sure abortion remains accessible in our state. We need a real champion for reproductive rights now more than ever. Christine Drazan has frequently touted her long-standing support from anti-abortion extremist group Oregon Right to Life. And Betsy Johnson recently got excited about an anti-choice extremist running “Republicans for Betsy.” That’s why I am the only candidate in this race endorsed by Planned Parenthood PAC of Oregon and Pro-Choice Oregon. And with gun violence taking a huge toll on communities across the country, I’m the only candidate with the courage to stand up to the NRA and fight for common-sense gun laws to keep our communities safer. I’ve been endorsed by Everytown for Gun Safety Action Fund, Giffords PAC, and I’m a Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate. My opponents have both earned an “A” rating from the NRA. From reproductive rights to gun violence prevention to taking action on climate, the winner of the Governor’s race will have a lot of power over the future of Oregon. This is a consequential election for everyone, so it will be critical to have your support in this tough race. Thank you for having my back. It really makes a difference. Tina Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

name: DEFEAT KEN PAXTON
subject: Attacking human rights is the name of Paxton’s game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rochelle Garza for Texas
body:
This is about partisan politics — nothing more.
| Folks — Criminally-indicted Ken Paxton’s FAVORITE pastime is abusing the power of his office to deny Texans their human rights (and if he can use our state’s resources to sue the federal government, even better).
* Paxton sued to block a federal government order requiring patients to be provided with abortion care in the case of medical emergencies. A federal judge recently upheld Paxton’s suit, and pregnant people across the ENTIRE COUNTRY are going to die because of it.
* Paxton sued to _allow_ school meal programs to discriminate on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity, which means children will go hungry for being who they are.
* Paxton also issued an official opinion declaring gender-affirming care for minors “child abuse” — now, parents who support their trans kids are under threat of investigation.

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd20d5206f544d93a78f4a8624560d99&_e=wOzgUSaFVeMCQeTw139wPjh5iJOmQt8QT3RORAllziRgPzi5OVbYB469YsfRZ5UG-GJlubH02Ep3QdlIaAKi91hzwgOz8MHEXaqRtmjpFpYEKFt5joZeBa38oAq6qYpN8vUpvQrLW0kmGhFu8gAehwdbS2ih9bS9fWMebRWEb4Mdblwgg8OjEEoekqZpv2s4YuLBVZ1K2Z7Qd8JTLz4E3AlstF2o-ipfZySA2cDD89RYget0v2mAJKPz_58_yEzeYr0nqHplbk6ZxsxhA0maBz_RS8tNhyXL79OAreHJP5klJ_zWoexCDeKzv45cvEOm5vX42snkt8RYUCYdM_etxsG649UaWD31H8A2wpHonbU_738BIKnvz3_D5pfrdbPEQQmOIi1WRs4ID9j74b6hiQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd20d5206f544d93a78f4a8624560d99&_e=wOzgUSaFVeMCQeTw139wPjh5iJOmQt8QT3RORAllziRgPzi5OVbYB469YsfRZ5UG-GJlubH02Ep3QdlIaAKi91hzwgOz8MHEXaqRtmjpFpYEKFt5joZeBa38oAq6qYpN8vUpvQrLW0kmGhFu8gAehwdbS2ih9bS9fWMebRWEb4Mdblwgg8OjEEoekqZpv2s4YuLBVZ1K2Z7Qd8JTLz4E3AlstF2o-ipfZySA2cDD89RkJEOC3CD5iJhtVbiYGJUAj9unFBkB_m8ENTgesTWhYEqnfaoHEKjoaCOP8eCuWJDMoH_VxejUQf7DZmKESxUvHVaqw1rwJqMb1GXcVzhI-AnJuKmSeBuN8O4Grq5z6NiwVG0_FaVX5q4_vI4MNvjuaKmPJb8mPDllmk9HREl5Eg%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd20d5206f544d93a78f4a8624560d99&_e=wOzgUSaFVeMCQeTw139wPjh5iJOmQt8QT3RORAllziRgPzi5OVbYB469YsfRZ5UG-GJlubH02Ep3QdlIaAKi91hzwgOz8MHEXaqRtmjpFpYEKFt5joZeBa38oAq6qYpN8vUpvQrLW0kmGhFu8gAehwdbS2ih9bS9fWMebRWEb4Mdblwgg8OjEEoekqZpv2s4YuLBVZ1K2Z7Qd8JTLz4E3AlstF2o-ipfZySA2cDD89RNj7MMAM7kqzo8conGqLepd5yfz05cq0Oc4HGhFld46MqzmEcwdotj9L9Y5JTs8zSGdvH_JBkR6YrCJF1rVkAtTHzN6P-D4g9rxy7omio-B5fDNunSu2XVDbmsAvVvwBHb5KsmLsrYL4b7ETjd_chYY9KYmOoNgEp53UvBgOfcNw%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=bd20d5206f544d93a78f4a8624560d99&_t=SgNWWdnTS2h-PCmCET68wp6ByarJ-JfVPNQFch5CQ-zlUNcQB2bB6ADmIs5LJuXdfz1GhNLb-tBN72mhZPKjhhDJL5eNRnD1ZXYPjw2-gT8fAoEus95IjtmIdTBkJpTXuWIF-a-kibCC8rQMAqnE-SAMEs5QJminlZVr-Yv6N70%3D)

name: The Rev
subject: something you should know about me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
**If there's one thing you should know about me, friend, it's that I've never backed down from a tough fight.** I've got more to say, but before I get into it, let me just quickly ask: **[Will you chip in $5 or more today to help me keep fighting for families like yours and mine in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50208195/365032575/-1789705490?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3916-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGZmZWQzMC01MjJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xXTY5-HnQ9kwFUQn70rhES4Fyrc5feqLE28UOlQge2k=)**
I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia, with 11 brothers and sisters. Money might have been short, **but we were always long on love and faith.** With the support of my family and my community, I became the first in my family to graduate from college – and then I went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church.
**Now this kid from Kayton Homes public housing is fighting in the Senate to make sure that everyone has a voice in our government – and a fair shot at the American dream.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50208196/365032576/-1789705490?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3916-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGZmZWQzMC01MjJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xXTY5-HnQ9kwFUQn70rhES4Fyrc5feqLE28UOlQge2k=)
Right now, I'm working to defend our sacred right to vote, expand affordable health care, and bring economic justice to our communities. But we still have a long way to go in these critical fights for justice, and our entire Democratic agenda _hinges_ on our battleground race here in Georgia.
**You see,_FiveThirtyEight_ confirms that Georgia could decide Senate control** – which is why the GOP is flooding this race with _millions_ to defeat me. And now polls show me 1 point behind Donald Trump's handpicked candidate, Herschel Walker (R).
**I've made the important decision to reject corporate PAC money – so the ONLY way I can defend my seat, our Senate majority, and our progress is with your grassroots support. So please, friend, I'm urgently asking:**
**[If you care about building a better, brighter future for all, will you rush $5 or more now to help me win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50208197/365032577/-1789705490?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3916-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGZmZWQzMC01MjJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xXTY5-HnQ9kwFUQn70rhES4Fyrc5feqLE28UOlQge2k=)**

name: Marisa Wood
subject: I’m ready to learn, friend.
body:
Take our quick issues survey and let me know how I can best represent our communities in Congress. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50226019/365095136/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzdjNDBiMi03NDJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9m5vn2Zy4GgU_VT6A7EMrjKgJ4Man5KpCCT6Z_CLkw=)
Friend, We’ve had an incredible summer on the campaign trail so far. It’s been an absolute pleasure meeting people from all across the Central Valley and High Desert and learning how I can best represent our communities in Congress. Last month, I spoke at the Kings County Democrats event in Hanford, CA. It was so great to hear directly from constituents about the issues. [**I wish I could hear from each one of you -- will you take a moment to tell us what’s on your mind by filling out our quick issues survey?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50226020/365095137/-1021995127?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzdjNDBiMi03NDJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9m5vn2Zy4GgU_VT6A7EMrjKgJ4Man5KpCCT6Z_CLkw=&emci=810293ab-742c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=077c40b2-742c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704) | **[Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50226021/365095138/-1021995127?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzdjNDBiMi03NDJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9m5vn2Zy4GgU_VT6A7EMrjKgJ4Man5KpCCT6Z_CLkw=&emci=810293ab-742c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=077c40b2-742c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704)**
---
Feel free to check out some of the highlights from the event below!
* * *
**Meeting people from across CA-20 is the best part of this job. Hearing firsthand from community members gives us insight into what we need to fight for in Congress: sustainable water solutions, affordable healthcare, and combating childhood poverty. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50226022/365095139/-1021995127?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzdjNDBiMi03NDJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9m5vn2Zy4GgU_VT6A7EMrjKgJ4Man5KpCCT6Z_CLkw=&emci=810293ab-742c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=077c40b2-742c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704)
**It was an honor to listen to Senator Melissa Hurtado speak about her experience advocating for our Central Valley community. In Congress, I promise to work side-by-side with local and state officials to support our district. It’s imperative that we work together!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50226023/365095140/-1021995127?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzdjNDBiMi03NDJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9m5vn2Zy4GgU_VT6A7EMrjKgJ4Man5KpCCT6Z_CLkw=&emci=810293ab-742c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=077c40b2-742c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704)
**I have abundant hope in the righteousness of our cause. Together, working side by side with community members, we can bring the Central Valley and High Desert the leadership it deserves. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50226024/365095141/-1021995127?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzdjNDBiMi03NDJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9m5vn2Zy4GgU_VT6A7EMrjKgJ4Man5KpCCT6Z_CLkw=&emci=810293ab-742c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=077c40b2-742c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704)
[**I’ve learned a lot on this journey, but this is just the beginning. I’m ready to bring our collective voices with me to D.C., but first, I want to hear from you about the issues you care about most. So please, take our quick survey and give us your thoughts. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50226025/365095142/-1021995127?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzdjNDBiMi03NDJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9m5vn2Zy4GgU_VT6A7EMrjKgJ4Man5KpCCT6Z_CLkw=&emci=810293ab-742c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=077c40b2-742c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704)
**[Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50226026/365095143/-1021995127?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzdjNDBiMi03NDJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9m5vn2Zy4GgU_VT6A7EMrjKgJ4Man5KpCCT6Z_CLkw=&emci=810293ab-742c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=077c40b2-742c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704)**
---
Thank you for your continued support,
Marisa

clean_body: Take our quick issues survey and let me know how I can best represent our communities in Congress. | = Friend, We’ve had an incredible summer on the campaign trail so far. It’s been an absolute pleasure meeting people from all across the Central Valley and High Desert and learning how I can best represent our communities in Congress. Last month, I spoke at the Kings County Democrats event in Hanford, CA. It was so great to hear directly from constituents about the issues. | Feel free to check out some of the highlights from the event below! Meeting people from across CA-20 is the best part of this job. Hearing firsthand from community members gives us insight into what we need to fight for in Congress: sustainable water solutions, affordable healthcare, and combating childhood poverty. It was an honor to listen to Senator Melissa Hurtado speak about her experience advocating for our Central Valley community. In Congress, I promise to work side-by-side with local and state officials to support our district. It’s imperative that we work together! I have abundant hope in the righteousness of our cause. Together, working side by side with community members, we can bring the Central Valley and High Desert the leadership it deserves. ** Thank you for your continued support, Marisa | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. Consider supporting Marisa's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: Marisa Wood for Congress, PO Box 12103, Bakersfield, CA 93389. name: Scott Gryder
subject: Gryder: Biden Student Loan Move Is a "Tax" on Hardworking Illinoisans
disclaimer_text: paid for by hardworking Illinoisans
body:
| | |
---
| | Scott Gryder, GOP nominee for IL-14, issued a statement on President Biden’s recent executive action on student loans. Disregarding the Constitution and all common sense, Joe Biden announced this week that he plans to cancel up to $20,000 per borrower of federal student loan debt. Democratic Rep. Lauren Underwood, Gryder’s IL-14 challenger, voiced her full support for the move, ignoring the serious economic harm it will cause. Lauren Underwood and Joe Biden are driving our economy into the ground. But with your help, we can change course. [**_Your donation TODAY of $500, $250, $100, or even $50 will play a huge role in the fight for IL-14. It’s time to take power back from the tax-and-spend liberals and vote in common-sense conservatives._**](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/ece42c7afc6d70999c32df07ccef91c9/41753/ff4aeb04bc75bbc9/991c5840c34a71e3c3d6b838967d376c/41753) "Lauren Underwood is going along just to get along. She realizes her tax-and-spend party is in trouble and has reduced herself to ploys and smoke in mirrors. Let’s get real here: Illinois families are struggling to make ends meet during this recession. Families are footing the bill for higher grocery costs, higher gas prices, and now will face an additional $2,000 bill per taxpayer to bail out student borrowers. What should be addressed are state and federal mandates that are raising the cost of higher education, rather than a bailout paid for by hardworking Illinoisans. It's a tax on those who paid their loans or work a trade, and a bailout for a select few." **For more information, reach out to Scott at: campaign@scottgryder.com** ________________________________________________________________________ More about Scott Gryder: Scott has a long history of leadership for the community he serves. Elected three times to the Kendall County Board, Scott currently serves as its Chairman. By being a common-sense, pragmatic conservative, Scott has worked to keep taxes low and supported responsible spending policies on the County Board. He will take the same approach to Congress. Scott grew up in Plano and has called Kendall County home for most of his life. A graduate of the University of Illinois with a degree in business administration, Scott successfully pursued his law degree at DePaul. He is an active member of the Federalist Society and is licensed to practice law in Illinois and the U.S. Northern District of Illinois. Scott and his wife live in Oswego with their daughter. Outside of politics, he is active with the Oswegoland Park Foundation Board, is a PrairieFest Sponsor, and serves on the Fox Valley Family YMCA Board. To learn more about Scott Gryder, please visit [www.scottgryder.com](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/ece42c7afc6d70999c32df07ccef91c9/41753/ff4aeb04bc75bbc9/04699553c5c468a5c3d6b838967d376c/41753) where you can sign up for news from the trail. Follow Scott on Facebook @GryderforCongress or on Twitter @Gryder4Congress. Illinois’ 14th Congressional District encompasses all or part of seven counties, including Bureau, DeKalb, Kane, Kendall, LaSalle, Will, and Putnam.

We’ll be blunt: Labor Day weekend is historically a slow time for fundraising, but we can’t let up and risk losing any momentum in this must-win race that is poised to be one of the most expensive governor’s races in the country. Right now, we’re tracking $11,218 short of our weekly budget goal, and we need to close the gap before tomorrow to help fight back against the special interest attacks. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Whitmer | | Since taking office, Governor Whitmer has remained focused on putting Michigan first and getting things done that will make a difference in people’s lives right now. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I couldn’t do this without you.
#

Friends —
I know that we sent a lot of emails leading up to our August fundraising deadline — and then more after it when we missed our goal. So, I just wanted to send a quick thank you before we get the ball rolling in September.
In difficult moments, Gabby has always reminded me to summon hope. To keep going, even when it seems darkest. And with a team like this behind me, I know we’ll defend this seat and hold the Senate.
We received tens of thousands of donations ahead of our deadline, which speaks volumes about the depth of support for this people-powered campaign. It all adds up to help us fight back against the attack ads running right now, and that’s how we win.
It’s no secret this is going to be an expensive campaign, and my decision to not accept corporate PAC money makes fundraising a little more challenging. But it was the right decision and all of you have made an incredible impact.
I am very proud of that fact, and you should be too. Gabby and I hope you’re able to enjoy some time with family and friends this weekend.
Thanks again,
Mark
* * *

**Every month we aim to get a number of people signing up to say they endorse Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign. This month, our goal is 25,000 people. Will you add your name to say you endorse Mark today?**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-endorse-sept22/?source=em220904-1-15&refcode2=3723.6688874.KFPZIS&akid=3723%2E6688874%2EKFPZIS)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=3723%2E6688874%2EKFPZIS).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

| | | I'll be blunt, Friend.

My biggest deadline of the year is here, and if we don't raise enough to meet my Extended August End of Month Goal by midnight, you can say goodbye to Trump's legacy.

Here are the facts:
* Fox News said my race will be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history.
* My opponent outraised me FIVE QUARTERS in a row.
* My opponent's last financial report showed she raised more in just one month than I did in THREE months.
* My opponent got ads up on TV a full MONTH before I was able to get TV ads on air.
* Two polls show her ads are working and we're TIED.

I need you to listen to me, Friend. _If Democrats expand their total control of the Senate, we can kiss Trump 's legacy goodbye!_ **[Please rush in $18 to the most high stakes Senate race before midnight>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbh6vp5mg91k1k8crf484ajq0vacqqqnscophnng_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpi64or2c9h2bs "Please rush in $18 to the most high stakes Senate race before midnight")**

An exclusive look at our opponent Ted Budd’s latest strategy meeting:
#

We are sharing an exclusive look at our opponent Ted Budd’s latest strategy meeting with Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump.
[](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-sep22.KSPoKB&refcode=em220904-1-subs&refcode2=1654.357359._ssYBY&t=1&akid=1654%2E357359%2E_ssYBY)
Ted Budd thinks he can win this race by hiding and just letting super PACs run millions of dollars in attack ads against Cheri and buy him this seat.
In Congress, he’s proven he will be loyal to Republican insiders and their corporate allies, and he’s counting on them to return the favor now with tens of millions of dollars in outside spending.
Cheri’s not going around begging billionaires and corporate PACs for money. She’s counting on people-power instead. That’s why she needs your support:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Baugh?=
subject: This may surprise you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
Scott Baugh is running against Katie Porter in a must-win race for Republicans. |
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=5bfc0e32bb&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Peter, You may be surprised to learn that California was the second state in the nation to establish charter schools. The legislation was introduced by a Democrat!

Today, the Democrat party in California and D.C. looks very different. Controlled by the teachers’ unions, Democrats like Gavin Newsom and Katie Porter seek to stymie charter schools at every turn. They don’t want parents to have a say in their kids’ education so they can indoctrinate the next generation with their woke ideas.

Unlike Katie Porter, I believe parents should have a strong say in what their kids are taught and that students should not be trapped by their zip code! For many low-income students, charter schools create opportunities to improve the quality of their education. In fact, studies show that charter schools have been particularly beneficial to minorities and low-income students in urban areas such as Los Angeles, resulting in more hours of instruction.

The Left’s pandemic closures have also emphasized the need for charter schools. In the wake of the pandemic, three of the top elementary schools and two of the top middle schools in California were charter schools!

That’s why I recently published an op-ed to highlight my work with charter schools. I thought you may be interested in reading it here:
---
| [READ THE OP-ED](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=925b81574a&e=8a657725d1 "READ THE OP-ED")
---
| After you’ve done so, if you agree with my position on this issue, [please consider making a small donation to help me defeat Katie Porter in this November’s election.](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=da03313639&e=8a657725d1) It’s a sure bet that the teacher's unions will be supporting her heavily as they fight to maintain their iron grip on our children’s education.

[Donate here to defend parents’ rights in the classroom and help our kids >>>](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=c4fc9b9f33&e=8a657725d1)

Thank you,
Scott Baugh

clean_body: Scott Baugh is running against Katie Porter in a must-win race for Republicans. | | | | Peter, You may be surprised to learn that California was the second state in the nation to establish charter schools. The legislation was introduced by a Democrat! Today, the Democrat party in California and D.C. looks very different. Controlled by the teachers’ unions, Democrats like Gavin Newsom and Katie Porter seek to stymie charter schools at every turn. They don’t want parents to have a say in their kids’ education so they can indoctrinate the next generation with their woke ideas. Unlike Katie Porter, I believe parents should have a strong say in what their kids are taught and that students should not be trapped by their zip code! For many low-income students, charter schools create opportunities to improve the quality of their education. In fact, studies show that charter schools have been particularly beneficial to minorities and low-income students in urban areas such as Los Angeles, resulting in more hours of instruction. The Left’s pandemic closures have also emphasized the need for charter schools. In the wake of the pandemic, three of the top elementary schools and two of the top middle schools in California were charter schools! That’s why I recently published an op-ed to highlight my work with charter schools. I thought you may be interested in reading it here: | "READ THE OP-ED" | After you’ve done so, if you agree with my position on this issue, It’s a sure bet that the teacher's unions will be supporting her heavily as they fight to maintain their iron grip on our children’s education. Thank you, Scott Baugh | | "Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress. FEC ID# C00798322" | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Scott Baugh for Congress, All rights reserved.

Hello,
If you tune into Tucker Carlson these days, you’ll see a show that might as well have been written and produced by Russian state media. **Fox News showcases the chasm between traditional GOP normative behavior and the fringe-right now headed by Donald J. Trump.**
As the commander of military forces in East Africa, I asked the American Forces Network to replace Fox News during meal hours for troops. Why? Because they were harmful to America's outreach overseas. They put our troops in jeopardy and made my job harder. Today, they have accomplices.
Without Fox News, Trump would have only ever been a bungling celebrity who foolishly and laughably ran for president.
Real-time reckoning of lies needs real-time litigation. There is such a thing as gross distortions of fact and purveyors of such must pay a debilitating price. **My answer to Fox when I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy? I pulled the plug.**
If I defeat Chuck Grassely and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever elected to the United States Senate. And I think it’s about time we had more people in leadership who understand the true costs of war and media manipulation of facts, commonly called disinformation.
**The polls show we can win.** The pundits say we must win. And with your help today, we can fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.
**We need to raise another $35,000 before midnight tomorrow to keep our new TV ads up, but right now, we’re still falling dangerously short. If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, I need grassroots donors like you to give now:**

subject: I'm sorry, old sport

I don't usually ask this

| [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b8bb491fec19491fbb8c66249f7e0118&_e=QKxEbsPMZByhE-ueWqC-cbQHnL7Xf1W2NT5Lhxn8Cv7OjDbY2bMJInZJq2R91Jqd2OIsx7G2VZbkXB3NVzZNrFCSxzEz8SUkHKjZR1qcU7xM5y_Q1VYL0qlcc6OTLnglOmnMCdAilx3hq-r50XPzwP7movo5e8SvvCN_J1s5MH0lF9oy1BqZPQTqDKgHV1vDbgEk7BfdD2y8hn32SffEAxgaz-HW8yI-S-MMDdUlFurualcP1rp7ZucfKFxD6EJtWl3misxX3ackBD0SRFeOkoMzFTKaAPmFomePzIeBisgXgXiI0lo6xmbpmcWUUDDeIeS_-D7QuUCNImwA2VJlMW6rrhrTeottOuzW9ztamr-no0GQFoYT6S5xmfQszuL9Pod6bNa7D0jaHQcUcz7w05lYXUTm8Av_5vz7A-IC3a7kiGipqPT2BcuwE4uQfUNI)

I'm sorry if this bothers you today, but if you could lend me just a few seconds of your time, it would mean the world to a combat Veteran like me.

My name is Morgan Luttrell and I'm running for Congress to drive the Democrats out of Texas and keep this great state red for a million different reasons.

_**The most important being this: if the Democrats take Texas, we 'll never win an election again.**_

Democrats and their pals on Wall Street are so rich, they think that people like you and me don't amount to a bucket of spit. They spend all of their time in Washington living like Kings, and raising millions for their campaigns while we're stuck footing the bill.

I spent most of my adult life in combat zones in Iraq and Afghanistan, and I even survived a deadly helicopter crash in 2009. When I joined the Navy, I took an oath to defend America.

I apologize, I won't waste any more of your time- let me just cut to the chase here.

[**I'm humbly asking if you could give just a few bucks to help me keep Texas red?**](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b8bb491fec19491fbb8c66249f7e0118&_e=QKxEbsPMZByhE-ueWqC-cbQHnL7Xf1W2NT5Lhxn8Cv7OjDbY2bMJInZJq2R91Jqd2OIsx7G2VZbkXB3NVzZNrFCSxzEz8SUkHKjZR1qcU7xM5y_Q1VYL0qlcc6OTLnglOmnMCdAilx3hq-r50XPzwP7movo5e8SvvCN_J1s5MH0lF9oy1BqZPQTqDKgHV1vDbgEk7BfdD2y8hn32SffEAxgaz-HW8yI-S-MMDdUlFurualcP1rp7ZucfKFxD6EJtWl3misxX3ackBD0SRFeOkoMzFTKaAPmFomePzIeBisgJ0eTMtTz_m40tbbSjtwqdA58i-b9orrLi0paqOoR5V67ICTv8CMh9Izf4_53jCuev5YDrCIlNO39qBMMawoJWP7v6rexXiJfllbTTGQ7YOnf3pCwiWOKVGaYPZGClOvVQXyZYJ1kOnDdn8UBtRqCB)

subject: Your vote, your voice
body:

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50233564/365101992/-1072566757?code=jtk681-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjM2MTgxNi03YzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xhOoJD1iRKoPOBaNEHm6DtB8JB00j7joWQvSiTsDHIc=&emci=45cb33cc-5429-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=df361816-7c2c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=21278485)

Election Day is almost two months away,** ** right around the corner, so we're reaching out today with an important question from Chrissy: **Do you plan to vote, Derek?**
Here's the thing: In 2021 alone, Republicans pushed more than 440 voter suppression bills in 49 states across the country, e _ven right here in Pennsylvania._
**While the GOP has continued its national assault on voting rights, Chrissy has helped pass the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act, which included her effort to provide expanded early-voting hours.**

The daughter of a Holocaust survivor and a third-generation military veteran, Chrissy is a voting rights champion who believes that your vote is your voice. And with Election Day two months away, she needs to know where you stand on this critical issue. **So please, Derek, let us know now:**
| | **Do you plan to vote?**

name: Val Demings
subject: I'm never one to tire from a challenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
But the road ahead is not easy
| | |
---
Friend – it wasn’t exactly easy growing up as a Black girl from a poor family in the South, the youngest of seven children and in segregated schools.
It wasn’t easy for my parents – Dad a janitor, Mom a maid – but they did whatever they could to support us. While none of it was particularly easy, I’m very proud to have been the first in my family to graduate from college.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50213654/365053203/-1315874399?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4246-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODgwZjBkZi01OTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_HoVCKhHrfL8v6bOsTvYO0xCimn11jaRvJrnNkwPAEk=)
Much like my past, nothing about the road ahead – taking on an incumbent like Marco Rubio, whose seat the entire Republican establishment is pouring millions into protecting – will be easy. **But I’m never one to tire from a challenge, and I know that if I have grassroots support from people like you, we’ll win.**

**That’s why I’m personally asking when it matters most:** [**Will you make a grassroots donation to help me win this battleground Senate race? Whatever you contribute will build up our resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50213655/365053204/-1315874399?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4246-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODgwZjBkZi01OTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_HoVCKhHrfL8v6bOsTvYO0xCimn11jaRvJrnNkwPAEk=)

Val Demings

clean_body: But the road ahead is not easy | | | Friend – it wasn’t exactly easy growing up as a Black girl from a poor family in the South, the youngest of seven children and in segregated schools. It wasn’t easy for my parents – Dad a janitor, Mom a maid – but they did whatever they could to support us. While none of it was particularly easy, I’m very proud to have been the first in my family to graduate from college. = Much like my past, nothing about the road ahead – taking on an incumbent like Marco Rubio, whose seat the entire Republican establishment is pouring millions into protecting – will be easy. But I’m never one to tire from a challenge, and I know that if I have grassroots support from people like you, we’ll win. That’s why I’m personally asking when it matters most: = | | = I'm proud of this team for the momentum you've helped me build so far, but I'm counting on supporters like you to contribute just $5 or more now if we're going to keep going – together. Thank you, as always, for your support, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. name: Tim Ryan
subject: the longest email I’ll ever send you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=5357%2E3611125%2E8uI2oE ][IMG]

This is the longest email I’ll ever send you, so I hope you’ll read the
whole thing.

I want to share our game plan for flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat
blue—when you’re running in a swing state that Trump won, you can’t leave
anything to chance.

That’s why I have to ask: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20756?t=1009&amount=25&akid=5357%2E3611125%2E8uI2oE ]Will you make a $25 donation to help us on
the road to victory to flip Ohio blue and expand our Democratic Senate
majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20756?t=1010&amount=25&akid=5357%2E3611125%2E8uI2oE ]Chip in

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Step One: Talk to Folks in Every Corner of Ohio

Working class Ohioans, in our big cities and our small towns, know what
it’s like to be left out and left behind. I won’t be that kind of Senator.

We kicked off this campaign by launching a Workers First Tour. Since then,
we’ve been traveling all over Ohio—visiting union halls, factories,
restaurants, and even a few bars—to hear from folks about the challenges
they’re facing.

The truth is, a lot of people don’t trust politicians, and they have every
reason to be skeptical. The only way to break through that is to look
someone in the eye, shake their hand, and let them see that you don’t have
eight heads.

The opposition might be spending millions of dollars to attack me, but
your donations allow me to do what matters—show up and meet folks
face-to-face.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Step Two: Stand Up to Special Interests and Put Workers First

I’ve made more than a few headlines for getting loud (okay, outright
yelling) on the House floor, because when it comes to speaking up for the
hardworking people out there busting their rear ends every day, I’ll never
hold my tongue.

Whether it’s the Chinese government, Big Pharma, a corporate giant trying
to ship jobs overseas, or a member of my own party—I’m not afraid to take
on anyone who tries to leave our workers high and dry.

If that puts a target on my back, so be it.

My Republican opponent JD Vance can rely on the steady support of dark
money groups, but I’m proud to run a campaign that’s powered by grassroots
supporters like you—not right-wing special interests and tech
billionaires.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Step Three: Focus On The Issues That Matter

The vast majority of Americans are working harder and longer, making less,
and falling further behind. CEOs are getting golden parachutes, while our
seniors are cutting pills in half because they can’t afford their
medications.

You wouldn’t know it from listening to JD Vance though—all he does is yell
about the culture war du jour. We’re not going to flip Ohio blue and
expand our Democratic majority by starting fights over Big Bird and Dr.
Seuss—we need to stay focused on the issues that matter.

It doesn’t matter if I’m talking to a Democrat, Independent, or
Republican—I’m talking about jobs and wages. I’m talking about making Ohio
a manufacturing powerhouse. Lowering the cost of prescription drugs.
Expanding broadband access. Making sure our kids get a good education.

Vance is trying to make this race about anger, division, and fear because
he knows that when it comes down to the issues that actually make a
difference for working families, he’ll lose every time.

That’s why my team has to send you emails like this one—so we’ll have the
resources to get our message out over all his GOP nonsense.

I’m giving this race everything I’ve got, but I can’t win this thing
alone. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20756?t=1011&amount=25&akid=5357%2E3611125%2E8uI2oE ]I’m personally asking you to rush a donation of $25 so we can
carry out our campaign strategy, flip Ohio blue, and finally cut workers
in on the deal.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20756?t=1012&amount=25&akid=5357%2E3611125%2E8uI2oE ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20756?t=1013&amount=50&akid=5357%2E3611125%2E8uI2oE ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20756?t=1014&amount=100&akid=5357%2E3611125%2E8uI2oE ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20756?t=1015&amount=200&akid=5357%2E3611125%2E8uI2oE ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20756?t=1016&amount=250&akid=5357%2E3611125%2E8uI2oE ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20756?t=1008&amount=30&akid=5357%2E3611125%2E8uI2oE ]Other Amount

Thanks for your support,

Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=5357%2E3611125%2E8uI2oE ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=5357%2E3611125%2E8uI2oE ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=5357%2E3611125%2E8uI2oE ]Donate Monthly

CEOs are getting golden parachutes, while our seniors are cutting pills in half because they can’t afford their medications. You wouldn’t know it from listening to JD Vance though—all he does is yell about the culture war du jour. We’re not going to flip Ohio blue and expand our Democratic majority by starting fights over Big Bird and Dr. Seuss—we need to stay focused on the issues that matter. It doesn’t matter if I’m talking to a Democrat, Independent, or Republican—I’m talking about jobs and wages. I’m talking about making Ohio a manufacturing powerhouse. Lowering the cost of prescription drugs. Expanding broadband access. Making sure our kids get a good education. Vance is trying to make this race about anger, division, and fear because he knows that when it comes down to the issues that actually make a difference for working families, he’ll lose every time. That’s why my team has to send you emails like this one—so we’ll have the resources to get our message out over all his GOP nonsense. I’m giving this race everything I’ve got, but I can’t win this thing alone. [ ]I’m personally asking you to rush a donation of $25 so we can carry out our campaign strategy, flip Ohio blue, and finally cut workers in on the deal. [ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $200 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount Thanks for your support, Tim [ ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [ ]click here. If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below! [ ]Donate Monthly [ ]Donate Once Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio Tim Ryan for Ohio P.O. Box 189 Niles, Ohio 44446 United States [ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ ][IMG] You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
