name: Team Swalwell
subject: Did you see what happened in Alaska last week?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2022-FR-September?refcode=E17393-20220901-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2022-FR-September?refcode=E17393-20220901-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
As of last Tuesday, Alaska is now a blue state, team!

We know how crazy that sounds, but it’s true! Democrat Mary Peltola WON last week’s special election for Alaska’s at-large House seat, upsetting her MAGA Republican opponent Sarah Palin. You know, the Former VP Candidate and hard-core Trump supporter? That one.

Peltola will mark the first Democrat to hold Alaska’s lone House seat in 49 years, and we don’t know about you, but this has us very excited.

This is a big deal, team. This election clearly indicates a major resurgence for Democrats and could very well be a sign of what’s to come in November. If Democrats can flip a seat as deep red as Alaska's who’s to say we can’t flip countless other Republican seats in November? We would love nothing more than to keep this up and flip even more red seats, but we need your help. Can you chip in now to help us build more momentum to defeat MAGA Republicans in November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2022-FR-September?refcode=E18131-20220904-AlaskaResults-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]

CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2022-FR-September?refcode=E18131-20220904-AlaskaResults-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]

Democrats in Alaska just sent a LOUD message to Kevin McCarthy, Sarah Palin, and all MAGA Republicans like them that no seat of theirs is safe, and that the American people will not put up with their assaults on our civil rights and on our democracy. And we have to keep bringing the heat, because if we let MAGA Republicans take the majority in Congress, more of our liberties will be erased, our economy and middle class will be decimated, our affordable healthcare will be taken, and so, so much more.

With this current wave of Democratic momentum, we’ve got McCarthy and the entire Republican Party stumbling big time. At this rate, we’re poised to show them that the red wave they hoped for is nothing more than a fantasy. But if we want to ensure Democrats win big again in November, we can’t afford to slow down. Chip in now to help us build on this surprising win and secure more surprising wins in November so we can send a blue wave to Congress! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2022-FR-September?refcode=E18131-20220904-AlaskaResults-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]

CHIP IN FOR BLUE WAVE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2022-FR-September?refcode=E18131-20220904-AlaskaResults-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]

We're on a roll, team. Let’s keep it up!

— Team Swalwell
DONATE TO ERIC >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2022-FR-September?refcode=E17393-20220901-headerfooter-footer-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]

name: Trump News HQ
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh155nj317f1helub972evbhaniaa2it5moe19k0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpi66oj2c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongs1g6ad5ge8pj5cr1m3hb4cdhcphb2dlk6dr7ccb0c9ob1o34mpib2ptgcmqbeduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4sj661qb6or7map6cdb0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq26fr217psoj75maigguikro2h6ndepn6th79k0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpi66oj2c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuh5e5kee90cr6ekm73drthgaa08bnu4skb7kp68_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpi66oj2c5h2bs)****[”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlpvem56k4afij2806kdjfpnq109mnrdfmo5ce5o_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpi66oj2c5h2bs)[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9h5ean90btnq0ujtm0lp5uhev1gie4939iq85vg_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpi66oj2c5h2bs)—is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfosm7buij7hu9tmthbaaom4aus70635dm4cqv78_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpi66oj2c5h2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvo3gq4ar0b1bjpmqgngk7ctl6si15gm6d6ht8co_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpi66oj2c5h2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: This is bad. Really bad. 🚨

body:
|
| | | Peter, It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61181977:6xHvBGVNQ:m:1:3339843426:B3EABC6E623AEBBFC24B4B39C113BB76:r)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61181977:6xHvBGVNQ:m:1:3339843426:B3EABC6E623AEBBFC24B4B39C113BB76:r "Generic
Button")
---

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61181977:6xHvBGVNQ:m:1:3339843426:B3EABC6E623AEBBFC24B4B39C113BB76:r "Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5,
$10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.")**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61181977:6xHvBGVNQ:m:1:3339843426:B3EABC6E623AEBBFC24B4B39C113BB76:r "BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and
leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>")**

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61181977:6xHvBGVNQ:m:1:3339843426:B3EABC6E623AEBBFC24B4B39C113BB76:r "Generic Button")
---

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FOUR SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

_She 's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi 's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you, Fellow Conservative.

**[I can't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61181977:6xHvBGVNQ:m:1:3339843426:B3EABC6E623AEBBFC24B4B39C113BB76:r "I can’t extend this deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. So please,
rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.")**

Thank you,

Dan Crenshaw

Last week, Joe Biden delivered one of the most disgusting speeches an American president has ever given.

He ran as a unifier. Now, Brandon is saying to the vast majority of the country that disapproves of him that they’re a threat to the republic.

Governor Ron DeSantis said it best:

Joe Biden is the American Nero.

He is a failed leader and his smear campaign against half of the country is nothing more than division.

He dodders, he lashes out, he labels anyone who dares to dissent from the Regime a fascist – but at the end of the day, his policies are why Americans reject him.

Biden has:
-
Caused record setting inflation
-
Flung open the southern border letting in dangerous drugs
-
Embraced the reckless defund the police agenda
-
Colluded with teachers’ unions to keep kids out of school
So OF COURSE people are going to be upset by all the wreckage he’s left in his wake. That doesn’t make them threats to democracy – that makes them human beings with a pulse.

It’s long been said that the President of the United States is whoever is feeding Biden’s teleprompter. Well, they’ve made it clear that people who dissent from his policies are somehow second-class citizens.

They’ve shown that on top of vilifying those who disagree with him, they are willing to mobilize the administrative apparatus of government to go after people they don’t like.

Those 87,000 new IRS agents weren’t hired to look into Brandon’s political pundits – they’re in place to audit the middle class!

Under Governor DeSantis's leadership, Florida is leading the fight to defend citizens from the Biden Administration's destructive agenda and unconstitutional overreach.

But we need to hold Biden accountable for his actions. This November is a referendum on his policies.

body:
................ CALL TO ACTION ................

There's a fight in the Pocatello area...

And there are two principled conservative men who need your help to win it.

Jake Stevens and David Worley.

They have TOUGH battles in November.

And if they lose, Idaho loses.

So please, if you can, contribute to each of them because these are EXACTLY the type of MEN we need in the statehouse. Both of them will go to the mat defending our liberties.

If you care about the future of our state...

Contribute to Jake:
➡️ https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=f0681e3edf&e=dea908e0fe (https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=803d789133&e=dea908e0fe)

clean_body: Help us keep our ads on the air and fight back against national Republican attacks against Liz | Peter, Did you see our team’s email yesterday about keeping our ads on the air? National Republicans are spending millions to attack Liz, and keeping our ads running is one of the best ways to fight back. = | = This race is neck-and-neck, and that means every dollar counts. Funding TV buys for our campaign is expensive, and we’ll have no choice but to make tough budget cuts if we don’t raise the money needed to keep this program running. = Will you help us keep Liz's ads on the air so we can flip IA-02? = \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Mathis Date: Sat, Sep 3, 2022 Subject: Help us reach as many voters as possible Peter, As outside money continues to pour into our state from national Republicans and attacks against Liz grow, we have to make sure we have the resources to fight back. Our new ad is going live today, and it’s one of the ways we’re able to communicate with voters in the 2nd Congressional District to let them know why we need to send Liz to Congress. But ads are expensive. = = = Iowans deserve a leader with integrity – someone who will look out for their best interests. = = Thank you, Team Mathis Liz Mathis is a lifelong Iowan, State Senator, and former local news reporter running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = | Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. | | Hey everyone, Maria here – Haley’s mom! I was so excited to attend a campaign event with my daughter recently, especially since she’s been so busy in Washington lately! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50217616/365067968/-1833676154?refcode=EM_BS_STE_220904_FR_HaleysMom_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzM2OTEzYy02MjJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yae2efQryHoChXVysF_5E066O41t9tTcEN_P9atJbdo=) When Haley wasn’t talking with voters, we shared stories about growing up, and we talked about how so much has changed. But most of all, we talked about Haley’s election! I may be a little biased (okay, okay, _a lot_ biased), but I know Haley is the right choice for MI-11. She’s stood up for the community for years, and she represents Michigan in Congress with dignity and determination. Oakland County deserves a representative who puts community first. Unlike her GOP opponent, Haley will always stand up for the residents of Oakland County, not Donald Trump. I know it’s Sunday, so I want to keep this short. But before you go, will you consider [contributing $25 to Haley’s campaign? My daughter has delivered results for MI-11 for four years, and we can’t risk that progress by allowing an anti-choice, anti-democracy Republican to win this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50217618/365067969/-1833676154?refcode=EM_BS_STE_220904_FR_HaleysMom_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzM2OTEzYy02MjJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yae2efQryHoChXVysF_5E066O41t9tTcEN_P9atJbdo=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50217619/365067971/1636531312?refcode=EM_BS_STE_220904_FR_HaleysMom_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzM2OTEzYy02MjJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yae2efQryHoChXVysF_5E066O41t9tTcEN_P9atJbdo=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: the Protecting Our Democracy Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| You've seen firsthand how nearly 2 years after leaving the White House, Trump is still capable of doing irreversible damage to our democracy and national security.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=820%2E5257348%2EwQD8v-)
Derek,
Joe Biden’s victory in the 2020 election pulled our democracy back from the brink — but if Republicans take back Congress before Trump's next presidential campaign, that lifeline may only be temporary.
This is why our time is precious in these next few weeks. We have already worked to reverse the damage Donald Trump caused during his time in the White House. It is terrifying how much one man could abuse the powers of the presidency and weaken our democratic institutions.
The twice-impeached former president, who incited a violent insurrection against the U.S. Capitol, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories, and the Big Lie that he won the 2020 election — is still threatening our democracy from Mar-A-Lago.
The American people know that threats to our democracy are one of this country’s most significant issues. They also understand that some of the greatest threats to our democracy do not come from a foreign power but from within.
**You've seen firsthand how nearly 2 years after leaving the White House, Trump is still capable of doing irreversible damage to our democracy and national security.**
My legislation — the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ — is an ambitious set of reforms that would enshrine our democratic guardrails into law. No longer a suggestion. But a code.
This bill is designed to restore our system of checks and balances over the presidency, create greater accountability and transparency, and protect our elections.
With President Biden in the White House and Democratic majorities in Congress and the midterm elections fast approaching, we have a narrow window of opportunity to protect our democracy from presidential abuses of power. We must seize this moment.
[**Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ today.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20220904-protecting-our-democracy-petition.eAJxyW&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220904_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=820%2E5257348%2EwQD8v-)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20220904-protecting-our-democracy-petition.eAJxyW&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220904_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=820%2E5257348%2EwQD8v-)
---
Trump used the Presidency to enrich himself and his family, protect himself and his enablers from prosecution, attack our democratic institutions and his political opponents, encourage foreign interference in our elections, and end all accountability as we know it.
After the Watergate scandal — another dark time in American history — Congress took action, passing a series of landmark laws and reforms to prevent a future president from abusing their office the way Richard Nixon did. Those changes stood the test of time for half a century, but it is time for Congress to act again and enact new protections for our democratic institutions.
To ensure another wannabe autocrat like Trump cannot push our democracy to the brink. Again.
[**We desperately need to pass a new set of reforms to stop future presidents from abusing the power of the presidency, as we witnessed during the Trump presidency. If you’re with me, add your name to call for the passage of my _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ ASAP.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20220904-protecting-our-democracy-petition.eAJxyW&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220904_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=820%2E5257348%2EwQD8v-)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20220904-protecting-our-democracy-petition.eAJxyW&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220904_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=820%2E5257348%2EwQD8v-)
---
With Democrats in control in Washington and an uncertain upcoming midterm election, we need to do everything in our power to prevent another Trump from undermining our democracy ever again. Thanks so much for your help and for standing by my side.
— Adam
**[Despite defeating Trump, the past two years have shown how vulnerable our democracy remains from Trump and the GOP’s autocratic impulses. We can’t let up on our work to protect our democracy from future abusive presidents. Sign on to support the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20220904-protecting-our-democracy-petition.eAJxyW&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220904_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=820%2E5257348%2EwQD8v-)**
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=820%2E5257348%2EwQD8v-) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=820%2E5257348%2EwQD8v-)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---
If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=820%2E5257348%2EwQD8v-)

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: I couldn’t speak English
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress
body:
Xin lỗi - that means sorry in Vietnamese. Simple words like “sorry” were foreign to me when I came to America.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zagon4bond9sv5rkrflp9qrkeu2d0fdlpq3nt4no_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpi61o31c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8d1k6di66dj3maqn4tr165gjap9l6sr72t5k65j6cthmmqp62tdkcdhbfdbk63jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m9p6cc3kmdi6fdj4coqe1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z84us5oel307ua1e2fcl1slja427o3537rer980g_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpi61o31c9h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, Xin lỗi - that means sorry in Vietnamese.
Simple words like “sorry” were foreign to me when I came to America.

We were refugees from Communist Vietnam, and this new country was large and unfamiliar - but I knew even as a kid that it was the land of opportunity.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgof4b3mlhnooi72eapgj2t5c5d76s936u05k5l8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpi61o31c9h2bs)
---
I couldn’t let the incredible second chance I got in America go to waste. I studied day and night to learn English, and by the time I was 18, I was enrolled in the Naval Academy. _**Only in America could a little boy who didn’t know a word of English grow up to be an officer in the greatest fighting force in the world.**_ I didn’t get this far in life because of government handouts or political correctness. I worked hard, I had faith, and I never doubted that the American Dream was in reach - _and that terrifies Nancy Pelosi._ **I’m not oppressed or in need of the government’s help. I’m an American just like you. And right now, I’m fighting the radical Left to keep that dream alive for generations to come.** **[Nancy Pelosi thinks that all immigrants and minorities are too stupid to succeed without the government holding their hand. I’m living proof that that’s not true. Let’s prove the radical Left wrong. Pitch in now to keep the American Dream alive and take back the House with a conservative majority that NEVER gave up on America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0kkovojpij2l44m0p3v78lm661bhm7d2pf475do_rp22sh2s8i66or2cpi61o31c9h2bs)**
---

Greg Abbott is now up to over $11,000,000 in ad spending across Texas —
with less than 10 weeks left to go.

Thanks to his corporate mega-donors and special interests, Abbott has a
nearly unlimited budget to run ads attacking Beto. His campaign spending
is out of control, and we can’t let him buy re-election.

name: Ron Johnson
subject: a personal plea
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I have never seen the Left more aggressive and out of control as they are in the last few days and weeks. Long gone are the days of polite discourse, the days when we could have disagreements without it ending in riots and chaos. Not only is the left posting the personal addresses of SCOTUS members on Twitter, but in Washington DC, activists are giving cash to restaurants to "out" SCOTUS members if they dine in.

I knew when I announced my campaign for re-election that this would be a campaign unlike one I've ever seen before, and it has. The vitriol and slander I've seen so far this year has never been paralleled.

The days of decorum have disappeared, but can and need to return. And that's why I'm running for re-election. Democrats have let major cities become crime ridden, they are behind the rising inflation we are experiencing at the pump and grocery stores, and this is just the beginning of their mayhem.

This is not a landscape that I want our children and grandchildren growing up in. I will always fight for their future, and I hope if you stand with me in that fight you'll stand with me right now in this campaign.

I hate asking for money - it's my least favorite thing to do. But the facts are simple. Democrats across the country are gearing up to make this Wisconsin Senate race the most expensive in history in an attempt to not just defeat me, but defeat our values and beliefs.

No donation is too small. $25 makes a difference. $25 can help us reach that one undecided voter and ensure they get out and vote and keep WI red.

I know our nation's brightest days are ahead of us, but getting there isn't going to be easy. _**[We can win in November if I can count on your support right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61186440:6MGnBGVjN:m:1:3346849603:8252171B7F9DE514DDB14B5812175C82:r "Johnson1")**_

Please, Peter, our future is counting on our actions today.

Thanks for reading this email. I appreciate you and your family.

Thank you for your support,
Ron

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61186441:6MGnBGVjN:m:1:3346849603:8252171B7F9DE514DDB14B5812175C82:r "footer image")
---
A note from Ron Johnson: America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. **This is not someone else 's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.************************************************************************************As a grandpa, dad, and businessman, I refuse to lose our country to radicals and woke liberals with their socialist agenda. I refuse to jeopardize America's future. I know you feel the same.

_**[**Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61186441:6MGnBGVjN:m:1:3346849603:8252171B7F9DE514DDB14B5812175C82:r "Can I personally ask you to join me in this fight for Freedom, Peter?")**_**************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************
---

---
| Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc.
---

clean_body: It’s time for us to stand up to GOP extremists like Shady Schweikert and vote them out. | = | David Schweikert has spent over ten years in Congress, but he’s done nothing to help the people of Arizona. It’s time for us to stand up to GOP extremists like Shady Schweikert and vote them out. = | = During his time in Congress, David Schweikert has voted numerous times against the best interests of Arizonans. He’s voted AGAINST protecting abortion. He’s voted AGAINST defending same-sex marriage. He’s voted AGAINST investigating the January 6th insurrection. From our basic rights and freedoms to the security of our country and democracy, Schweikert’s voting record proves that he doesn’t care about the needs of everyday Arizonans. We need to make sure Schweikert doesn’t win another term. Arizona’s 1st Congressional District deserves a leader that actually cares about the people in our community. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = – Stop Shady Schweikert | | = Paid for by Friends of Jevin D. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans are trying to steal their way to a House majority. I know this won't surprise you. This is how they built their majority in 2010, after all.
body:
The party of coups, corruption and theft is at it again
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, The Republicans are trying to steal their way to a House majority. _I know this won't surprise you, that the party of coups, corruption and stealing classified documents has ignored crystal-clear court rulings to try to steal House seats. It isn't like they haven't obscenely gerrymandered in the past. This is how they built their majority in 2010, after all. _ [**Can you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) so that we can ensure we hold the House--even increase our majority--and can stop them from stealing their way to a House majority this time, or ever again?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T132c5062-105d-41d1-b321-bde580c90801/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) But now, as authoritarians do, they've purposely run out the clock to ignore our courts until we pass dates when district lines must be set. Our Supreme Court, when it's bothered to say anything, said it's "too close to an election" to make them change district lines, rewarding their delaying tactics of ignoring clear rulings REQUIRING THEM TO DRAW ADDITIONAL BLACK MAJORITY DISTRICTS. Yet another betrayal by our insane, illegitimate, right-wing Supreme Court, and an incredibly dangerous precedent for our democracy. **In a piece in The Huffington Post, it's clear that these tactics could give Republicans 5-7 additional House seats, just because they refused to follow the law.** In Alabama, Louisiana and Georgia, the Black populations are 27%, 33% & 33% respectively, so based on The Voting Rights Act, our Constitution and, well, math, a quarter to a third of the districts in these states must be majority Black. Yet, Republican state legislators who obviously hate democracy have gerrymandered to only allow one majority Black district in each state, and now the Supreme Court has allowed them to get away with it.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: DEMOCRATIC CONGRESSIONAL CAMPAIGN COMMITTEE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7d1da1b-4f96-4b4d-b5d5-0f361154fad3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **In my home state of Ohio, something similar was done, after the Ohio Supreme Court found several GOP maps to not be representative of the 47% average Democrats receive in statewide votes here, and in violation of a constitutional amendment we overwhelmingly passed in 2018 requiring fair districts.** Republicans have again and again used delay tactics to get close enough to the election so they don't have to make the changes demanded by Ohio's Supreme Court so Democrats are looking at a likelihood of ending up with 5-6 seats, instead of the 9 that we should. We obviously can't let them get away with this. When they start using delay tactics to blatantly ignore our courts, what do our laws even mean anymore? So, look, on the bright side we've seen incredible results in Kansas rejecting an effort to ban abortion, and in New York and Alaska where Democrats won Republican seats. We're fired up! We need to take this energy and destroy them in November--to win so many damn Republican seats they can't take the House, and along with a Senate that ends the filibuster we pass federal legislation that'll never allow them to pull this crap again. [**Can you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) so that we can ensure we hold the House--even increase our majority--and can stop them from stealing their way to a House majority this time, or ever again?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbbac3ab2-75b1-4aed-87be-c2edaef09ae4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for supporting Blue Amp Action's efforts to protect our democracy. And please enjoy the rest of your Labor Day Weekend._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: DON’T LET THEM STEAL CONGRESS](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20c7fba7-3047-4834-96ed-b0e0a1d0f830/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

The truth is -- the people of Florida deserve better than Ron DeSantis. Because Florida should be a place where hard work is rewarded, justice is equal, and an opportunity is right in front of you. | |
---
Make no mistake, Derek: Ron DeSantis has failed to meet the needs of working people and families across Florida. **Under DeSantis’s leadership,** the state government has prioritized banning books, restricting abortion access, and even dictating what educators can and cannot teach in their classrooms. **Derek: We can’t give DeSantis another four years in office. I’m running to retire our failed governor and to put people over politics -- will you join the fight by signing up for updates from my campaign?**
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0vWSczDM5JVQEwDVBPD9TM20ncj3R3Ob37L-StEnFjIVh6bOoLgv_ZCFTSIjFebuJ9Ib_Hkb2ZKtK1Apy65wSXa6ORUVsjQSWDvgpquKpBUn9-6wjV1cDJM8RA69_rKe8pgh3-Gf3y7GR6dxd0AN9QSRyTv2NJST2sCC7_UIg8XeB1lLc4zAVFYjvAS3e-H-MbMuJYP9-5DobK_BoLYrnvsY3j6p9QV3wEB9nWKPsDNCrZNmKuT0PUl4eEiUlHB8eKB0y1_f_a9G8chjdAbnlv-6vibXgpXrb_3baM33VvgmRMs2eZxlsjJJlP5SskvOVw/3p6/pHBCdDi2TV-Nk9qfSmUUJw/h0/aB2kYgkcoZ4ISt3mt14JScy5BLh5vvNg_nPbc3jgR8Q)

Ron DeSantis has already raised tens of millions for his reelection campaign, Derek.**But we have a real shot at defeating one of the most extreme Republicans out there.** **[That’s why I’m reaching out to you: I’m hoping a few good Democrats are reading this message and are ready to help me send Ron DeSantis packing in November. Candidate for Governor, Florida

name: Matt Whitaker
subject: 50 FOIAs for the FBI
body:
| | | Peter, Former President Trump is going on the offensive and appears to be launching a full-scale fight against the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). We here at the America First Policy Institute are joining the fight. I'm sure you already know the backstory: The FBI recently raided former President Trump's home in what could be politically-motivated. This ordeal should paint a clear picture for us: The deep state is real, and we can't afford to sit around playing defense while the FBI raids a former President's home. **_We MUST go on the offensive._** [**And that 's exactly what I plan to do. Will you help me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188676:6-JjZGVNj:m:1:3331421248:1D68F2416CB60BC3BCDA2851D11AEF6E:r) _Our country is at risk of crumbling into a banana republic run by the most radical leftists in America and an invulnerable deep state. WE HAVE NO CHOICE BUT TO FIGHT BACK!_ When the news broke, our entire team sprung into action to respond. Within 48 hours, we filed more than 50 Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the Biden Administration and find out who knew what and when. But I assure you, the Department of Justice (DOJ) is not going to hand over information easily, and we may have to battle with the DOJ for months or even YEARS to uncover the truth fully. **We CANNOT sustain our efforts without you ... ** **[Will you chip in before it's to help ensure our efforts can continue?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188676:6-JjZGVNj:m:1:3331421248:1D68F2416CB60BC3BCDA2851D11AEF6E:r)**[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188676:6-JjZGVNj:m:1:3331421248:1D68F2416CB60BC3BCDA2851D11AEF6E:r) Let me back up. My name is Matt Whitaker... I was appointed acting United States Attorney General under former President Trump. In that role, I protected Law and Order both at home and abroad. Today I am Co-Chair of the Center for Law & Justice at the America First Policy Institute, where we strive to protect and preserve the rule of law in this great Nation. Together, we will fight back against the radical Left and end its unjust weaponization of the FBI. The team at America First Policy Institute is the best in the Nation, and we're ready to make a HUGE difference for our country--ESPECIALLY when it comes to uncovering the truth regarding the FBI raid. [**I hope you 'll consider sending in a donation of $25, $35, or $50 today. ** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188676:6-JjZGVNj:m:1:3331421248:1D68F2416CB60BC3BCDA2851D11AEF6E:r) Sincerely, Matt Whitaker Co-Chair, Center for Law & Justice America First Policy Institute P.S. We've seen it time and time again. Castro's Cuba. Stalin's Russia. Nazi Germany. Mao's China. Great nations fall to tyranny when governments weaponize law enforcement against patriots and political opponents. [**I 'll fight with every breath to make sure that America doesn't have the same fate. Will you? ** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188676:6-JjZGVNj:m:1:3331421248:1D68F2416CB60BC3BCDA2851D11AEF6E:r)

subject: About my dad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
\- I need a personal favor. Here's his status. I know you know what's at stake, and - feel free to forward this to your family and friends, or anyone else concerned about the state of the race.| | | **__** **We are at a fork in the road for this democracy. I believe my father, Dr. Bob Lorinser, is one of the best candidates in the Nation to bring decency and integrity back to Congress.** **Although I am extremely proud of what he's accomplished in the past year, these next two months are absolutely critical. He needs to crush some huge milestones to defeat Jack Bergman, the traitor.**
---
**It's time to rise up! Please support my father for U.S. Congress. Pitch in today.**

Friend, There are just **eight weeks** to the election. The momentum is real and the energy is palpable. But, democracy and individual liberty are on the line. Enthusiasm to replace Jack Bergman's treason with integrity isn't enough. Trending polls aren't enough. To win, to really win, in these last few months we need to mobilize, volunteer, donate, reach out to friends and neighbors, and turn out to vote. Help us make history and flip Michigan's 1st. Now is the time get involved. [We need volunteers](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50238519/365109142/-232506344?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWNjZmU4My04OTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-mtqk2sVVHVivUz2eV0m5pq5i2muLlXZ0twgeyIUqA=&emci=a2ce3b54-882c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=9accfe83-892c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427) and we need donations! **Decisions voters make in this election will have a lasting effect on whether or not we remain a free nation, one governed by the people under a Constitution that has held us together for two and a half centuries.** This isn't hyperbole. If we don’t vote, if we don't get this one right – this election may be the last time American voters get a solid shot at electing their leaders. I have absolutely no doubt that Dr. Bob Lorinser is unequivocally the far better candidate for MI01 Congress, and in their heart of hearts, I think even most Republicans know that, too.
But, keep in mind, although a plurality of this district is fiercely independent (like Dad), the GOP votes with greater discipline. If we don't show up, this half of the state will stay red. They will impose forced birth on women like chattel and we will give power to anti-democratic traitors.
We need to get this seat back. It needs to be actually representational again.
This election is not Democrats vs. Republicans, it's decency vs. treason, and we need your help. Volunteer, spread the word, and for the love of democracy, please, please get out to vote. **Thank you, everyone for your support through these last two months. Your contributions are going toward big, good things. ** -Andrew Lorinser
---

It's time to rise up! Please support my father for U.S. Congress. Pitch in today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = | | = Friend, There are just eight weeks to the election. The momentum is real and the energy is palpable. But, democracy and individual liberty are on the line. Enthusiasm to replace Jack Bergman's treason with integrity isn't enough. Trending polls aren't enough. To win, to really win, in these last few months we need to mobilize, volunteer, donate, reach out to friends and neighbors, and turn out to vote. Help us make history and flip Michigan's 1st. Now is the time get involved. and we need donations! Decisions voters make in this election will have a lasting effect on whether or not we remain a free nation, one governed by the people under a Constitution that has held us together for two and a half centuries. This isn't hyperbole. If we don’t vote, if we don't get this one right – this election may be the last time American voters get a solid shot at electing their leaders. I have absolutely no doubt that Dr. Bob Lorinser is unequivocally the far better candidate for MI01 Congress, and in their heart of hearts, I think even most Republicans know that, too. But, keep in mind, although a plurality of this district is fiercely independent (like Dad), the GOP votes with greater discipline. If we don't show up, this half of the state will stay red. They will impose forced birth on women like chattel and we will give power to anti-democratic traitors. We need to get this seat back. It needs to be actually representational again. This election is not Democrats vs. Republicans, it's decency vs. treason, and we need your help. Volunteer, spread the word, and for the love of democracy, please, please get out to vote. Thank you, everyone for your support through these last two months. Your contributions are going toward big, good things. -Andrew Lorinser If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:= = = | | OF DR. BOB PO BOX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

body:

Team Trump

name: Matt Whitaker
subject: I’m sure you already know the backstory:
body:
| | | Peter, Former President Trump is going on the offensive and appears to be launching a full-scale fight against the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). We here at the America First Policy Institute are joining the fight. I'm sure you already know the backstory: The FBI recently raided former President Trump's home in what could be politically-motivated. This ordeal should paint a clear picture for us: The deep state is real, and we can't afford to sit around playing defense while the FBI raids a former President's home. **_We MUST go on the offensive._** [**And that 's exactly what I plan to do. Will you help me?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188529:JGmoZGViN:m:1:3317145305:FA3F121E8ED28E544A30256B3C0896BA:r) _Our country is at risk of crumbling into a banana republic run by the most radical leftists in America and an invulnerable deep state. WE HAVE NO CHOICE BUT TO FIGHT BACK!_ When the news broke, our entire team sprung into action to respond. Within 48 hours, we filed more than 50 Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the Biden Administration and find out who knew what and when. But I assure you, the Department of Justice (DOJ) is not going to hand over information easily, and we may have to battle with the DOJ for months or even YEARS to uncover the truth fully. **We CANNOT sustain our efforts without you ... ** **[Will you chip in before it's to help ensure our efforts can continue?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188529:JGmoZGViN:m:1:3317145305:FA3F121E8ED28E544A30256B3C0896BA:r)**[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188529:JGmoZGViN:m:1:3317145305:FA3F121E8ED28E544A30256B3C0896BA:r) Let me back up. My name is Matt Whitaker... I was appointed acting United States Attorney General under former President Trump. In that role, I protected Law and Order both at home and abroad. Today I am Co-Chair of the Center for Law & Justice at the America First Policy Institute, where we strive to protect and preserve the rule of law in this great Nation. Together, we will fight back against the radical Left and end its unjust weaponization of the FBI. The team at America First Policy Institute is the best in the Nation, and we're ready to make a HUGE difference for our country--ESPECIALLY when it comes to uncovering the truth regarding the FBI raid. [**I hope you 'll consider sending in a donation of $25, $35, or $50 today. ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188529:JGmoZGViN:m:1:3317145305:FA3F121E8ED28E544A30256B3C0896BA:r) Sincerely, Matt Whitaker Co-Chair, Center for Law & Justice America First Policy Institute P.S. We've seen it time and time again. Castro's Cuba. Stalin's Russia. Nazi Germany. Mao's China. Great nations fall to tyranny when governments weaponize law enforcement against patriots and political opponents. [**I 'll fight with every breath to make sure that America doesn't have the same fate. Will you? ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188529:JGmoZGViN:m:1:3317145305:FA3F121E8ED28E544A30256B3C0896BA:r)
---
[**DONATE NOW!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188529:JGmoZGViN:m:1:3317145305:FA3F121E8ED28E544A30256B3C0896BA:r)
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61188529:JGmoZGViN:m:1:3317145305:FA3F121E8ED28E544A30256B3C0896BA:r)
---
America First Policy Institute is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization, Tax ID # 85-4202763.

---

name: Cassi Fenili
subject: abortion rights, attack ads, and a virtual tie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek,

There is a lot going on lately, so let me
get you up to speed on the latest in Wisconsin.

1. New reporting revealed that Tony’s extreme opponent spent nearly
$200,000 of his own money to attack abortion rights in 2020.
2. If Tim Michels beats Tony, he’s promised to end fair elections and
implement a shockingly cruel pre-Civil War abortion ban.
3. The last three polls show Tony deadlocked with Tim Michels.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/1570?amount=10&refcode=TE_EM_FR_3MU_20220904_1_2&t=1001&akid=4456%2E1827488%2E_aQiZj ]Derek,
Republicans are flooding the airwaves with
lies about Tony and we can’t afford to let our message get drowned out in

name: Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: The fight for life is far from over
body:
| | | [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=582ed7ac33d04af7b324433d3bceb1af&_e=BxB7YSpxjlwxlBBCGqchgb8_t1Qi1MiqK0pli_qPduXUndr2dSrDfEpWiSAzi3Og20j0RRO5XOZUAK-OGNpnGU0brAaObXTo4vhoz-SdU3gUEHRK7KqnJ7sbDjPHX7vmtinES1s6g7gJES_xZLk5a0PivDaanFg7_8kbdRbQKBX4VXzcwN_uCxptRaQmXPCgLENgr8EuDvrGH2VPEAYe3X0S2HNuPNY7Ug7e2f7gZoOdmkXS7rF7xVwvZ9dO9QCtj4zXRaGk9zDKPVbNB257InosDwxs-F8KxWkdf10eSoZp1WvJvPXyKjUwxiFyOkmIbsxIbdpZ9imKx6YM0I2CCK6w53Dz8kRNgzzEq4Hp7yU%3D)

Dear Fellow Conservative, I'm writing to you today because something has been troubling me, and I'd like to know if it's troubling you. The Supreme Court's landmark decision reversing the legal abomination that was _Roe v. Wade_ was a monumental step to protecting life. But I'm concerned that too many conservatives think this victory means the fight for life has already been won, and that as a result, complacency will set in. **Because the truth is, this fight is far from over.** The radical Left knows this, and they're _counting_ on the pro-life movement to let down our guard. They're racing to codify pro-abortion laws at both the state and federal levels. And unless something is done, they won't stop until they've achieved unrestricted abortion on-demand. **We can 't allow this to happen.** Right now, the policy landscape across all levels of government is ripe with opportunities to seize this hard-fought momentum and further protect the unborn from the Left's insidious attempt to dismantle the American family. This is why we're seeking your help as we now focus our efforts on revitalizing a culture of life at every level of government. Because the laws in each state vary, we have a lot of work to do. And today I'd like to invite you to stand with us in protecting those who cannot protect themselves. Complacency isn't an option. We must stop the radical Left's attempt to unravel the American family, and we must do it today. **Will you join the fight to protect the unborn with your generous gift today?** If you're ready to fight for the unborn and help rebuild a culture of life throughout America, make your tax-deductible gift using this secure link now: **[https://secured.heritage.org/fight-for-life-donate/](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=582ed7ac33d04af7b324433d3bceb1af&_e=BxB7YSpxjlwxlBBCGqchgb8_t1Qi1MiqK0pli_qPduXUndr2dSrDfEpWiSAzi3Og20j0RRO5XOZUAK-OGNpnGU0brAaObXTo4vhoz-SdU3gUEHRK7KqnJ7sbDjPHX7vmtinES1s6g7gJES_xZLk5a0PivDaanFg7_8kbdRbQKBX4VXzcwN_uCxptRaQmXPCgLENgr8EuDvrGH2VPEAYe3U5PZ8_3r9I7q4Zq3qiHnlaJew2hxSP8FZEPrkPb74AfeB8E-eeDxMs_4Evtcn9_ZiLLtgikUMZER8kMTtSPS4lQKw-34ishC8sokO9HhRvO0xPdh5M8eRC7CHJKFJfuRqniSriao15Uqak7ekFR_Uw%3D)** Thank you for your support. Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation **P.S. The radical Left is counting on you to sit this fight out, but we can 't afford to be complacent during this critical time. **[**Please click here to join the fight by making your best gift now >>**](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=582ed7ac33d04af7b324433d3bceb1af&_e=BxB7YSpxjlwxlBBCGqchgb8_t1Qi1MiqK0pli_qPduXUndr2dSrDfEpWiSAzi3Og20j0RRO5XOZUAK-OGNpnGU0brAaObXTo4vhoz-SdU3gUEHRK7KqnJ7sbDjPHX7vmtinES1s6g7gJES_xZLk5a0PivDaanFg7_8kbdRbQKBX4VXzcwN_uCxptRaQmXPCgLENgr8EuDvrGH2VPEAYe3VOrmobl3V6qDjI_H_1Oi6QrdgJzA3KHA4zhLubNlwoFm11U0kieaqOMW9G7kBizzOZT4Aka0pPGCezUOUsHMXOVI_oU5jrUTGp_1siK-8MSANyXf6XXPAv68gE2UTBFqItcof61VlStF6cOmALAWJU%3D)

body:
Schmitt's doing everything that he can to take us back to 1972 - a pre-Roe era where abortion was illegal and reproductive freedom was nonexistent.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50238991/365113422/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk270-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDBlMjJkZC04YzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zf9BDRMpZtP71S7oVwxCck4sH2To5OJjUWN_UQ8g7yw=)
**Peter – Eric Schmitt knows that his anti-abortion beliefs have no place in this century.** But he's doing everything that he can to take us back to 1972 – a pre-Roe era where abortion was illegal and reproductive freedom was nonexistent.
**Earlier this summer, immediately after Roe v. Wade fell, Eric Schmitt issued an official opinion on an existing trigger law, making Missouri the first state in the country to implement an extreme trigger ban on abortion post-Roe.** Now, doctors are terrified and at times unable to provide lifesaving care for their patients – and the birth control that patients have counted on for decades could be next on Eric Schmitt’s chopping block.
But this is only just the beginning. Now, Eric Schmitt is running for Senate so that he can buddy up with Mitch McConnell and destroy reproductive rights across the entire country. **With far-right Republicans already scheming to pass a NATIONWIDE ABORTION BAN, we cannot let one of the biggest anti-choice villains in the country make it to the Senate.**
Thankfully, Trudy Busch Valentine, a mother, grandmother, fourth-generation Missourian, and proud nurse, is running to defeat his extreme ideology and defend our reproductive rights! **While Eric Schmitt will turn back the clock on our rights even further, Trudy will lead us forward and win future generations the brighter, kinder future and reproductive freedom they deserve.**
Trudy's working tirelessly to flip this seat blue, but she'll only be able to defeat Schmitt's anti-abortion megadonors with strong grassroots support. [**Please, will you rush $5 right now to stand with Trudy, protect our Senate majority, and restore reproductive freedom across the country? Trudy will be the 51st vote that we need to codify abortion access, but she can't get to the Senate without your help!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50238992/365113423/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk270-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDBlMjJkZC04YzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zf9BDRMpZtP71S7oVwxCck4sH2To5OJjUWN_UQ8g7yw=)

clean_body: This is not the news we wanted to share with you. | Inside Elections : OR-06: Likely Democratic → Lean Democratic = | = We’ll cut right to the chase. A top elections forecaster announced that this race is going to be even more competitive than we thought. This is not news we want to share with you. A race this tight means we can’t leave anything up to chance. And this update couldn't have come at a worse time. Kevin McCarthy was just in Oregon campaigning for our opponent, signaling to his dark money backers that they should throw everything they have at this seat. We can’t afford to let the radical right gain a foothold in Oregon now that we know how tight this election is going to be. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Team Salinas | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Friend,
---
As you may have heard, liberals violated federal law in an attempt to attack and intimidate you, friend. In direct violation of state and federal law, the office of New York Attorney General Letitia James leaked Stand For America’s confidential tax documents to a left-wing special-interest group, who then shared them with the press. **_Well guess what?_** We are not going to sit on the sidelines and take it. We are going to fight. That’s right. We are going to sue the liberal New York Attorney General’s office. Liberals broke federal law in an attempt to silence and intimidate me and conservatives just like you. **I hope you take a minute to watch my latest updates from this week listed below. ** It is essential we band together and show corrupt government officials that conservatives will NOT be intimidated. Thank you as always for your constant support. My very best,

**Back-to-back polls show far-right extremist Don Bolduc ahead in New Hampshire — and Donald Trump is leaning towards endorsing him.**

This is alarming, not just for our Senate majority — but for our democracy.
America as we know it depends on free, fair, and impartially administered elections. But across the country, partisan politicians are calling into question the integrity of our election system.
**Don Bolduc is one of those politicians.** He continues to push the Big Lie and baseless election fraud claims and even “promised to defy the presidential election results, should he be called upon to do so in 2024."
If Don Bolduc wins this seat, you can be certain that he will work to systematically undermine our elections.
These partisan efforts are a direct attack on our democracy — threatening our peace, stability, and certainty, the very rule of law that makes peaceful transitions of power possible.
**[We can't stand by and let that happen. We must act now to ensure that Don Bolduc is never elected to the U.S. Senate. name: Mehmet Oz
subject: Looking for your name!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate
body:
|
---
Hey Friend,

I am running a very close race against my opponent John Fetterman, and the race is currently anybody’s game.

To be honest, during the last two months, we have not been reaching our campaign goals, and when the race is this close, reaching our goals determines if we win or lose.

body:
It was amazing.
| | [ ](http://email.email.doug4gov.com/c/eJxdUctu3SAU_Bq8swX4vfAibZJNN22lSs0KceHYJuJh8Wh6-_UF12mlSojHDMwZ5sBChoG2eCYUV3KZOJ7xVKmFYkrztiNDi8nYzOuMbz3ArZs5iJmiDoPhSjfSpa3b3I9GOFPty0C4kNPUr7CuYiA9HkWPb7y7TfMIA-kqvewxHgG1D4g-5xFAJA_Nm7IeZBHJ2OoVWBlqt9ZFvjY8RK-4dZmThklnmTPMJsG0rbWlDAw7_Y6kR-2zL5Je2Q21j9EnQHRI0TADUiWTsdP4BQaXvIAMWqEZN4dW6_2iRD5ytdlMnlGQfz6KBR5V8aHv5lCiaPPiSEMKTPNkxX4tfc_Oguw90Xd5ZyPY-Kd0fbR7EK-fv84y08xqJTPxH7grGYr98Wd8miq_yONNaa3CMOZubGc3ShOuXyxo_IAoPR9ReuZNXz5Z_rJ_2359qe-0r79vpFD0Y57j_YC_9y6J5kqKovHxN1ZZszQ)

Peter, Yesterday, President Trump came to Luzerne County to rally with me and help me make my case to Pennsylvania voters... and **the energy was absolutely electric:**
* **THOUSANDS of conservative patriots packed the place** in support of me and President Trump,

* This campaign **RAISED 113k in just a few days** ... BEATING our goal, and providing to President Trump that his time and energy was well-spent here in Pennsylvania.

But I’ll be honest: Josh Shapiro and the Far-Left Media are ALREADY going on the attack with ugly smear tactics aimed at President Trump, at me, and at our supporters.
We NEED to punch back, and it’s going to take even more resources than we thought.
**We need to increase our Fundraising Goal one more time: to 150k before tomorrow night** , so we can _really_ go on the attack after Labor Day when voters start tuning in.

| [ **DONATE NOW** ](http://email.email.doug4gov.com/c/eJxdUctu3SAU_Bq8s4Uxtq8XXrRNokpRpGaRtFkhDMc2Eg8LQ5Obry-4TitFQjxmYM4wB8a660iDh5rgQo4Xjgd8KdRIMCFpS-uuwXVfDfOApxZgogMHMRBEMRiudCVdXOjiflfCmWIdJ8ynVk4Yz6LvKVA6USphnkA2DamlLPS4hrDtqPmCyF0aO4jooXpV1oPMIgmbvQIr99LNZZYvDd-DV9y6xEnDpLPMGWajYNqW2hIGhh1--7pFzZ3Pkl7ZBTU3wUdApIvBMANSRZOww_gJ7i56AQm0QjNuNq3m60mJdORqsYk8oqj_-8gWeFDZh76aTYmszbMjDXFnmkcr1nNpW3YUZB-Jfsg7G8CGv6XL-Lw-x5-3P74_JJpZrWQiPoGrknu237-F20vhR7m9Kq3V3vWpG8vRjdyE8xcj6r8iQo5HhBx5k5d7y1_Wp-X9sbyStvy11Jki39Icrhv8u3dKVGdSBPU3fwBo9LPB)

name: Team DLCC
subject: re: Jamie Raskin’s investigation:
body:
Republicans are targeting legislatures in battleground states to try and reclaim their power and make whatever decisions they wish regarding election outcomes. | | |
---
| | In a recent Congressional hearing, Rep. Jamie Raskin addressed the Constitution’s independent state legislature theory and its detrimental impact on the future of our democracy as we know it. [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xT87Do081Peey8mbiuSK7m_snEUWh5MQYEeF41v3nhyIp_PDUnptS0WoL1kpZ-DB6_NJLx8V3WPghN3qADp5VfqqMeXs1tIrRy1HHPHqBbJz2goF3uJpmR8IKTNYo5zbRYx8lkMU6tQpV7Pba20L-GtPkyrx5cniI-1jtkosoIgIkqxLGvAR-pT8unsHJVSTOXBd6Xq3TzJY8hKNecD41jN7M71et-FV3MksoFqFcWI31-f8gCwOCl3NaQqSF2FmKzRROVIZVm4sZqUJAMkkR4yOOH7_9R6Q12DC9Vov7TVN6nd4RZUAIS6IPUNgpsFAcGG2F-8HeAwMAmo1KEQHGh_jshIiWxUphZNQQhjYapZ4tAVweAjyb54kDUrj9xX-39js2u5X0U-y186fRfIKPn/3p6/g2gtZawKTgGGNjXSmvFMyQ/h0/TDCqjQsiV6RBCzI0S8EalJKz-tCXf3qQAEvlqibO6Wg) **This would grant state legislatures complete power to control our federal elections and nullify hundreds of established election laws.** Extremist Republicans are willing to go to whatever lengths to win elections and reclaim power, even if it means rewriting the rules of our democracy. We’re seeing the GOP across the nation work tirelessly to target state legislatures in battleground states in order to oversee future elections and harm the integrity of our democracy. [How can we fight back? By making sure that pro-democracy Democrats hold the power in statehouses across the country. clean_body: Republicans are targeting legislatures in battleground states to try and reclaim their power and make whatever decisions they wish regarding election outcomes. | | | | | In a recent Congressional hearing, Rep. Jamie Raskin addressed the Constitution’s independent state legislature theory and its detrimental impact on the future of our democracy as we know it. This would grant state legislatures complete power to control our federal elections and nullify hundreds of established election laws. Extremist Republicans are willing to go to whatever lengths to win elections and reclaim power, even if it means rewriting the rules of our democracy. body:
counting on you
| | |
---
My race here in Florida is Democrats' best opportunity to expand our Senate majority and build back better, which makes this incredible news: **Polling****shows me within just 2 points of Marco****Rubio, and CNN analysts think Democrats have a REAL shot at flipping this seat blue!**
**But here's the bad news: **The GOP is starting to stack the cards against me. The Republican National Committee chair is attacking me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump tens of MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me. The Republican establishment is _panicking_ about my chances of winning, which is why this is shaping up to be the most expensive Senate race _ever_.
**That's why every single fundraising goal is critical to keeping my campaign on track to fight back against GOP attacks and win.**** But with time running out, I don't have enough grassroots support to reach my midnight fundraising goal tonight, so I'm counting on YOU to become a member of this team:**

There is nothing more important to me than raising our next generation of Kansans. As a father myself, I can say without any doubt that my role as a parent is the most important role I’ve ever had, and ever will have. If you’re a parent, I’m sure you’ll agree with me.| | |

| | Friend,**

** There is nothing more important to me than raising our next generation of Kansans. As a father myself, I can say without any doubt that my role as a parent is the most important role I’ve ever had, and ever will have. If you’re a parent, I’m sure you’ll agree with me. You’ll also agree that parents need to be front and center... And in control of the upbringing of their own children. **Does Laura Kelly agree with us? She sure hasn’t acted like it! ** She’s walked in lock-step with President Biden’s radical agenda, and it’s harming our kids. That's why I joined Fox News’ _Hannity_ to set the record straight. As a father myself, I can say without any doubt that my role as a parent is the most important role I’ve ever had, and ever will have. If you’re a parent, I’m sure you’ll agree with me.| | | | | Friend, There is nothing more important to me than raising our next generation of Kansans. As a father myself, I can say without any doubt that my role as a parent is the most important role I’ve ever had, and ever will have. If you’re a parent, I’m sure you’ll agree with me. You’ll also agree that parents need to be front and center... And in control of the upbringing of their own children. Does Laura Kelly agree with us? She sure hasn’t acted like it! She’s walked in lock-step with President Biden’s radical agenda, and it’s harming our kids. That's why I joined Fox News’ Hannity to set the record straight. You can watch my interview below, and while you’re there... | | Here’s the truth... When Kansans tried to pass a Parents Bill of Rights, to make sure parents know what’s going on in the classroom... Laura Kelly vetoed it. When Kansans tried to pass a Fairness in Women’s Sports bill, to keep biological males from competing against girls & denying them the chance at victories and even scholarship opportunities... Laura Kelly vetoed it – TWICE. We can do so much better, and by firing Laura Kelly from the governor’s office... We can turn Kansas around and do what we all know we need to do: Put parents and common sense first for our kids. – Derek Schmidt | | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. clean_body: This is what we’re considering because of our gap. | | | We'll lay our cards on the table, Peter. Our fundraising is way behind where it needs to be for this quarter, which ends in a few short weeks. That leaves us with these options: 1. Pull back on our organizing efforts, canceling some events in these final weeks of the election. 2. Have Odessa make more calls for donations, which means less time out in the community. 3. Reach out to you, our supporters, to ask if you can make up the gap — which we're doing right now. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you for your support, we're glad to have you on this team! In solidarity, Team Odessa | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

name: Evan, =?utf-8?b?Q2hhcmxpZeKAmXM=?= finance director
subject: The truth about our fundraising
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50239288/365115524/-472610390?amount=25&refcode=20220904_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzE2NTYyNi05MzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JSRupAn0H6uG_N_w9jg_8gl4nxRT8iB7mpI--Gvaq6I=)

I'll come right out and say it, folks: it's much easier for DeSantis to raise money than it is for us.

Since 2018, DeSantis has been working hard to let the millionaires and billionaires know that he’s on their side. Now they’re paying him back with HUGE campaign donations.

Honestly, folks, that doesn’t make my job easy. **We're running a grassroots campaign, and while it's inspiring to see time after time that our supporters have our back, it's not fun to have to keep asking for donations.**

The truth is, we've been able to keep up so far. But this is the first full month of the General Election so DeSantis's big donors are going to start POURING cash into his campaign.

We set a 48 hour fundraising deadline because it's going to take a big push to catch up to DeSantis’s big donors. Unfortunately, our email fundraising hasn’t picked up to match the pace of the General Election. If you're able, can you [**_chip in now_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50239289/365115525/-472610390?amount=25&refcode=20220904_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzE2NTYyNi05MzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JSRupAn0H6uG_N_w9jg_8gl4nxRT8iB7mpI--Gvaq6I=) to help us pick up the pace?
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Peter, When you look at political campaigns today, you’ll see candidates bashing each other in every way possible.

_And sometimes, you’ll even see them bashing America._

**But what too many have forgotten is that NONE of us would be here if it weren’t for the blessing of being Americans.**

I would’ve have served our country in the Navy for so many years if I didn’t love America, and I know you do too.

[**Please, join me today to build a movement of patriots who are PROUD to be a part of the American spirit.**](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=1c0644add5a543ae886b3ac82030cf11&_e=fWygrnDIC8iMnV49OklTQVtBH3JdV95Y047yoDbznYWsDymsYslBv0lEzY9ic_GM9xgf_Th2MsF8mj4ZJXHe_bEiu3LSaFCnFHPR0wG18AkafpZjZuVAxxmRp6uEOnVOjClEQEycc0urfcRdsp-YnUzZfP7FeowXECqqk7lmqAdNps628JaBcEMEiYth1Uy6R3xaokZRVUfPFv-6MDndlrXzXz3XYKwhvxEaEnXML-Y4WSJGRKf0AGo0Xr04tUBAVsk8HRTpuYWv8WBIPOdm1FvTwIZYTtAYy8Tbc8uq55OGA5w6bbrL11vUkNLpS0AsXHehsxKvd3saRVzaGVaDqlYE3syNRJUHaeAUh_GBgf9cMPWPMUK6G-J9rm9N7HpX)

Ronald Regan said it best, Peter: we can see further because we stand on the shoulders of those who came before us.

America’s founders were titans, and none of us would be here today if it wasn’t for them.

I know it’s “trendy” to hate on America, but I will _never_ slander the great name of our country, and I know you won’t either.

clean_body: | | | Peter, When you look at political campaigns today, you’ll see candidates bashing each other in every way possible. And sometimes, you’ll even see them bashing America. But what too many have forgotten is that NONE of us would be here if it weren’t for the blessing of being Americans. I would’ve have served our country in the Navy for so many years if I didn’t love America, and I know you do too. Ronald Regan said it best, Peter: we can see further because we stand on the shoulders of those who came before us. America’s founders were titans, and none of us would be here today if it wasn’t for them. I know it’s “trendy” to hate on America, but I will never slander the great name of our country, and I know you won’t either. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special OperationsCandidate, U.S. House (VA-10) | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. I am planning on giving some money to the 1776 Project. I think a lot of other people should as well because, without an enormous amount of resources, they are flipping school boards all over the country." **_**\- Ben Shapiro**

name: Stacey Abrams HQ
subject: re: Brian Kemp’s attack ads
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Hi Derek,

Brian Kemp has launched a campaign against us built on lies about Stacey’s
economic record and plans — after he harmed Georgia’s economy with his
extreme and reckless decision-making. He launched million-dollar attack
ads to spread his hypocritical claims, and it’s clear that Brian Kemp and
his team are not seeking a fair fight.

So we’ll get straight to the point: We need your support to push back
against these false claims.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1992?refcode=sa_em_220904_B2_BrianKempLies_S1_T1_HQ_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=4232%2E1862389%2EjV0JCS ]Can you rush your
first
$5 contribution to make sure our team can correct the
record on Kemp’s lies before they sink in with voters? Any amount you can
give helps power our campaign for One Georgia in the final weeks of our
campaign.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1992?refcode=sa_em_220904_B2_BrianKempLies_S1_T1_HQ_30open&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=4232%2E1862389%2EjV0JCS ]DONATE

As Brian Kemp’s attack ads against Stacey ramp up, it’s critical that our
team has the resources to get ahead and correct the record. It’s clear —
this extremist governor will stop at nothing to try and win this election.

But we can’t let Brian Kemp and his smear campaign slow us
down, Derek.

We need to train volunteers, invest in ads on every platform, mobilize
voters and more every single day between now and November.

Our plan to win in less than 10 weeks relies on all of us. Stacey is
fighting for everyone across the state of Georgia — from Dade to Camden
County. And her vision includes everyone Brian Kemp has left behind. But,
we need grassroots
supporters like you
to help us ensure that Brian Kemp does not bury us in attack ads in these
final weeks before Election Day.

name: R. Warnock
subject: what our movement is about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I know that in a neck-and-neck race like this one, it's easy to focus solely on things like the latest polling numbers or the day's fundraising goal. **So I want to quickly explain exactly what __ we're fighting for _ _ – and _why_ winning here in Georgia matters so much.**
Our movement is about building a better, brighter future for _all_. It's about ensuring that everyone has an equal voice in our government – and a fair shot at the American dream.
That means defending and expanding our constitutional right to vote. It means protecting reproductive freedom nationwide. It means making health care more affordable, bringing economic justice to our communities, and lowering the everyday costs that make it difficult for too many families to make ends meet.
**Friend, our movement is about _you_ – your priorities, your concerns, your hopes for the future. That's why it's so important to have you by my side for the critical fights ahead – fights we can only win if we win this election first.**
You see, polls show me 1 point behind my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker – who seems to care more about courting favor from Donald Trump than he does about addressing the issues that matter to Georgians. But GOP donors are pouring over $20 MILLION into his campaign to defeat me, and I can't fight back without your help.
**This campaign is fueled _entirely_ by grassroots support, without a cent from corporate PACs. So today, I'm personally asking for your help to power our movement to victory: [Will you chip in $5 now – or however much you can spare – to help me win in Georgia, defend our Democratic Senate majority, and continue fighting for progress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50225693/365093721/-1789705490?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3915-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjEwYzNiNy03MzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bcsLUFnWjxFx-YzrnYdTl0sYziG78qEjYSWwR_Qc6kc=)**
It's an honor to fight for you and beside you. Thank you so much for being part of this movement.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50225698/365093724/-1789705490?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3915-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjEwYzNiNy03MzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bcsLUFnWjxFx-YzrnYdTl0sYziG78qEjYSWwR_Qc6kc=)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=69cbe1d80e6446e2b3fdd25cf3a4c028&_e=sK3OseefeYx8Mf2XMr0RTEQymrLdUYSKUeYgTLp4tRmdqwoe55_S3vVYBnZDEF4hppTwu00WzXQ5Fxa4iI8JerX9__wquIZsptD2SDxXKdRzRbFjQti-k7x3psY9vRagNAeGh_DreYauOvJXSqPLRaieKcHDIDWV4DzA_H1NniFOJ3lUt3GrdkJnsx--_ndSI_K-vS487i1ufLGNhXTUj3GVRlLFj6V0uGlPavMJJ6BFxsKfXFcpA4xmxaLg_ljuBPTFSbRuQVMWjmFvbApbenmP-NOvOTGQ9yDi5o6OqLSIIfuA6d18PUxAfvAMub4MHQKEuKDPRf9_Xz-SS76egJdsGoMwIZsk7Y0Q1Ydfl2itFRfk4HDt0nUOH1p9mZHbZsBFXuqLUi9XmsaDAzOdjQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
