name: Matt Brown
subject: A great read for your long weekend
body:
| | | I hope you’re enjoying the start of the long weekend, Friend! If you’re looking for a good read, yesterday [_The Nation_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0t6Ke6oybIu7rip7-lZ0ciz6H3VQOgGL1vvZa7SuSn7HdWwsiuCbd9URrVA0zEfJXM8isQ6gkLl6u3kxHfxrUeSNgR35BkMoA8e5UnNvPcUIdVQt6cAh3ZCplKGJWJVvyS0ZesEdc0D3dOLWkql9xaVXCI5BbZdTIRqUOfVbd79K55YGc6sU3Wedolgq9qJclZjggb0viDtLl9MYtPNvPaIa-k28QdB0TWzlUN33wnVvkYsWePW5dNgQeD0xeYPuNOjfN-40zFMhIcBFUzX1RNUmO4qNVzcDpJzoKb64Dcyqplq_8SUcJsC4ZyrTSKkJNkUs-Skh_PCs1SJK5Bn3l8g/3p6/yTxseoBCT_2ZEmf5J5T_CQ/h0/YsOvc5bdH9Z2pa3ihqKTnfOXX_54ypEbxnLMVuQXwyE) published a fantastic article on my and Cynthia’s campaign and the slate of candidates we’re running alongside. I’ve pulled out a few quotes down below, but I’d highly encourage you to give the full piece a read when you get a moment. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0t6Ke6oybIu7rip7-lZ0ciz6H3VQOgGL1vvZa7SuSn7HdWwsiuCbd9URrVA0zEfJXM8isQ6gkLl6u3kxHfxrUeSNgR35BkMoA8e5UnNvPcUID3Rg-krb0Y52-l3V_Hu0sKCSJB-OVvo5-vC14KfM_PIxA1GXFFWd-Pn0OiMtcKJ0tSaUekNFkdFQ6M79sWJQzxQ3JE2k7vxUpweAA2KfOkgnJiPHK-qeemWzTA0aBr0fzDHt8IjDWbVE1TDhhMBZn1j06YWQJE03zGs0udGcN4zZwgkdhL1s_BTm8pKzdJwVo8XCHA5fgj-vllMOK-JKE75DAd62w2M5MbL3aLR76Ok/3p6/yTxseoBCT_2ZEmf5J5T_CQ/h1/4u-1Ph-_f8685EVmfc2whyN8-SW26ET1N2ikm8-Gmvg) “**One of the most remarkable political initiatives in modern American politics — and already one of the most successful** — the Co-op is addressing the great challenge of an electoral movement in which divide-and-conquer campaigning, viscerally negative television advertising funded by corporations and billionaires, and fake news stories about dubious wedge issues have left voters feeling disconnected from politics,” says Nichols. “This grassroots group in the nation’s smallest state is restoring a sense of community to elections by making a commitment that no candidate will stand alone in the fight against the most powerful political and economic interests in the state and nation,” he continues. “**It promises to make Rhode Island the kind of ‘laboratory of democracy’** that US Supreme Court Justice Louis Brandeis suggested 90 years ago would position states as the generators of big ideas for how to solve national problems.” With just 9 more days to go before the election, we’re working to share this message as widely as possible. **Would you forward this article along to any friends or family who might be interested?** Thanks, Matt

---

But my opponent has made clear she will reverse the progress we have made strengthening our public schools and rebuilding our roads and bridges, vowed to enforce Michigan’s dangerous 1931 abortion ban, and has spread dangerous conspiracy theories undermining our democracy.

We can’t allow my opponent to take our state backward. The future of our state is at stake, and I’m going to give it all I have to win this tough fight.

body:
Me and Mandela and Cheri and Val and Tim
#
Hi Peter, it’s John.
Today I’m reaching out with a *very* special message (and no, it’s not about Sheetz or Wawa or my dogs).
Instead, it’s about me + my friends. 🥰
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50240437/365120712/1495673160?refcode=pm_em_220904_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTgzNjVlYi05YzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nk9anIIeSib1JxM2B1uvcccDI0FRUZeFCd5ZxurikrE=)
**Mandela Barnes in Wisconsin, Cheri Beasley in North Carolina, Val Demings in Florida, Tim Ryan in Ohio, and I are all Democratic nominees for U.S. Senate — and we urgently need your help, Peter.**
Together, we’re the FIVE most critical seats to flip in November.
Together, we’re...
THE FLIPPABLE FIVE!!!!! 🤩🤩🤩
**Today we’re OFFICIALLY launching The Flippable Five Fund to help me, Mandela, Cheri, Val and Tim compete in a BIG way.**
**[Will you be one of my first supporters to donate $5 to the Flippable Five Fund? Every dollar in The Flippable Five Fund is split directly between our campaigns and Dick Durbin’s, and has a direct + immediate impact on winning these five critical Senate Seats in November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50240438/365120713/1495673160?refcode=pm_em_220904_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTgzNjVlYi05YzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nk9anIIeSib1JxM2B1uvcccDI0FRUZeFCd5ZxurikrE=)**
There is *so* much at stake here for me, Mandela, Cheri, Val, and Tim.
All 5 of us are running in states on CNN’s Most Likely to Flip list.
All 5 of us face an endless onslaught of MAGA Money.
**And all 5 of us are challenging 5 of the absolute wooooooorst Republicans opponents out there.**
**[Peter, can The Flippable Five and Dick Durbin count on your support today? Please make a donation of $5 or another amount to our brand-new Flippable Five Fund today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50240439/365120714/1495673160?refcode=pm_em_220904_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTgzNjVlYi05YzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nk9anIIeSib1JxM2B1uvcccDI0FRUZeFCd5ZxurikrE=)**
Thanks for everything 🙏
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of PA

I'll be blunt

|

* Fox News said my race will be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history.
* My opponent outraised me FIVE QUARTERS in a row.
* My opponent's last financial report showed she raised more in just one month than I did in THREE months.
* My opponent got ads up on TV a full MONTH before I was able to get TV ads on air.
* Two polls show her ads are working and we're TIED.

clean_body: I'll be blunt | | | | I'll be blunt, Friend. My biggest deadline of the year is here, and if we don't raise enough to meet my Extended August End of Month Goal by midnight, you can say goodbye to Trump's legacy. Here are the facts: Fox News said my race will be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history. My opponent outraised me FIVE QUARTERS in a row. My opponent's last financial report showed she raised more in just one month than I did in THREE months. My opponent got ads up on TV a full MONTH before I was able to get TV ads on air. Two polls show her ads are working and we're TIED. I need you to listen to me, Friend. If Democrats expand their total control of the Senate, we can kiss Trump 's legacy goodbye! "Please rush in $18 to the most high stakes Senate race before midnight >>" | | | "<< RUSH IN $18 >>" | | | "<< RUSH IN $35 >>" | | | "<< RUSH IN $75 >>" | | | "<< RUSH IN $125 >>" | | | "<< RUSH IN $250 >>" On top of all this, my opponent is building on the momentum she's seeing from winning her Democrat Primary! We need to be able to put forward a fundraising number that shows conservatives are standing strong to restore America. I need your support right now if we want to take back the Senate. Will you help me before midnight, Friend? | | | "DONATE NOW >>>" | | | | | "First, Democrats gained more momentum than ever after Roe v. Wade, raising a record-shattering $80M. Then, Nancy Pelosi launched a major nationwide fundraising operation to defeat Marco Rubio. Now, Marco's falling millions of dollars behind Nancy Pelosi." This is no joke. My opponent already votes with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time, and now that they are actively campaigning together, I'm starting to get nervous. I'm starting to get nervous because I am one of the most vulnerable Republicans up for re-election this November and Pelosi knows that if the Dems defeat me, they will have full access to pass their liberal agenda. The Filibuster will be abolished. Speech will be censored. And conservatives will be silenced. | | "Help Marco Defeat Pelosi" What you decide to do in the next 30 seconds could very well change the course of American history. If I lose, it will be a nightmare for conservative values. "So please, can you chip in $5 to help me fight back against Pelosi, the entire Democrat establishment, and their new MASSIVE warchest of cash?" | Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate PO Box 530650 Miami, FL 33153 Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: An important question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
your input will help Alex’s work in the Senate AND it will help us run a stronger campaign to ensure he stays there after Election Day.
#

Hey team,
With just about two month left until November, our team is getting ready for the final push until Election Day.
But before we begin that final sprint, we have an important question for you:
[**Can you please take our short survey and let us know what you think are the top issues facing California and our country?**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/September-Issue-Survey-2022-em/?source=em220905-1-30&refcode2=974.159979.PLaxrZ&akid=974%2E159979%2EPLaxrZ)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/September-Issue-Survey-2022-em/?source=em220905-1-30&refcode2=974.159979.PLaxrZ&akid=974%2E159979%2EPLaxrZ)**
We know you might be tired of hearing it from us, but even if you’ve taken our survey before, we hope you’ll do it once again today. This helps us track changes over time and know which issues are becoming more important to folks like you.
Seriously – your input will help Alex’s work in the Senate AND it will help us run a stronger campaign to ensure he stays there after Election Day.
**So please, use this link to fill out our short issues survey. It’ll only take a minute of your time and it would be a big help.**
[**https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/September-Survey**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/September-Issue-Survey-2022-em/?source=em220905-1-30&refcode2=974.159979.PLaxrZ&akid=974%2E159979%2EPLaxrZ)
Thank you in advance, and have a great rest of your weekend!
\- Team Padilla
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/September-Issue-Survey-2022-em/?source=em220905-1-30&refcode2=974.159979.PLaxrZ&akid=974%2E159979%2EPLaxrZ)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nick=20De=20Gregorio?=
subject: My friend, Dr. Doug Holden
body:
Time to turn Bergen County red. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nickfornj/join-me-in-turning-bergen-county-red-16538774?e=31104c58a7)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friends and Supporters,

Happy September! With the summer coming to a close, the fall promises to bring a hotly contested campaign season in our state. _Now_ is the time to shape our communities for our children and grandchildren.

My friend, **Dr. Doug Holden,** is running for Bergen County Commissioner. An Army surgeon who served honorably in Iraq, Doug now manages his own orthopedic surgery practice and has become an integral part of our community.

I am honored to be hosting a fundraiser for Doug next Thursday evening, September 8th. I hope you will consider attending. Our county is broken, and we need people of integrity, like Doug, to fix it.

Please see below!

\- Nick
---

name: Matt Whitaker
subject: 50 FOIAs for the FBI
body:
| | | Peter, Former President Trump is going on the offensive and appears to be launching a full-scale fight against the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). We here at the America First Policy Institute are joining the fight. I'm sure you already know the backstory: The FBI recently raided former President Trump's home in what could be politically-motivated. This ordeal should paint a clear picture for us: The deep state is real, and we can't afford to sit around playing defense while the FBI raids a former President's home. **_We MUST go on the offensive._** [**And that 's exactly what I plan to do. Will you help me?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61187970:6fia9GVNq:m:1:3334294963:9F77073B0AC3E749CF95DE4DDBECD262:r) _Our country is at risk of crumbling into a banana republic run by the most radical leftists in America and an invulnerable deep state. WE HAVE NO CHOICE BUT TO FIGHT BACK!_ When the news broke, our entire team sprung into action to respond. Within 48 hours, we filed more than 50 Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the Biden Administration and find out who knew what and when. But I assure you, the Department of Justice (DOJ) is not going to hand over information easily, and we may have to battle with the DOJ for months or even YEARS to uncover the truth fully. **We CANNOT sustain our efforts without you ... ** **[Will you chip in before it's to help ensure our efforts can continue?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61187970:6fia9GVNq:m:1:3334294963:9F77073B0AC3E749CF95DE4DDBECD262:r)**[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61187970:6fia9GVNq:m:1:3334294963:9F77073B0AC3E749CF95DE4DDBECD262:r) Let me back up. My name is Matt Whitaker... I was appointed acting United States Attorney General under former President Trump. In that role, I protected Law and Order both at home and abroad. Today I am Co-Chair of the Center for Law & Justice at the America First Policy Institute, where we strive to protect and preserve the rule of law in this great Nation. Together, we will fight back against the radical Left and end its unjust weaponization of the FBI. The team at America First Policy Institute is the best in the Nation, and we're ready to make a HUGE difference for our country--ESPECIALLY when it comes to uncovering the truth regarding the FBI raid. [**I hope you 'll consider sending in a donation of $25, $35, or $50 today. ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61187970:6fia9GVNq:m:1:3334294963:9F77073B0AC3E749CF95DE4DDBECD262:r) Sincerely, Matt Whitaker Co-Chair, Center for Law & Justice America First Policy Institute P.S. We've seen it time and time again. Castro's Cuba. Stalin's Russia. Nazi Germany. Mao's China. Great nations fall to tyranny when governments weaponize law enforcement against patriots and political opponents. [**I 'll fight with every breath to make sure that America doesn't have the same fate. Will you? ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61187970:6fia9GVNq:m:1:3334294963:9F77073B0AC3E749CF95DE4DDBECD262:r)
---
[**DONATE NOW!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61187970:6fia9GVNq:m:1:3334294963:9F77073B0AC3E749CF95DE4DDBECD262:r)
---

name: John Fetterman
subject: Donald Trump said I wear “dirty sweatsuits”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
You really can’t make this sh*t up.
#
Derek,
**We just heard more and more lies from Donald Trump + Dr. Oz at their rally in Wilkes-Barre last night.**
I mean, Trump literally called me a "raging lunatic" and said I would "bring death and destruction" to PA.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220903-2?refcode=em20220904-7130&refcode2=7130_434096_IkCH51&akid=7130%2E434096%2EIkCH51)
**[Can you please rush a donation to my campaign ASAP so we’ll have the resources to defeat these two desperate + sad dudes?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220903-2?refcode=em20220904-7130&refcode2=7130_434096_IkCH51&akid=7130%2E434096%2EIkCH51)**

Derek, the “raging lunatic” comment was just one thing Donald Trump said about yours truly at the big MAGA rally in PA for Dr. Oz tonight.
He even said I wear “dirty sweatsuits.”
Yeahhh... Ok.
You really can’t make this sh*t up, Derek. But I know yinz have my back. 🥰
**[Will you please rush a donation of any amount right now? Last night’s rally made it clear that Trump is ready to do whatever it takes to support Dr. Oz + defeat our grassroots movement and we need to be prepared for whatever comes next.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220903-2?refcode=em20220904-7130&refcode2=7130_434096_IkCH51&akid=7130%2E434096%2EIkCH51)**

Thank you for standing with me when it matters most.
– John ❤️

You really can’t make this sht up, Derek. But I know yinz have my back. 🥰 Thank you for standing with me when it matters most. – John ❤️ | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The story of the Blacklist
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, here’s the
story...

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez defeated the 4th most powerful Democrat in the
House. Corporate Democrats were reeling from their defeat.

The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) was scrambling so
much to stop progressives that it created a blacklist. The DCCC
blacklisted any vendors, staffers, and organizations that supported
primary challengers to Democratic incumbents.

The DCCC was trying to block working-class progressives like AOC from a
slew of critical campaign resources all while Democrats continued using
corporate firms that bust unions, lobby for the GOP, work with Big Oil,
and push right-wing foreign policy plans.

It’s not right,
Peter. The DCCC rightly ended the
blacklist after it became a PR nightmare, but they still employ corporate
firms working to stop progress.

We’re calling for the Democratic Party to stop using these corporate
consultants working against the interests of the people. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/113947?refcode=em20220904-25003&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=25003%2E1203867%2Et9msjV ]In order to
change the Democratic Party and elect more Justice Democrats, we need the
help of our grassroots supporters. Can you chip in $3 to
help us change the political status quo and elect more Justice Democrats?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/113947?refcode=em20220904-25003&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=25003%2E1203867%2Et9msjV ]Contribute $3

We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs. And we don’t employ firms
associated with union busting, Big Pharma, or the GOP. Meanwhile,
corporate Democrats take money from Wall Street, Big Oil, Big Pharma,
payday loan companies, and union-busters. AND the Democratic Party has
routinely hired firms that protect the interests of banks, pharmaceutical
companies, and fossil fuel executives.

It’s clear: Justice Democrats will fight for the people, the Democratic
establishment will work for their corporate donors.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/113947?refcode=em20220904-25003&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=25003%2E1203867%2Et9msjV ]Peter,
will you donate today to help us win our
primaries against the Democratic establishment and its Wall Street-backed
candidates? Together, we can overcome the odds and grow the Squad in
Congress.

Thank you for all that you do to support our work and our primary
candidates.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220904-25003-footer&t=1023&refcode2=25003_1203867_t9msjV&akid=25003%2E1203867%2Et9msjV

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. name: John Fetterman
subject: How Dr. Oz is spending this summer
disclaimer_text: paid for by the people, and we’d never have it any other way
body:
Hint: it's not in Pennsylvania
| | |
---
Hi friend, it’s John Fetterman.
I hope you’ve been having a safe + fun summer with your friends + loved ones.
Though our summer is costing a *lot* more than it did last year, the Fetterman Fam is having a great summer right here in Braddock, PA. 😎
Dr. Oz, on the other hand, can’t say the same. I mean, he spent the 4th of July partying it up at a gala in New York, surrounded by celebrities like Ryan Seacrest and Kendall Jenner.
I dare this dude to stay in Pennsylvania for like, one day. 🙄
It’s an icky reminder that ultra-rich GOP Dr. Oz doesn't even have to worry about raising money for his campaign. He’s already self-funding his campaign, plus he has essentially unlimited access to other celebrities + millionaires.
Meanwhile, all summer long, we see a massive slowdown in online fundraising, since our donors (aka real people like you, friend) are rightfully spending time outside in the sun with loved ones.
Don’t get me wrong. Our campaign is PROUDLY bought + paid for by the people, and we’d never have it any other way.
**But with the stakes this high, I can’t afford to fall behind Dr. Oz in PA. **
**[Can you please make a $5 donation, split between me + Jacky Rosen, to help make up for the summer fundraising slowdown? Every single dollar helps Democrats like us win in November during a difficult time like this.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50240898/365122609/-238718192?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1998-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGYzMDU5ZC1hNDJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x85EHFdsS-B4-TdlV-0sBRqp5HuDvo_4MV24egMtZ8I=)**

John

John Fetterman

clean_body: Hint: it's not in Pennsylvania | | | Hi friend, it’s John Fetterman. I hope you’ve been having a safe + fun summer with your friends + loved ones. Though our summer is costing a lot more than it did last year, the Fetterman Fam is having a great summer right here in Braddock, PA. 😎 Dr. Oz, on the other hand, can’t say the same. I mean, he spent the 4th of July partying it up at a gala in New York, surrounded by celebrities like Ryan Seacrest and Kendall Jenner. I dare this dude to stay in Pennsylvania for like, one day. 🙄 It’s an icky reminder that ultra-rich GOP Dr. Oz doesn't even have to worry about raising money for his campaign. He’s already self-funding his campaign, plus he has essentially unlimited access to other celebrities + millionaires. Meanwhile, all summer long, we see a massive slowdown in online fundraising, since our donors (aka real people like you, friend) are rightfully spending time outside in the sun with loved ones. Don’t get me wrong. Our campaign is PROUDLY bought + paid for by the people, and we’d never have it any other way. But with the stakes this high, I can’t afford to fall behind Dr. Oz in PA. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between John Fetterman and Jacky Rosen: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Doc Hollywood can have his star-studded parties and weekends in the Hamptons. My priorities just look a little different. 😁 Thanks for your help, John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania P.S. With so much on the line, every single day matters when it comes to our fundraising + organizing work. name: Murray Campaign
subject: Smiley: “permanently extend” Trump tax cuts for wealthy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#
**Tiffany Smiley:** “I look forward to ensuring that we permanently extend the 2017 tax cuts...”
Peter,
Republican Tiffany Smiley has been trying to hide her extreme views from Washington state voters. But here’s one position she’s apparently proud of: extending tax breaks for the wealthiest 5%.
**[We can’t let the GOP take back the Senate and push forward their agenda that leaves behind working families. Pitch in $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50241176/365123742/332603123?refcode=pm_em_220904_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWM0YTY0Zi1hNTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=26NiKHmk4Lu31oD54SWOm-fVheNjwPo1pZcPjxc1WeM=)**
In 2017, then-President Trump and the GOP Senate rewarded the richest Americans with tax cuts, gave away billions of dollars to corporations, and increased the federal debt by $2.3 trillion.
And now, one of Smiley’s priorities is to go to the Senate and work on making all of this permanent.
It’s clear that if elected, Smiley would stand alongside Mitch McConnell pushing policies that benefit corporations and the wealthy few at the expense of working families in Washington state.
We deserve a leader on our side — not one focused on helping those already at the very top. That’s why it’s so important that we defend this seat and reelect Patty Murray this November.
**[Contribute $5 or whatever you can now to defeat the GOP and keep the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50241177/365123744/332603123?refcode=pm_em_220904_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWM0YTY0Zi1hNTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=26NiKHmk4Lu31oD54SWOm-fVheNjwPo1pZcPjxc1WeM=)**
Thank you,
Team Patty

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republican delaying tactics could give them 5-7 additional House seats, just because they ran out the clock on redistricting and refused to follow the law. Every bit of support matters as the DCCC fights to keep congressional representation for voters like you.
body:
Urgent: 5-7 House seats are on the line
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, The Republicans are trying to steal their way to a House majority. _I know this won't surprise you, that the party of coups, corruption and stealing classified documents has ignored crystal-clear court rulings to try to steal House seats. It isn't like they haven't obscenely gerrymandered in the past. This is how they built their majority in 2010, after all. _ [**Can you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) so that we can ensure we hold the House--even increase our majority--and can stop them from stealing their way to a House majority this time, or ever again?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0e1294a0-3048-4d96-ae23-1b8e5acaf599/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) But now, as authoritarians do, they've purposely run out the clock to ignore our courts until we pass dates when district lines must be set. Our Supreme Court, when it's bothered to say anything, said it's "too close to an election" to make them change district lines, rewarding their delaying tactics of ignoring clear rulings REQUIRING THEM TO DRAW ADDITIONAL BLACK MAJORITY DISTRICTS. Yet another betrayal by our insane, illegitimate, right-wing Supreme Court, and an incredibly dangerous precedent for our democracy. **In a piece in The Huffington Post, it's clear that these tactics could give Republicans 5-7 additional House seats, just because they refused to follow the law.** In Alabama, Louisiana and Georgia, the Black populations are 27%, 33% & 33% respectively, so based on The Voting Rights Act, our Constitution and, well, math, a quarter to a third of the districts in these states must be majority Black. Yet, Republican state legislators who obviously hate democracy have gerrymandered to only allow one majority Black district in each state, and now the Supreme Court has allowed them to get away with it.
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: DEMOCRATIC CONGRESSIONAL CAMPAIGN COMMITTEE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T884bc6cb-3aa8-417a-b1ab-84b46c95d8f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **In my home state of Ohio, something similar was done, after the Ohio Supreme Court found several GOP maps to not be representative of the 47% average Democrats receive in statewide votes here, and in violation of a constitutional amendment we overwhelmingly passed in 2018 requiring fair districts.** Republicans have again and again used delay tactics to get close enough to the election so they don't have to make the changes demanded by Ohio's Supreme Court so Democrats are looking at a likelihood of ending up with 5-6 seats, instead of the 9 that we should. We obviously can't let them get away with this. When they start using delay tactics to blatantly ignore our courts, what do our laws even mean anymore? So, look, on the bright side we've seen incredible results in Kansas rejecting an effort to ban abortion, and in New York and Alaska where Democrats won Republican seats. We're fired up! We need to take this energy and destroy them in November--to win so many damn Republican seats they can't take the House, and along with a Senate that ends the filibuster we pass federal legislation that'll never allow them to pull this crap again. [**Can you join me in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) so that we can ensure we hold the House--even increase our majority--and can stop them from stealing their way to a House majority this time, or ever again?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e2ee720-1433-4847-b487-e13ee07919f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for supporting Blue Amp Action's efforts to protect our democracy. And please enjoy the rest of your Labor Day Weekend._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: DON’T LET THEM STEAL CONGRESS](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17902fc3-a9d1-40bf-afc8-b2f906cea346/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Chief Demings (Personal)
subject: This race won't be easy – but not much in my life has been.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
We can't stop now
| | |
---
Wow, friend.
I just looked at our fundraising results for this month, and I'm just so humbled by and grateful for what I'm seeing: thousands of grassroots supporters donating to this people-powered movement.
We're off to a great start, but we aren't quite out of the woods yet. I just refreshed ActBlue, and we're still $8,213 short of what we forecast to raise by midnight tonight. I'm worried because pundits say my greatest obstacle to winning in Florida is likely to be a lack of funding.
If I can be candid, friend, I don't like asking you for money like this, but this is what it takes. I don't like that we're up against Marco Rubio, who's waiting to shell out millions of dollars, or that the full force of the GOP and its dark-money allies are at his back to spend more.

But do you know what I dislike even _more?_ That Marco Rubio's career in the Senate has _failed_ Floridians. It's a career marked by efforts to take away affordable health care, strip reproductive freedoms, undermine voting rights and worse.
_It's time for a change._ But I can't win without hitting these fundraising goals – and I can't hit these fundraising goals without _you. _Friend, if everybody reading this email donated just $5, we'd hit these goals within minutes.
I only have a couple hours left until midnight. The best link to donate to help me hit my goal, defeat Marco Rubio and win in Florida is right here: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email-september**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50238065/365106847/-1315874399?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4248-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODUyOWRjOC04MzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oV0IpLrN5d3kiH8KuRViac8OrtifHCGDEFflEJS9C74=)
This race won't be easy – but not much in my life has been. I've never tired, and I can’t afford to be tired now. Let's win this.
I'm so grateful for your support,

Congresswoman Val Demings

I just looked at our fundraising results for this month, and I'm just so humbled by and grateful for what I'm seeing: thousands of grassroots supporters donating to this people-powered movement. We're off to a great start, but we aren't quite out of the woods yet. I just refreshed ActBlue, and we're still $8,213 short of what we forecast to raise by midnight tonight. I'm worried because pundits say my greatest obstacle to winning in Florida is likely to be a lack of funding. If I can be candid, friend, I don't like asking you for money like this, but this is what it takes. I don't like that we're up against Marco Rubio, who's waiting to shell out millions of dollars, or that the full force of the GOP and its dark-money allies are at his back to spend more. But do you know what I dislike even more? That Marco Rubio's career in the Senate has failed Floridians. It's a career marked by efforts to take away affordable health care, strip reproductive freedoms, undermine voting rights and worse. It's time for a change. But I can't win without hitting these fundraising goals – and I can't hit these fundraising goals without you. Friend, if everybody reading this email donated just $5, we'd hit these goals within minutes. I only have a couple hours left until midnight. clean_body: | | | | I'll be blunt, Friend. My biggest deadline of the year is here, and if we don't raise enough to meet my Extended August End of Month Goal by midnight, you can say goodbye to Trump's legacy. Here are the facts: Fox News said my race will be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history. My opponent outraised me FIVE QUARTERS in a row. My opponent's last financial report showed she raised more in just one month than I did in THREE months. My opponent got ads up on TV a full MONTH before I was able to get TV ads on air. Two polls show her ads are working and we're TIED. I need you to listen to me, Friend. If Democrats expand their total control of the Senate, we can kiss Trump 's legacy goodbye! "Please rush in $18 to the most high stakes Senate race before midnight>>" | | | "<< RUSH IN $18>>" | | | "<< RUSH IN $35>>" | | | "<< RUSH IN $75>>" | | | "<< RUSH IN $125>>" | | | "<< RUSH IN $250>>" On top of all this, my opponent is building on the momentum she's seeing from winning her Democrat Primary! We need to be able to put forward a fundraising number that shows conservatives are standing strong to restore America. I need your support right now if we want to take back the Senate. Will you help me before midnight, Friend? | | | "DONATE NOW>>>" | | | | | "First, Democrats gained more momentum than ever after Roe v. Wade, raising a record-shattering $80M. Then, Nancy Pelosi launched a major nationwide fundraising operation to defeat Marco Rubio. Now, Marco's falling millions of dollars behind Nancy Pelosi." This is no joke. My opponent already votes with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time, and now that they are actively campaigning together, I'm starting to get nervous. I'm starting to get nervous because I am one of the most vulnerable Republicans up for re-election this November and Pelosi knows that if the Dems defeat me, they will have full access to pass their liberal agenda. The Filibuster will be abolished. Speech will be censored. And conservatives will be silenced. | | "Help Marco Defeat Pelosi" What you decide to do in the next 30 seconds could very well change the course of American history. If I lose, it will be a nightmare for conservative values. "So please, can you chip in $5 to help me fight back against Pelosi, the entire Democrat establishment, and their new MASSIVE warchest of cash?" | Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate PO Box 530650 Miami, FL 33153 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Rand Paul
subject: If you read one email today, let this be it
body:
You and I are bombarded with bad news every day in the media and in our inbox:
[](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05a483d88eee42de9dafa2e9e62eca29&_e=jr0lM9yDLkJ2wGiM4uhFWh4Ky7U9HnYeidp9_XQVBUjr_V_A_cKHY96zByGtZGKEl7PcW8Idi97ES_pOcDGrv6L8xiC1RK99cIONyugZKtPMhImdWI9m7e47C6bchbkfFCUwO6JUEHujA_CCtbVL8E5Zh2oSVj5D__7XYwf1XEkHbXLsiD-eyHjM0JRfHn1wQLMZdV4skmYbzJIwGCFTxWTYFCb4kd6tP0hcGxgwgGQUMI6rGZdD2Y8Uiw-CVgZB5TZtX1TlBFSoU8TbAWMViA%3D%3D)

Friend,

You and I are bombarded with bad news every day in the media and in our inbox:
* Big tech is silencing pro-liberty voices
* Universities are running amok with radical socialists
* The mainstream media openly lies to the public
* Corporate America has embraced Woke propaganda
* Pelosi and her cronies are passing a radical agenda in Congress

Despite all this: _**Yes, there is hope for the future**_.

_What if I told you the thing that gives me the MOST hope are our college students?_ You'd think I was crazy. Aren't they all radicals too?

**Wrong. **

A group of college students is fighting for liberty and may be one of our greatest chances of saving our Republic. Here are a few of their recent victories...
* Helped pass Constitutional Carry in Texas, Indiana, and Alabama!
* Helped expand School Choice in Kentucky, Arizona, and Missouri!
* Adding over 250 hardcore pro-liberty legislators to a national coalition across the country!
* SUED dozens of college campuses and restored free speech rights to over 1.5 million college students!

College students are lining up to defend Constitutional principles and grow a coalition of liberty legislators across the country. Here's how they are doing it.

Allow me to personally introduce Lauren Daugherty. She is the CEO of Young Americans for Liberty (YAL). YAL is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus and in American electoral politics.

**Friend, I told Lauren I would help YAL raise $23,000 online. It will go directly towards YAL 's work to fight for laws that advance liberty, train students to become door knockers before the 2022 elections, and so much more. I am asking for your immediate support now to get 1,000 students mobilized for freedom. **

[_**Donate $10 >>**_](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05a483d88eee42de9dafa2e9e62eca29&_e=jr0lM9yDLkJ2wGiM4uhFWh4Ky7U9HnYeidp9_XQVBUjr_V_A_cKHY96zByGtZGKEl7PcW8Idi97ES_pOcDGrv6L8xiC1RK99cIONyugZKtNXhAawJisfLbwnZRYepO7mmOXU5tuOOvQDQAM0m6CRcDZiz_WGlsh0mAssfO5BLwQrK3wjNsL5OwkAWjyW7dzj1-Njs_yimYQHdaK9uCdVWahwQrANC9yk6MdvWt4FKylV23pxPLKhhjlcrfQgqk65tk8av1I3KsidTcXW0JXIR-3WbVaGsYvoiQvMka4Hjys%3D)

Here's how it works.

> **First:** YAL recruits tens of thousands of students across college campuses. These students start and join an active YAL chapter where they fight back against leftist bias on campus.
>
> **Next:** YAL takes the top student leaders and brings them to top notch trainings. There, students are taught how to transform their campus and fight for liberty candidates and causes in the legislature.
>
> **Then:** Thousands of student activists recruited and trained by YAL knock on doors to push liberty legislation, and turn out the vote for liberty-minded candidates running for office.
>
> **Finally:** These liberty legislators pass bills to defend freedom of speech, protect the 2nd Amendment, and expand free markets.

The results speak volumes of this successful formula to make liberty WIN:

YAL's student activists have helped elect over 250 pro-liberty legislators, repealed 99 unconstitutional free speech codes and regulations, and have started chapters on over 500 college campuses across the country.

All of this hinges on training the next generation of liberty patriots.

Can you join me today to help YAL defend our liberty and train the next generation of liberty activists? Click below to send your urgent support.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Disturbing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We had to take our ads down. We need help ASAP. We had to take our ads down. We need help ASAP. |
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e7d622482c6341dba4e2cede486bf0ff&_e=iED7xCX8MZAob3H6TY0Ff7cX027WixDZy0qHSStjIKYdev-YrbaiXi-uZhEekN-FnewSSr8IU7YFJBRuOEDPD0sv3ymtZ7lP8p0O2tZhBD48uGzqA2DVQHFKV3vUqh73Y60Q9LD2q9WUMEuXtNAy-EJUIf5MIhT9v8NNTGUu8KaAnbGI90FgmgyKSzPg36KDli_WbM19c15vSG0hc-vEkZx_ACEvykfFc_EZTs-Bu9IKxT9oZickRLDHLwUvmuJ6II0XwWomkr6uzP2v9V9y5u58sSoTOg_5K55eD8frfQHcMYHKGCl9uHHk3s8lCBhqaWXdT4IlYSPJgmsB-tNnPEzZIn0zsUTl_FWih3E0LcUB9XkLkwqR8BMBpEcOPPUdv5T85k3axUIXniIqY35mCA%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

By now, you probably know that our Senate campaign recently pulled our TV ads off the air in Georgia because we didn't have enough money to run them from May through November like our opponent, Senator Raphael Warnock.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Happy Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
On weekends, when I have the time, I like to take Chip on walks along the rail trail
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50241612/365125668/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1571-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWIwNGMzMy1hYTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3yqCWIilrV0HFzAr2bKa46mk2LgoKytRqkVslP3uqgU=)
Happy Sunday, friends!

On weekends, when I have the time, I like to take Chip on walks along the rail trail, where occasionally, he'll end up dragging me into the stream.

I just got back from our walk, and I wanted to take a minute to update you on the state of this race as I sit with Chip, who's curled up as much as a 70-pound black lab can curl on this chair.
Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies are spending over $53 million on attack ads to defeat me; back-to-back polls show Don Bolduc – a far-right extremist – leading in the New Hampshire polls; and the Cook Political Report downgraded Democrats' chances of holding the Senate. On top of it all, a McConnell-aligned super PAC just made a $23 million ad buy in New Hampshire that will drown us out in the final weeks of the election.
That's a lot of bad news, I know.

So here's some good news.

As one of the only two Democrats who flipped a Senate seat in 2016, a year where Democrats lost across the country, I know exactly what it takes to overcome the odds and win.

The secret is you, our grassroots supporters. We can't protect this seat and hold our vulnerable Senate majority without you chipping in when you can.
[**So I'm asking, will you chip in to my reelection campaign on this Sunday evening? The amount doesn't matter as much as the donation itself.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50241613/365125669/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1571-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWIwNGMzMy1hYTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3yqCWIilrV0HFzAr2bKa46mk2LgoKytRqkVslP3uqgU=)
Thank you – I really appreciate it.

I hope you enjoy your Sunday!

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

Protect abortion rights, primary Kyrsten Sinema. | | | [](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q_boJ84P5meW2j9XfOjjDViVzJn9afIv4tV2SURizlsZqzD8REfF59ei5fKy2ggAK5wVbIMZSnlkz2rMtZ7u6eFGzAK7r-OjIKG07lBOz_JaFZUn2etN1H5ZTRIqjxsQXtSa_IZLlgxbZOvPkkuu2FLc_pGkZJor3MzaRJ1ycyLnVguO6xW08QEbiDvxXFc1Hyg-GtPPC9Ixo1AsVT_vmrPrrPVOP6452NM9KbRIem94A/3p6/3KK_zcXCTlG6LNL41nFUhQ/h0/GmQnwBekZOXgcED5OrkYkycPs31Ug-_SRAn38wNs4GA)
Peter, tyrsten Sinema doesn’t care about reproductive rights. Because of her unwavering devotion to the filibuster, Democrats have been prevented from codifying abortion rights and undoing the damage done by the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe. Meanwhile, a dozen states have already banned abortion, and even more are creating extreme restrictions.
We’ve all read the horror stories – pregnant minors forced to cross state lines, people in dire medical conditions refused life-saving interventions, women forced to carry non-viable fetuses. And Sinema stands in the way of reversing this dystopia. When the people of Arizona elected Kyrsten Sinema in 2018, they did so with the belief she would protect our fundamental rights, not give them up at the first mention of filibuster reform. The fate of abortion in America comes down to just a few seats in the Senate. While we lay the groundwork to defeat Sinema, we’re also doing everything we can to make her irrelevant by electing more pro-choice, anti-filibuster Democrats. **It’s up to us to replace Kyrsten Sinema with a real Democrat who will stand up for the right to choose. ---
Friend – At the NDRC, we’re keenly aware of the importance of state supreme court races. Among other things, they play a critical role in whether voters get fair maps:
“Since the U.S. Supreme Court said in 2019 that the federal judiciary had no role in policing partisan gerrymandering, **state Supreme Courts have increasingly weighed in – often throwing out Republican-drawn maps** in states like Pennsylvania and North Carolina...”
_– Politico_
---
You can see why the GOP would like to stack state courts the same way they stacked the U.S. Supreme Court – and **_why it’s so important to fight back_**. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Message to Joe Biden
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=message_to_joe_biden&n=1)
---
Peter \-- I'm going to be very direct here. What Joe Biden did on Thursday angers me and makes me want to get some things off my chest... Joe Biden is a disgusting, disaster of a president who is taking America in the completely wrong direction. Any honest observer can see this when they look at rising prices, escalating crime and his constant assault on individual liberties. **Yet the puppet masters behind this joke of a President had the audacity to stand him in front of Independence Hall Thursday night to call tens of millions of patriotic Americans a "threat" to democracy.** Biden stated, or should I say read the teleprompter: "MAGA Republicans do not respect the Constitution. They do not believe in the rule of law. They do not recognize the will of the people. They refuse to accept the results of a free election." What a statement made by a person who has pissed on the Constitution for over four decades in the Senate and now in the Oval Office. It was Joe Biden who recently lost a Supreme Court case where he instituted an illegal and unconstitutional mandate forcing workers to get an experimental drug. And now he wants to infringe on the rights of millions of Americans who own the most common sportsman rifle in the country. MAGA Republicans, as Biden labels them, are some of the most American loving patriots I know. There's no core ideology other than a great respect for America and its founding ideals.
## Nothing about that is extreme!
In fact, I work every day with a MAGA hat wearing patriot, Jesse Smith. He's a young, well educated, good spirited individual who gives me hope for future generations. But Biden trashed him and the tens of millions like him. **I asked Jesse to respond to Biden's speech. Here's what he had to say:** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRbtKzYlPEUDz-f7gTN6CoSh&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=message_to_joe_biden&n=2)
## [WATCH NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRbtKzYlPEUDz-f7gTN6CoSh&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=message_to_joe_biden&n=3)
What probably angers me the most about Biden's speech is the obvious gaslighting. He stated that MAGA Republicans "promote authoritarian leaders, and they fanned the flames of political violence that are a threat to our personal rights, to the pursuit of justice, to the rule of law, to the very soul of this country." **First off, the authoritarians in this country are coming from the left - governors and Biden himself who usurped legislative powers during the Pandemic.** Sure, Trump protrudes power and strength, but he didn't use that to force citizens to get experimental jabs or silence political opponents on social media.
## That's the work of Joe Biden!
And who on earth thought that standing in front of a dark, red backlit scene was a good idea?! Don't lecture us on authoritarianism!

Secondly, the political violence is mostly coming from the left or groups that the left protects. We saw a rise in violence from Antifa, a radical leftist group, following the election of Donald Trump. And then in the summer of 2020, BLM and other radical leftist groups conducted mass riots and violent protests in major cities across America. That violence continues today and the cohorts are being protected by Democrats who run these cities and the states. Some people may believe Biden is right about all of this. After all, millions of Americans have been spoon-fed a one-sided narrative by the corporate media for years. But the seriousness of Biden's speech should be questioned when it was uncovered in July that Democrat House Speaker [Nancy Pelosi was caught boosting MAGA Republicans](https://www.action4liberty.com/biden_s_disturbing_speech_labeling_maga_patriots?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=message_to_joe_biden&n=4) in primaries because Democrats saw them as easier targets for the General Election. So either Democrats are full of crap about MAGA Republicans representing a threat to democracy OR they aided and abetted a serious threat to our country. **Which one is it?** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/biden_s_disturbing_speech_labeling_maga_patriots?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=message_to_joe_biden&n=5) What Biden did on Thursday night was a step too far. Voters need to send a message on November 8th that this rhetoric and gaslighting will not be tolerated. The traitors in the Political Class are running our country into the ground. **You can rest assured that your Action 4 Liberty will be on the frontlines, taking our message directly to voters in the next two months.** We will continue accepting MAGA Republicans into the ranks of our enormous grassroots movement. And **WE WILL** prevail! | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=message_to_joe_biden&n=6 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=message_to_joe_biden&n=6)
---
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=message_to_joe_biden&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=message_to_joe_biden&n=8).

clean_body: | Peter \-- I'm going to be very direct here. What Joe Biden did on Thursday angers me and makes me want to get some things off my chest... Joe Biden is a disgusting, disaster of a president who is taking America in the completely wrong direction. Any honest observer can see this when they look at rising prices, escalating crime and his constant assault on individual liberties. Yet the puppet masters behind this joke of a President had the audacity to stand him in front of Independence Hall Thursday night to call tens of millions of patriotic Americans a "threat" to democracy. Biden stated, or should I say read the teleprompter: "MAGA Republicans do not respect the Constitution. They do not believe in the rule of law. They do not recognize the will of the people. They refuse to accept the results of a free election." What a statement made by a person who has pissed on the Constitution for over four decades in the Senate and now in the Oval Office. It was Joe Biden who recently lost a Supreme Court case where he instituted an illegal and unconstitutional mandate forcing workers to get an experimental drug. And now he wants to infringe on the rights of millions of Americans who own the most common sportsman rifle in the country. MAGA Republicans, as Biden labels them, are some of the most American loving patriots I know. There's no core ideology other than a great respect for America and its founding ideals. Nothing about that is extreme! In fact, I work every day with a MAGA hat wearing patriot, Jesse Smith. He's a young, well educated, good spirited individual who gives me hope for future generations. But Biden trashed him and the tens of millions like him. I asked Jesse to respond to Biden's speech. Here's what he had to say: What probably angers me the most about Biden's speech is the obvious gaslighting. He stated that MAGA Republicans "promote authoritarian leaders, and they fanned the flames of political violence that are a threat to our personal rights, to the pursuit of justice, to the rule of law, to the very soul of this country." First off, the authoritarians in this country are coming from the left - governors and Biden himself who usurped legislative powers during the Pandemic. Sure, Trump protrudes power and strength, but he didn't use that to force citizens to get experimental jabs or silence political opponents on social media. That's the work of Joe Biden! And who on earth thought that standing in front of a dark, red backlit scene was a good idea?! Don't lecture us on authoritarianism! Secondly, the political violence is mostly coming from the left or groups that the left protects. We saw a rise in violence from Antifa, a radical leftist group, following the election of Donald Trump. And then in the summer of 2020, BLM and other radical leftist groups conducted mass riots and violent protests in major cities across America. That violence continues today and the cohorts are being protected by Democrats who run these cities and the states. Some people may believe Biden is right about all of this. After all, millions of Americans have been spoon-fed a one-sided narrative by the corporate media for years. But the seriousness of Biden's speech should be questioned when it was uncovered in July that Democrat House Speaker in primaries because Democrats saw them as easier targets for the General Election. So either Democrats are full of crap about MAGA Republicans representing a threat to democracy OR they aided and abetted a serious threat to our country. Which one is it? What Biden did on Thursday night was a step too far. Voters need to send a message on November 8th that this rhetoric and gaslighting will not be tolerated. The traitors in the Political Class are running our country into the ground. You can rest assured that your Action 4 Liberty will be on the frontlines, taking our message directly to voters in the next two months. We will continue accepting MAGA Republicans into the ranks of our enormous grassroots movement. And WE WILL prevail! | "Support Us" In Liberty, ** Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113 Action 4 Liberty · United States

Team -- Thanks to the Senate majority that grassroots supporters like you helped us win, Democrats and President Biden have passed a HISTORIC bill to tackle inflation, fight climate change, and reduce costs of everything from health care to energy.

But Mitch McConnell is just **ONE SEAT** away from _completely halting_ President Biden’s progress. With November fast approaching, we’re running out of time to secure our Democratic majority -- **and the GOP’s megadonors are spending MILLIONS in key races to defeat us.**

We’re counting on members of this grassroots team to help us defend the progress we’ve fought hard to create. **Over 300 Democrats have already updated their membership today,_but we’re still 43 memberships short of our goal in Pennsylvania._**

**_[Please, activate your Democratic membership before midnight to join the team that will save our Senate majority and protect our progress >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/9394?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220904-MembershipAlert-MembershipRecentActivated-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220904-MembershipAlert-MembershipRecentActivated-Pros-sl1&akid=6371%2E9716520%2EjVrOgS)_**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Don’t let them silence you, friend
body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=62439b4cc51f4123b8089697ac79eddf&_e=cuoVF80SMAjg4ixjanM4mrBNZj07eNcAOmhW9d33yK4avg2moGhMjwNN0uYojUwWCxCH5m4bnlDfe3MTH1yk1WzCOuGd4aIVSYK4wmh4-uZ3Vb5p4t9tw-bHLCz2LvUEMkS1FsZUTjppN8hc5F37mOZQl_eeMMNFD675cNFZ154IuWxQPBcGuVE2_jy06MvG7QtCVs2d7KjmXF6pxAnbZ5Bq0OQix78emLThyh5xvo_npi15o83RD0kl6a1GJK9O0WOKSL8ISAHOmyjqvrOStB1ceFYm9XzSOjogVnLQDIUB5C0B8wZ5O4Xqzmd4q8mmpWQAHqsWtEM4dl5qT8M1G50fezzVbJ0iKDefPtzaEOI%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Liberals are trying to silence conservatives and undermine our freedom and our values. They violated federal law in an attempt to attack me and silence you. You know why? Because I spoke up. Because I exposed the Left’s harmful agenda. Because I stood up to the Left. So they came after me. They came after Stand For America because we expose the truth about their dangerous liberal ideas. But I refuse to let the Left win. I wear heels, and it’s not just for a fashion statement. It’s because when I see something wrong, I’m going to kick them... every single time. That’s right... I’m fighting back, and I hope you’ll join me. Let’s show the Left we won't be silenced. We won't be intimidated. [**If you want to join us in this fight, chip in with a donation today.**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=62439b4cc51f4123b8089697ac79eddf&_e=cuoVF80SMAjg4ixjanM4mrBNZj07eNcAOmhW9d33yK4avg2moGhMjwNN0uYojUwWCxCH5m4bnlDfe3MTH1yk1WzCOuGd4aIVSYK4wmh4-uZ3Vb5p4t9tw-bHLCz2LvUEMkS1FsZUTjppN8hc5F37mOZQl_eeMMNFD675cNFZ154IuWxQPBcGuVE2_jy06MvGXLfE4sCUWunYSztGs26qGQpLazYWOrWV087uqNXVj3QMG10uCWzhWrGwhGgWvLt771WOWGgUgATOOw098tAdOJtxIY7XLKuioHnF9FG47le2qig9sG2L_rsDQdGKqsSX7XGPoRc9MT9cm9GFIJ3WWkeYjjSAhbkQOxuKHc5u2yY%3D) My very best,

clean_body: | | | Friend, Liberals are trying to silence conservatives and undermine our freedom and our values. They violated federal law in an attempt to attack me and silence you. You know why? Because I spoke up. Because I exposed the Left’s harmful agenda. Because I stood up to the Left. So they came after me. They came after Stand For America because we expose the truth about their dangerous liberal ideas. But I refuse to let the Left win. I wear heels, and it’s not just for a fashion statement. It’s because when I see something wrong, I’m going to kick them... every single time. That’s right... I’m fighting back, and I hope you’ll join me. Let’s show the Left we won't be silenced. We won't be intimidated. My very best, Nikki Haley | DON’T MISS THIS UPDATE Did you know Nikki Haley recently endorsed a new slate of candidates for the upcoming midterm elections? name: Raphael W.
subject: I reject corporate PAC money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |

Friend, here are two quick things you need to know about our race:
**1._NPR_ has ranked Georgia's Democratic Senate seat as the _most likely_ to flip red this November. **That's why national Republicans are spending millions to defeat me.
**2\. Polling shows me 1 point behind Herschel Walker, my Trump-endorsed opponent **–** ** and I can't fight back and pull ahead without you.
I've made the decision to reject corporate PAC money, so I'm fully relying on grassroots folks like you to power our reelection campaign to victory. **With experts from _FiveThirtyEight_ saying this race could decide Senate control, I'm personally asking:**
**[Friend, will you please rush $5 or more now to help us fight back against this surge in GOP spending, keep Georgia blue, and defend our Senate majority? Time is running out before our midnight fundraising deadline, and we're falling short of our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50239683/365117515/-1789705490?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3901-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODQ4NGEzZC05NTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0j-6DGZhvfiC_eVLEyp-V-Jb168iB6Fgj_h4b8Ys0qI=)**

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I’m grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. Our midterm elections are taking place this November, and I need your help.

With Democrats’ razor-thin majority in the Senate, Republicans have to flip just one seat to retake control – and experts say that I’m the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection. Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me, and GOP super PACs are smearing me with attack ads. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

If you’re with me in this fight, _[**please donate now to win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50239688/365117520/-1789705490?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3901-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODQ4NGEzZC05NTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0j-6DGZhvfiC_eVLEyp-V-Jb168iB6Fgj_h4b8Ys0qI=)_ If you’d like to become one of my TOP supporters and receive exclusive updates from our campaign team, _**text “GEORGIA” to 52005.**_

Thank you!

name: Darius Mayfield
subject: A Message from Darius Mayfield, Candidate for Congress

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=5328%2E3611125%2EiZe8jk ][IMG]

OK ... so you definitely don’t want to hear me sing.

But you can listen to me when it comes to talking about winning campaigns.

So believe me when I say what happens in September will be absolutely
critical to who wins and loses Ohio’s Senate race this November. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20625?t=1009&amount=25&akid=5328%2E3611125%2EiZe8jk ]Will
you add a quick $25 donation to make sure Tim has what he needs to flip
Ohio blue and expand our Senate majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20625?t=1010&amount=25&akid=5328%2E3611125%2EiZe8jk ]Donate

Right now, national Republicans are outspending us 3-to-1, yet Tim is
still running neck-and-neck with millionaire extremist JD Vance in the
polls.

But if we don’t close that spending gap before voting begins NEXT MONTH,
we won’t have the resources to combat the GOP’s latest attacks with new TV
ads, or run a successful Get-Out-The-Vote operation with our field
organizing staff.

You tell me where we stand at the end of September, and I’ll tell you
whether or not our campaign has what it takes to flip Ohio blue and expand
our Democratic majority.

We can’t wait any longer, folks—the time to act is now. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/20625?t=1011&amount=25&akid=5328%2E3611125%2EiZe8jk ]So,
can we count on you to support Tim’s campaign so we can defeat JD Vance
and keep Senate control?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

body:
We wanted to make sure this GREAT news didn’t get lost in your inbox.

We wanted to make sure this GREAT news didn’t get lost in your inbox. A new poll was released on Wednesday that has **Cheri leading by just 1 point!**
[**Republicans are going to respond by flooding in even more dark money ASAP to stop us from surging. So please, rush in $3 or any amount you can to make sure we’re ready to fight back.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-sep22.KSPoKB&refcode=em220904-2-MA&refcode2=1655.357359.j3mSM9&t=1&akid=1655%2E357359%2Ej3mSM9)

* * *
#
A new public poll was just released in North Carolina that shows Cheri edging into the lead:
**_Public Policy Polling: Aug. 31 Poll_
Cheri Beasley (D): 42%
Ted Budd (R): 41%
[**Can you make a $3 donation to help Cheri keep up her momentum and flip this seat in November?**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-sep22.KSPoKB&refcode=em220904-2-MA&refcode2=1655.357359.j3mSM9&t=3&akid=1655%2E357359%2Ej3mSM9)
**[DONATE](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-sep22.KSPoKB&refcode=em220904-2-MA&t=4&akid=1655%2E357359%2Ej3mSM9)**
This race could not be closer.
We are in a strong position to win, but it is going to be a nail-biter on Election Day.
A 1-point lead puts this race well within the margin of error. It’s a true toss-up, which means this seat is likely to decide whether or not Democrats expand our majority and secure the decisive vote to make meaningful progress in the Senate.
While Republicans are planning to spend tens of millions of dollars against Cheri in the coming weeks, this poll shows that we are running the strategy we need to win.
But only if we stay focused on our mission and do this together.
[**Please, if you can, contribute $3 or any amount today to flip North Carolina and send Cheri Beasley to the U.S. Senate.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-sep22.KSPoKB&refcode=em220904-2-MA&refcode2=1655.357359.j3mSM9&t=5&akid=1655%2E357359%2Ej3mSM9)

body:
Recent polling shows me TIED with Marco Rubio.
| | |

Friend,

I just got word from my finance team that I'm still falling $13,000 short of my critical midnight goal. **I'm worried I won't be able to make up the difference in the next few hours, so I'm reaching out with an urgent plea for help.**
Recent polling shows me TIED with Marco Rubio. I know I can surge ahead, but this fundraising goal is critical, **and I don’t have the option of falling short of my important $50,000 midnight goal.**
I know I ask a lot of this grassroots team, but I wanted to shed a bit more light on why: POLITICO reported that this race could attract the MOST outside money this election cycle. The NRSC has raised more than $75 million and are investing to keep Florida permanently red. And they'll continue pouring in as much as it takes to defeat me,**so I have to meet my goal tonight to expand our Senate majority!**
With your help, I know we have what it takes to defeat Marco Rubio. Our movement is so strong that The Cook Political Report increased my odds of winning, and our momentum is making national headlines. Together, we can flip Florida blue, **but only if I hit each fundraising goal every step of the way.**
I have no one else to turn to if I'm going to hit my midnight goal and defeat Marco Rubio, so I'm counting on you to rush a donation right now. Please, if you can spare even a few dollars before midnight tonight, it would make a huge difference in my race.
Here's the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email-september](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50240027/365118931/-1315874399?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4250-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWZjMTNiZC05ODJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ivY316sy6lBY1FHP4IpduxvIfHqBKdr6k-ynp4rjGCs=)**

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Before Thursday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Help us keep Beto on the road.
#
Beto's on the road finishing out our 49-day Drive for Texas. Since July, Beto has been traveling more than 5,600 miles to hold around 70 public events all across Texas — from Amarillo to Longview to San Antonio.
On Thursday, we'll wrap up this Drive for Texas in Lockhart with a festive event featuring live musicians. But before we do that, we have to ask:
[If you can, will you play a role in our Drive for Texas by chipping in $3 now to ensure we have the resources to finish this 49-day drive? Every dollar will make a difference and help Beto reach more voters.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220904-2.-h3Dao&refcode=ema20220904-206308&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=206308%2E444211%2E69heeV)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220904-2.-h3Dao&refcode=ema20220904-206308&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=206308%2E444211%2E69heeV)**
While Greg Abbott hasn't held a single public, in-person town hall meeting during the entire general election (not even one!), we're going everywhere and talking to everyone to get the word out about Beto's positive vision for Texas.
At every event, we're hearing from Democrats, Republicans, and Independents that they believe Beto can move our state forward — and first-time voters are coming out by the hundreds to hear Beto's plan to get it done. _But an aggressive travel schedule like this takes major resources._
Please, thanks to the support of this grassroots campaign, we're able to power our Drive for Texas without a cent from corporate PACs. [ Will you chip in $3 right now to help us keep Beto on the road so we can connect with more voters and finish this drive strong?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220904-2.-h3Dao&refcode=ema20220904-206308&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=206308%2E444211%2E69heeV)
Thank you,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220904-206308-footer&t=22&refcode2=206308_444211_69heeV&akid=206308%2E444211%2E69heeV)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=206308%2E444211%2E69heeV)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=206308%2E444211%2E69heeV)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

**_RECENT POLL HAS MARKED THIS CONNECTICUT SEAT AS: COMPETITIVE_**

Fellow Conservative -- the Connecticut Senate race is the KEY to the Senate majority... _and no one is talking about it._

In a recent poll that asked undecided voters who they would vote for, it was reported **that 40.6 percent of independent voters said they would vote for Blumenthal and 40.8 percent would vote for Levy, with 18.6 percent undecided.** That is a virtual tie!

_This race just got a whole lot more competitive,_ and we need to reach each one of those voters if we are going to save the Senate from Democrat control.

subject: Sign the Petition: No One is Above the Law

body:
**Trump broke the law when he refused to hand over TOP SECRET documents claiming they are “mine”.**
**[Sign if you believe NO ONE Is above the law.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50240706/365121710/-1058063097?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220902_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDdiYzMxYi05ZTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLv_STAqe6ZRW5wOmAqaDCyGSb4e6Q4aPECqxohikhs=&emci=418ecaa0-9d2c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=d07bc31b-9e2c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=21617867)**
The egregiousness of Trump’s national security breach is stunning. Hundreds of documents with _**the highest category of classification**_ were in the basement of Mar-a-Lago, a violation of the Presidential Records Act and possibly espionage.
Trump’s list of crimes grows by the day, and he has been obstructing justice from the beginning. Until the FBI search of Mar-a-Lago, he refused to return over 11 sets of documents marked “Top Secret” and were only to be viewed in Sensitive Compartmented Information Facilities (SCIFs).
**Donald Trump has willfully put our national security at risk! Documents with the highest sensitivity were stored in the basement at his _golf resort_. What was he planning to do with them?**
**[Please sign our petition! Our country is a nation of laws, and NO ONE is ABOVE the law.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50240707/365121711/-1058063097?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220902_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDdiYzMxYi05ZTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLv_STAqe6ZRW5wOmAqaDCyGSb4e6Q4aPECqxohikhs=&emci=418ecaa0-9d2c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=d07bc31b-9e2c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=21617867)**
While in office, Trump made the removal and retention of classified documents a felony punishable by up to five years in prison. _Did he somehow think he would be exempt?_
Again, we have to ask, what was Trump planning to do with these TOP SECRET documents? And why would he continually refuse to return them? Who else has had access to these documents?
**Trump continues to be a wrecking ball to our country. He has been breaking norms, rules, and laws for years. We need to end his impunity NOW! **
**[Sign our petition if you agree - The leader of a nation of laws CAN NOT be above them. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50240708/365121712/-1058063097?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220902_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDdiYzMxYi05ZTJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SLv_STAqe6ZRW5wOmAqaDCyGSb4e6Q4aPECqxohikhs=&emci=418ecaa0-9d2c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=d07bc31b-9e2c-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=21617867)**
A law without justice is a wound without a cure.
-Derek Marshall for Congress

clean_body: Trump broke the law when he refused to hand over TOP SECRET documents claiming they are “mine”. The egregiousness of Trump’s national security breach is stunning. Hundreds of documents with the highest category of classification were in the basement of Mar-a-Lago, a violation of the Presidential Records Act and possibly espionage. Trump’s list of crimes grows by the day, and he has been obstructing justice from the beginning. Until the FBI search of Mar-a-Lago, he refused to return over 11 sets of documents marked “Top Secret” and were only to be viewed in Sensitive Compartmented Information Facilities (SCIFs). Donald Trump has willfully put our national security at risk! Documents with the highest sensitivity were stored in the basement at his golf resort. What was he planning to do with them? While in office, Trump made the removal and retention of classified documents a felony punishable by up to five years in prison. Did he somehow think he would be exempt? Again, we have to ask, what was Trump planning to do with these TOP SECRET documents? And why would he continually refuse to return them? Who else has had access to these documents? Trump continues to be a wrecking ball to our country. He has been breaking norms, rules, and laws for years. We need to end his impunity NOW! A law without justice is a wound without a cure. -Derek Marshall for Congress = Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. = To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 (760) 486-2416 Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | |

body:
