name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Trump said Biden’s speech was, “the most vicious, hateful and divisive speech ever delivered by an American president.” Donald. Trump. The man who spent four years inciting violence against the press and people of color at his rallies, has accused President Biden of being divisive. It’s so important to stand with Biden and the DNC as they prepare to stand up for us against MAGA anger during this election season.
body:
MAGA fury at Biden’s speech
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter _,_ Donald Trump has gotten into the act. **President Joe Biden gave the speech we've all been waiting for this last week, and Trump told his MAGA followers that it was, “the most vicious, hateful and divisive speech ever delivered by an American president.”** [**Can you join us in donating $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the DNC, to show them this new fighting Democratic Party is what we must have going into November!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0224c82-5c52-43ad-a8fd-1ebe7476154e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Biden called out Republicans who call Democrats names as if they don’t even know any polite words, but have been whining nonstop since the moment he referred to MAGA Republicans as "semi-fascist." The poor dears._ The entire GOP culture is based around "owning the libs" at this point, which means basing your existence in politics on hurting your opponents, as opposed to doing anything good or constructive for your constituents, the country or really anyone. And it shows in their behavior. **_Baby killer. Communist. Christ Killer. America Hater. Libt*rd. These are just some of the many things I've been called, and not just by random Twitter users, but by elected & appointed GOP officeholders, as well as prominent Republican pundits and writers._ ** **_But like any bully, they crawl up in a ball when you hit back. And last week Biden hit back. He pointed out Trump cult's attacks on democracy, on the rule of law and the threats and intimidation that are second nature to them. They're not used to this! So they are lashing out like toddlers on a playground fighting over a swing._**
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: STAND WITH BIDEN & THE DNC!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T368402fb-1de7-437c-84d0-f8320b02aece/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| This is an incredible development, and one of which we should all be proud. I have talked on this list before about how our lack of messaging about our achievements, and about who they really are, hurts us in elections. Well, with some of the younger Democrats like Reps. Ruben Gallego, Eric Swalwell and Katie Porter, Senators like Cory Booker and Brian Schatz and Governors and candidates like Beto O'Rourke, Stacey Abrams, John Fetterman & Gretchen Whitmer leading the way, we are changing the culture of our party. _If I could sum it up, I'd quote the late Patrick Swayze from the film Road House. "Be nice. Until it's time not to be nice."_ **_Sometimes, you need to punch a bully in the nose. And that's what we're now doing. So as a HUGE THANK YOU for Joe Biden's speech last night, I'd like to ask you to join us in donating to the Democratic National Committee (DNC) today. It feels very much like they're ready to roll, and roll over Republicans, in November. _** [**They got our message, let's make sure we reinforce it with financial support so they have the resources to win an overwhelming victory in November! So can you join us in donating $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to the DNC, to show them this new fighting Democratic Party is what we must have going into November!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3051bd24-4280-4901-836d-b464de655e64/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for being a part of this fight for, as Joe Biden puts it, "the soul of our nation." Cliff
---
|
---

name: Stop the Insurrectionists (via DLCC.org)
subject: Would you want an insurrectionist writing your community's election laws?
body:
Election deniers and proponents of violence have no place in our state legislatures. | | |
---
| | **Would you want someone that denied the results of the 2020 election and tried to prevent the peaceful transition of power writing your community’s election laws?** No, probably not – but here’s the reality: More than **400** insurrection enablers _just like that_ could be on the state legislative ballot this November, and some of them are already in office. That’s why we started our Stop the Insurrectionists Fund, dedicated to fighting back against the hundreds of insurrection enablers running for office. clean_body: Election deniers and proponents of violence have no place in our state legislatures. | | | | | Would you want someone that denied the results of the 2020 election and tried to prevent the peaceful transition of power writing your community’s election laws? No, probably not – but here’s the reality: More than 400 insurrection enablers just like that could be on the state legislative ballot this November, and some of them are already in office. That’s why we started our Stop the Insurrectionists Fund, dedicated to fighting back against the hundreds of insurrection enablers running for office. Election deniers have no place in our state legislatures – that’s why we’re mobilizing now to have the vital infrastructure in place to defeat them this November. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | This year’s midterm elections are gearing up to be ultra-competitive. The GOP is pouring resources into the states, and Trump has been parading around the country endorsing right-wing candidates up-and-down the ballot. By strengthening our majorities and building our Democratic power this November, we can protect our democracy from the extremist agenda of insurrectionists and their enablers. Friends -

**_Consider this a last call._**

I'm losing to my Radical Socialist opponent, and the prospect of Republicans taking back the House in 2022 is dying by the day.

**[We need your support,](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=980106a6dd9640f8a30961d7f9c14046&_e=xu5Dejg9qivG4nUwxSoMyDq734gInDlWQZLVWPO1hoJwDQFud9vZ8WXe9f92ajmDeTYF5A_lDs7tu5rCk_NhOVuDMM_VU_1QRMkS_dOY1J0Ng8oDBmIsKL47WV7RVl5gjRUcgY54wybnU6BP4f1FCgOi52ueDC2CMBl5VSY8BDzJv6fcRRkTUs-M32-XsyiWGxi4DkeeWUT8o4sN5XQpqdxZADJ24FN3lgHmhwLmcTnip6PSxDzWzfTbFQFmI2Gm_ftI0JWICzNGoV7QKhcdi_Ttj56uiCQdQdZIFRezsM1H3aH8H2cy7Z2j4vHJZr_tg2QuCeawqT5F5yXJZK-YM-uwOOct_9Zsyl7tKV8e3OlIBZNsg7spdr8j0d-xSHVHO3XT5tgUIWfmM-jSsR418cKYyE98YC0JOTX29BmLVIjYscPxnCRTftNU5y8vbjjW6pjF0m7ZWpVS0cYJ0znSfw%3D%3D)** and we need it now if we want to continue to strengthen the America First Agenda and get our nation back on track.

CAN YOU CHIP IN TO BOOST MY CAMPAIGN? -> **[SECURE.WINRED.MILLERMEEKS](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=980106a6dd9640f8a30961d7f9c14046&_e=xu5Dejg9qivG4nUwxSoMyDq734gInDlWQZLVWPO1hoJwDQFud9vZ8WXe9f92ajmDeTYF5A_lDs7tu5rCk_NhOVuDMM_VU_1QRMkS_dOY1J0Ng8oDBmIsKL47WV7RVl5gjRUcgY54wybnU6BP4f1FCgOi52ueDC2CMBl5VSY8BDzJv6fcRRkTUs-M32-XsyiWGxi4DkeeWUT8o4sN5XQpqdxZADJ24FN3lgHmhwLmcTnip6PSxDzWzfTbFQFmI2Gm_ftI0JWICzNGoV7QKhcdi_Ttj56uiCQdQdZIFRezsM1H3aH8H2cy7Z2j4vHJZr_tfrkgGxomkJ4yBiWiB5gQ5AT3f6SHr2G3GpXdeoYZOiAInkqJrHH6V4IxL_JICxMHmaUftjh8LOZc7sdAT_RzewspluYJoykljifMlu4OfqqLYlJfGSlF1f3H77it5Q2rNb9V67DlH_G8qhQ7DwUXhQ%3D%3D)**

Without your support, there are a few things that are going to happen:
1. Nancy Pelosi will buy this election, and Democrats will keep the House Majority.
2. The harmful chaos that Democrat leadership has caused in the past will only get worse: continued inflation, wide-open borders, and unsafe communities.
3. The Radical Left will pass draconian nationwide mandates because there will be nobody left in Washington to stand up to the Left and support the America First Agenda.

The big question is: **[Can I count on your support? Can America count on you?](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=980106a6dd9640f8a30961d7f9c14046&_e=xu5Dejg9qivG4nUwxSoMyDq734gInDlWQZLVWPO1hoJwDQFud9vZ8WXe9f92ajmDeTYF5A_lDs7tu5rCk_NhOVuDMM_VU_1QRMkS_dOY1J0Ng8oDBmIsKL47WV7RVl5gjRUcgY54wybnU6BP4f1FCgOi52ueDC2CMBl5VSY8BDzJv6fcRRkTUs-M32-XsyiWGxi4DkeeWUT8o4sN5XQpqdxZADJ24FN3lgHmhwLmcTnip6PSxDzWzfTbFQFmI2Gm_ftI0JWICzNGoV7QKhcdi_Ttj56uiCQdQdZIFRezsM1H3aH8H2cy7Z2j4vHJZr_tj1CDZNl3zPE5n3DS9uWDLCUmqf5sbtHaO4JL3w2cffgjWVdpkpX-jxcQrqlLmsRqNtynfYbf87B0e4RRBthOm9EARMrcd6n0nec6NipmxeUtmmrVdmDtb_Htod7Ny6h_-SsT4bHw1aiLd3-cSNZ4IA%3D%3D)**

| | | I'll be blunt, Peter.

My biggest deadline of the year is here, and if we don't raise enough to meet my Extended August End of Month Goal by midnight, you can say goodbye to Trump's legacy.

Here are the facts:
* Fox News said my race will be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history.
* My opponent outraised me FIVE QUARTERS in a row.
* My opponent's last financial report showed she raised more in just one month than I did in THREE months.
* My opponent got ads up on TV a full MONTH before I was able to get TV ads on air.
* Two polls show her ads are working and we're TIED.

Hi team! Tomorrow is Labor Day, and while many associate it with cookouts and celebrating the end of summer with friends and family, the true meaning behind the holiday is to celebrate workers and the labor movement that has delivered so many of the rights we enjoy today. Before the labor movement began, many workers in the United States faced long hours, no weekends or holidays, low wages, and even unsafe or unhealthy working conditions. For more than a century, workers have come together and fought for labor rights by organizing and unionizing, winning rights such as the ability to collectively bargain, the eight-hour workday and five-day workweek, paid family and medical leave, health care, retirement security, and occupational health and safety protections. Today, unions across Maryland continue to keep up the fight for workers, including fighting for livable wages and benefits. **As your next Governor and Lt. Governor, Wes and I are committed to protecting, supporting, and empowering Maryland’s working families by:**
* Increasing the state minimum wage to $15 per hour by 2023 for all workers and automatically tying future increases to inflation;
* Ensuring every worker has access to critical benefits by implementing the Time to Care Act, which will deliver paid family and medical leave to Marylanders;
* Ensuring unions have a say in the ways we support working families;
* Combatting wage theft across the state, because everyone — especially people of color and women — deserves to be paid equally and fairly for the hours they work.

Wes and I are honored to have the support of so many organizations who support working men and women — including the Maryland State Education Association (MSEA), SEIU, Ironworkers Local #5, the Baltimore Fire Officers Union Local 964, and more. **[If you’re ready for pro-worker leaders in Annapolis, chip in $10 or more to help elect me and Wes this November so we can deliver for working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50241647/365125927/-2123748265?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220904labor_am_odpf90ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjdkZTQxMy1hYzJjLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePMV9_jyIVsQDphwux7al3tX6YahnnTO81V7HxDgPdA=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Before the labor movement began, many workers in the United States faced long hours, no weekends or holidays, low wages, and even unsafe or unhealthy working conditions. For more than a century, workers have come together and fought for labor rights by organizing and unionizing, winning rights such as the ability to collectively bargain, the eight-hour workday and five-day workweek, paid family and medical leave, health care, retirement security, and occupational health and safety protections. Today, unions across Maryland continue to keep up the fight for workers, including fighting for livable wages and benefits. As your next Governor and Lt. Governor, Wes and I are committed to protecting, supporting, and empowering Maryland’s working families by: Increasing the state minimum wage to $15 per hour by 2023 for all workers and automatically tying future increases to inflation; Ensuring every worker has access to critical benefits by implementing the Time to Care Act, which will deliver paid family and medical leave to Marylanders; Ensuring unions have a say in the ways we support working families; Combatting wage theft across the state, because everyone — especially people of color and women — deserves to be paid equally and fairly for the hours they work.
